name: Chuck Morse
subject: Trump Advisor Al Baldasaro Made It Clear: Kelly Ayotte Cannot Be Trusted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer
body:
| | | |
---
| | Derek,
Former State Representative Al Baldasaro's recent editorial in the Union Leader underscores a critical and recurring concern about my primary opponent: Kelly Ayotte cannot be trusted. Her track record speaks for itself.****
---
| | **Al Baldasaro: Ayotte Betrayed President Trump, Now She Supports Him**
---
| | AS A former state representative, co-chair for Trump's veterans' coalition in 2016, and advisor to President Donald Trump, I have a duty to speak out when I see a betrayal of trust and conservative principles. It needs to be said that former United States Senator Kelly Ayotte cannot be trusted to support Trump or the Republican values he's fought for. Let me begin by highlighting Ayotte's actions in 2016. During a pivotal moment in our nation's political landscape, Ayotte did more than just withdraw her lukewarm support of the then-GOP candidate Donald Trump.
She opted to prioritize her own reelection campaign over the unity of the Republican Party and the success of its candidates up and down the ballot. Instead of standing with her party's nominee and working to secure victory for Republicans, Ayotte publicly criticized him, setting off a chain of events that led to her own electoral defeat and handing our Granite State multiple terms of the disastrous leadership of Senator Maggie Hassan.
Throughout the 2020 and 2024 primary seasons, Ayotte had ample chances to show her support for President Trump by attending events in New Hampshire. However, time and again, she chose to remain absent. What's more alarming is her refusal to disclose who she even voted for in the primary. This lack of transparency is deeply concerning and casts serious doubt on her loyalty to Republican values. Ayotte's betrayal goes beyond mere absence. Her refusal to acknowledge President Trump by name and her shameful evasion of questions regarding her primary vote reveal a calculated political cowardice.
She wasn't just a passive bystander; she actively distanced herself from the man who represented her party's ideals and the choice of millions of voters across the nation over the course of multiple election cycles. Now, for Ayotte to suddenly campaign on the successes that President Trump has delivered for our country and our state is not only disingenuous but also insulting to the intelligence of voters. It's a transparent attempt to garner votes, but it falls flat because no one is buying into her opportunistic tactics.
Furthermore, Ayotte's record as a supposed conservative is a facade. Despite winning one election during a Republican wave, she betrayed her constituents time and again by siding with Democrats over 260 times during her tenure in the Senate. Her actions speak louder than her hollow campaign promises; she is no ally to conservative principles.
As a Marine veteran who served our country for 22 years, I understand the importance of loyalty and integrity. Kelly Ayotte's actions in 2016 and her continued refusal to support President Trump are a slap in the face to every Republican who stood by their party's nominee. Her spineless behavior and blatant disregard for party loyalty demonstrate a fundamental lack of character and leadership.
In conclusion, Kelly Ayotte's betrayal of President Trump and the Republican Party cannot be understated. She has proven herself unworthy of the trust and support of New Hampshire Republicans. It is time for us to reject her false claims of conservatism and hold her accountable for her disloyalty. Kelly Ayotte cannot be trusted to stand by President Trump or uphold our party's values, and it is imperative that we send a clear message by rejecting her candidacy.
**_Al Baldasaro is a former state representative living in Londonderry._**
---
| | In Liberty,
Chuck Morse

---
| | [Help Elect A Conservative We Can Trust to Deliver ](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)
---
| | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer. P.O. Box 106, North Salem,
NH 03073
---

name: John James
subject: Hitting the Silk.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | Friend— When you're faced with an engine failure in an Apache Helicopter, there is only one option for your survival: **you hit the silk. ** **When you’re in combat, your parachute working could be the difference between life and death. ** _**In this fight, there is no parachute and there is no exit strategy if we lose. **_ **If we hit the eject button on our mission, we will fail and the socialists and Marxist fools you see roleplaying as terrorists on college campuses will take control of our country. ** **That is what is at stake here. ** American politics is a zero-sum game, that’s something I learned that back in 2020 when we narrowly lost our mission to take back the U.S. Senate in Michigan. The consequences of that election cycle from the Senate and the Presidency have been catastrophic for this country. We fought back in 2022, defied the odds, and were victorious in taking back the House. Now, the Democrats are doing everything in their power to take me down. They’re bringing in millions from dark money donors from across the country to defeat me in one of the most competitive races in America, and they’ve already reserved millions to spread lies about me in the media. _**This isn’t about my career; this is about the future of our country.**_** ** **[**Can you help us fight back so we can protect this district and prevent a Democrat majority?**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=1e8ec51718514e7d8524d8432b87f7ba&_e=5-LEPIyWUDCiJTEqWQ2iUG80qZBeHnxlYYO5Zb2hwei4JHoIabO1nAlJyz8sxdt-ppLxMCtgmGqhJQWEn9W5Z8h18GUEx7cjoHizyg8N8W7aZUJA6aNxtGvez8QgT8CFScRhJ19pYNZ7Ywz5CNzG-qTLetNB8sIOa3Liolxd-DaOzQarMeGG_YlVYInLPeGs9VG8r_-slZDaFeGM5boojEQ96nbDlz97X91vfgOXfptVL0p-ci2b208M7dNXIA1sUKiE1205qheT9ySU-kh5Gk9NA6ALTPHl6L0Fdiww0V2zBI5E4fM31v0R448bdEHqhpuSArtjRZ2iMtSDdRMtxKy9imQmPnGjK8X1xKWtvUQ%3D)**

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This just took Josh Hawley’s anti-woman crusade to a whole new level
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
This is actually crazy, Peter.

You probably already heard about that out-of-touch speech from Chiefs kicker Harrison Butker. You might not have heard that Josh Halwey is already defending it:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85214832/474035440/1360213794?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240518_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZmFhMzQ1LTc0MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Txnw8uKZWrTsf2kSrt7m1UW1brhtimH0p8QC6M9QQwc=) | [DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85214833/474035441/1360213794?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240518_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZmFhMzQ1LTc0MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Txnw8uKZWrTsf2kSrt7m1UW1brhtimH0p8QC6M9QQwc=)
---

It’s not surprising, exactly.

**We already knew Hawley was a leader in the fight to criminalize reproductive rights in our country.** After all, his corrupt family business led the charge to overturn Roe v. Wade AND the effort to ban the abortion pill mifepristone all the way up to the Supreme Court. Hawley himself even pioneered the legal arguments that led to shutdowns of IVF clinics in Alabama earlier this year.

His obsession with “manhood” and “masculinity” have been pretty obvious too. Just take the weird book he published last year, _“Manhood: The Masculine Virtues America Needs”_ — his attempt to convince all of America’s men that they should be made in his own creepy image.

But now, Hawley’s standing by Butker’s attack on working women.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85214834/474035442/1360213794?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240518_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZmFhMzQ1LTc0MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Txnw8uKZWrTsf2kSrt7m1UW1brhtimH0p8QC6M9QQwc=) [DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85214835/474035443/1360213794?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240518_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZmFhMzQ1LTc0MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Txnw8uKZWrTsf2kSrt7m1UW1brhtimH0p8QC6M9QQwc=)
---

This guy wants to control every little thing about our lives — what we do in the workplace, in the bedroom, and in the doctor’s office. He even wants to be in charge of what we do with our own bodies.

**It’s weird. It’s creepy. And it’s sure as hell not his job.**

I’m running to replace him in the U.S. Senate because I believe everyday people should have the power to make decisions about their own lives without some control-obsessed politician or elite getting in the way. That’s a message that resonates with Missourians of all parties, all across the state.

But if we’re going to reach every Missouri voter about our people-powered campaign between now and November 5, I need your help.

[So Peter, will you split a donation of $15 or whatever feels right to you today between my campaign and Defeat Republicans so we can get this message in front of voters, defeat Hawley, and take back power for working people this year? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85214836/474035444/1360213794?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240518_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZmFhMzQ1LTc0MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Txnw8uKZWrTsf2kSrt7m1UW1brhtimH0p8QC6M9QQwc=)

clean_body: | This is actually crazy, Peter. You probably already heard about that out-of-touch speech from Chiefs kicker Harrison Butker. You might not have heard that Josh Halwey is already defending it: = | = It’s not surprising, exactly. We already knew Hawley was a leader in the fight to criminalize reproductive rights in our country. After all, his corrupt family business led the charge to overturn Roe v. Wade AND the effort to ban the abortion pill mifepristone all the way up to the Supreme Court. Hawley himself even pioneered the legal arguments that led to shutdowns of IVF clinics in Alabama earlier this year. His obsession with “manhood” and “masculinity” have been pretty obvious too. Just take the weird book he published last year, “Manhood: The Masculine Virtues America Needs” — his attempt to convince all of America’s men that they should be made in his own creepy image. But now, Hawley’s standing by Butker’s attack on working women. = = This guy wants to control every little thing about our lives — what we do in the workplace, in the bedroom, and in the doctor’s office. He even wants to be in charge of what we do with our own bodies. It’s weird. It’s creepy. And it’s sure as hell not his job. I’m running to replace him in the U.S. Senate because I believe everyday people should have the power to make decisions about their own lives without some control-obsessed politician or elite getting in the way. That’s a message that resonates with Missourians of all parties, all across the state. body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9d6b92ea030c4b04aebef4f7f508a6ed&_e=p-z8qEL3vahZxfN-KwtiVRrZIW5DkvVW_ts_ny-U8zTQb4CPmjk65e8G5kW8wg4BpHfInGK7dK-35ghwaYqIx1xcUlDdSCtyr8a1EUOTHhM2kO9vxpNrvlWZeqzDpGb5YGDtL6TsKW0Wo_6TxYFiB6duhQW6qRzr-12qAL6da3PFgkGBAyh_FLGxOqqphmMCD8Jeu1dv1Sy9hcYW_Oa7OMuvgvhQbTHfGY-5u5vbUcEPX8EnaW9hkL8piDwrAkXnV9Co6a6EKVQB4qr7qUu8OkaP1Be-tSGksM5V170rUdHIat8KhpbYkIeac0fuFlyYfplI6OSTGxS1G9c0rE_0NGDSH7uJ82AOHhYVLzYHE6wwImUp4oxMD8S66PR2VLSrSjdV6xKE6npUIL7y_mxH034NpkH-4e7YfDamGZyfVsc%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9d6b92ea030c4b04aebef4f7f508a6ed&_e=p-z8qEL3vahZxfN-KwtiVRrZIW5DkvVW_ts_ny-U8zTQb4CPmjk65e8G5kW8wg4BpHfInGK7dK-35ghwaYqIx1xcUlDdSCtyr8a1EUOTHhM2kO9vxpNrvlWZeqzDpGb5YGDtL6TsKW0Wo_6TxYFiB6duhQW6qRzr-12qAL6da3PFgkGBAyh_FLGxOqqphmMCD8Jeu1dv1Sy9hcYW_Oa7OMuvgvhQbTHfGY-5u5vbUcEPX8EnaW9hkL8piDwrAkXnV9Co6a6EKVQB4qr7qUu8OiYhHRgWTbMb1Io7jiR3KaZnomaiFdmnuOQMSGrUunEua0AJ2HmXs_KpdLQwU3Uqp_5Tx0wnGsKZ_c79mYUeswfpr8f3oOO6kS8s_V2M9kdvVdY1ozQFbakdRS6QLIkUXrhESwrDHUITNpoITkaqmpk%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

clean_body: I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist: | | | | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds. The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election. "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:" If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?" I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have 1) a Conservative House Majority, 2) a Conservative Senate, and 3) a Conservative in the White House. If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in? | | | "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT" This is a non-negotiable if we want to win. Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register. If we don 't do it too, we will lose. But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election. Will you do your part? I look forward to seeing your name. disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
He just DESTROYED the GOP over their impeachment plot:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68412?t=6&akid=14631%2E878179%2EDSy96y) Jamie Raskin is a HERO! He’s one of the TOP Democrats fighting to end the MAGA mob’s impeachment scheme — and he’s not backing down.

[**The GOP is hell-bent on SILENCING Raskin, so we need a SURGE of support from folks like you to show we have his back! HURRY: ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT to thank Rep. Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68412?t=7&akid=14631%2E878179%2EDSy96y) | [YOUR ONLY CHANCE TO SIGN: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68412?t=8&akid=14631%2E878179%2EDSy96y)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68412?t=9&akid=14631%2E878179%2EDSy96y) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68412?t=10&akid=14631%2E878179%2EDSy96y)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Folks,

I've reached out to you a couple of times about hitting my May fundraising goal.

Y'all know me and that I never stop working for you and this country. But I have to admit that despite my best efforts... we missed it.

I have one more chance to hit my target by midnight, and I'm counting on you to step up and chip in--[**even if it 's just $1. **](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d99b78451b654fa789f8d9c5b381718f&_e=EiyClcwJDCL6CMWq7dBzIeI3xPH8ZvbvdgTXqzXZG1bAywdk3m0v6tTNeEpRmcc3DeKHGHfUm8C1g9f1KcvKHyLiWQJy6Qyo9JI08grbsspjNbVxSYxuu-Ez6XdyPHax-dkppGRt72wGDm1_wbr2nzupGxMMMijhXTi5iWEOwYRswqzJM-vi9w-9JPCdPhhGO71yIKhRla5RqD8s8fvsd_Dm4uJbw-YsJhm3ECe7v2STlRZ9kQHswDoaJLrD6uC1Q7MJ-zINivEqs8MpfCvlzjoNW-CRR6gYPYUZIJSGg8Dd-mdMS7iFnl-yZj162oEopTLZ-QxHmEaHRndJn1YK0iq9n_WEydNcJM6R7LIQmkNWBpKQ0LhslvzerpZHvnBQ3Y7H7wwzacn4R5rYZPGoAg%3D%3D)

I'm down to my last straw here and scrambling to fix this situation. My team reviewed all the support from the past few days, and I still need just a few more donors from your area.

I know you're always there for me when the going gets tough. So, when my team asked who we should reach out to make up ground, you were top of mind.

I am counting on you. All I need is just a pinch more support from your area. [**_Chip in $1, $3, or maybe $5 if you can here._**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d99b78451b654fa789f8d9c5b381718f&_e=EiyClcwJDCL6CMWq7dBzIeI3xPH8ZvbvdgTXqzXZG1bAywdk3m0v6tTNeEpRmcc3DeKHGHfUm8C1g9f1KcvKHyLiWQJy6Qyo9JI08grbsspjNbVxSYxuu-Ez6XdyPHax-dkppGRt72wGDm1_wbr2nzupGxMMMijhXTi5iWEOwYRswqzJM-vi9w-9JPCdPhhGO71yIKhRla5RqD8s8fvsd_Dm4uJbw-YsJhm3ECe7v2STlRZ9kQHswDoaJLrD6uC1tkrIlCBoxiyGm2V2sj__MqLPlUodTn2ykXb3RWVjQIrDSz2gNvza4vseUBHTNU7iInXYrjqwSz0XJXvJfIddNb2oC4VGqXr9_JseKq565KI8_EmqcXrhvabo-Z7meXMLFUDGc_SyfltSjM1M3FWQOg%3D%3D)

Thanks,
JNK _Folks,

I'm as nervous as a pregnant Jenny.**May is** **_halfway over, and I 've yet to meet any of my fundraising goals..._**

It's been a difficult road for Republicans on their fundraising recently. Biden's been riding a gravy train with biscuit wheels, getting million-dollar donations left and right.

**_I 'm more of a traditional kind of guy._**

So, let me cut to the chase: _I 'm behind, and I have less than 24 hours to submit my numbers and get ahead._ How much am I short by?

clean_body: Final Time Reaching Out - I'm going to need a hand | Folks, I've reached out to you a couple of times about hitting my May fundraising goal. Y'all know me and that I never stop working for you and this country. But I have to admit that despite my best efforts... we missed it. I have one more chance to hit my target by midnight, and I'm counting on you to step up and chip in-- I'm down to my last straw here and scrambling to fix this situation. My team reviewed all the support from the past few days, and I still need just a few more donors from your area. I know you're always there for me when the going gets tough. So, when my team asked who we should reach out to make up ground, you were top of mind. I am counting on you. All I need is just a pinch more support from your area. Thanks, JNK Folks, I'm as nervous as a pregnant Jenny.May is halfway over, and I 've yet to meet any of my fundraising goals... It's been a difficult road for Republicans on their fundraising recently. Biden's been riding a gravy train with biscuit wheels, getting million-dollar donations left and right. I 'm more of a traditional kind of guy. So, let me cut to the chase: I 'm behind, and I have less than 24 hours to submit my numbers and get ahead. How much am I short by? | Hey. I know this is no big deal for big Dem donors, but for an average American like myself, this makes all the difference. My team and I will be forever grateful to you personally when we sit down and go over our donor list tomorrow. Thanks for stepping up. It 's people like you I rely on. \- Senator Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Jon Hamm has a message for Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — this week, Josh Hawley defended that speech from Harrison Butker.
Flash back to a year ago this week, Hawley published his latest book titled _Manhood: The Masculine Virtues America Needs._
**Jon Hamm, a born-and-raised Missourian, has something to say about it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50823?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ)
**_[Click here to watch this special message from Jon Hamm, then chip in $10 or more to help Lucas Kunce replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50823?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ)_**
**[WATCH NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50823?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ)**
Any born-and-raised Missourian will tell you: Missouri is the Show Me State.
But the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us during his time in the U.S. Senate is how to be a fraud and a coward — from skittering away from the same mob he raised his fist for outside the Capitol on January 6th to using his own power to strip away rights for everyday people in Missouri and all across the country.
**This election is our opportunity to defeat him.** Hawley won his last race with only 51% of the vote. In the years since, he’s become the most popular GOP Senator running for re-election in 2024 — with approvals even lower than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott. Now, multiple polls even show that Hawley is already in a statistical tie with Lucas Kunce for this Senate seat.
That doesn’t mean it’s going to be easy — after all, national insiders and corporate mega-donors haven’t stopped attacking Lucas since the day he got into this race — but we really can win this.
**[So Peter, will you help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your first donation of $10 or more toward our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today? Your support gives us the resources to keep delivering messages like this one to voters across the state every day between now and Election Day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50823?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50824?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50824?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50824?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50824?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50824?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50824?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50823?refcode=em20240518-5548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5548%2E614464%2EBNfeIQ)

It’s about time Missourians had a U.S. Senator who will actually stand up and look out for them — not a fraud who’s obsessed with defining what it means to be a man.
Thanks for standing with us,
Team Lucas Kunce

name: Hillary Clinton's Wish [UTS]
subject: We MUST abolish the Electoral College!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85215292/474066419/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240518_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmMGJiOWQwLTg3MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N21dMgBjvGulfz1PM3Ni8BX30Ht2FmIyADfvAGK9hm8=)
The Electoral College, a relic of the past, challenges the core principles of our democracy. It unfairly amplifies the influence of specific states, often muffling the authentic voice of the populace. And honestly, Peter, Hillary Clinton couldn't have said it better:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85215293/474066420/815532530?contactdata=4QGIgENseLE5gHrLz7w7zrSiOvY1WW3BkMToRpDl/Z6Ziry6A0kKSWoU0nbHFG+haShzU/Zx1oSBLDwyHCZwAfI1SJgS2r7XVt8VbybcspLeju6VxhljtDs8oUIAqmU37p1aDxyR2tDeCG6GsIrkz8BFTQlN84t6U3/LfakXokg=&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240518_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmMGJiOWQwLTg3MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N21dMgBjvGulfz1PM3Ni8BX30Ht2FmIyADfvAGK9hm8=&emci=82863fc8-5611-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=8f0bb9d0-8715-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=24268976)
In every other election, the candidate with the most votes wins. So, why should the Presidency be any different? It's time for a change.
The Electoral College has significantly influenced numerous elections, including the hotly contested 2016 race. This system has the potential to override the majority's will, a fact underscored when Donald Trump ascended to the Presidency despite trailing by millions in the popular vote. This issue cuts to the heart of our democracy's integrity.
To ensure every American's vote carries equal weight, irrespective of their state, we must unite. Abolishing the Electoral College represents a monumental stride towards a more balanced and representative democracy.
[_**Will you add your name to our petition and stand with us in demanding an end to the Electoral College?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85215294/474066421/815532530?contactdata=4QGIgENseLE5gHrLz7w7zrSiOvY1WW3BkMToRpDl/Z6Ziry6A0kKSWoU0nbHFG+haShzU/Zx1oSBLDwyHCZwAfI1SJgS2r7XVt8VbybcspLeju6VxhljtDs8oUIAqmU37p1aDxyR2tDeCG6GsIrkz8BFTQlN84t6U3/LfakXokg=&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240518_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmMGJiOWQwLTg3MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N21dMgBjvGulfz1PM3Ni8BX30Ht2FmIyADfvAGK9hm8=&emci=82863fc8-5611-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=8f0bb9d0-8715-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=24268976)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: “I think we’re gonna win inTexas.” — Chuck Schumer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Without your support, we don’t stand a chance. Read more >>>

Friend,

It's official -- national Democrats are going ALL IN to flip Texas blue.

**[Chuck Schumer just told the media,_" I think we're gonna win in Texas."_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpn4iejbhj9e29j9906858766b5vbssogi2oh1eo_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chg69oj6cth2bs)

[And he's backing up this bold claim with tens of millions of dollars.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuu5i0idmo10dbuq7uq93ai3rlm5fh89skg61vb0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chg69oj6cth2bs)**

Colin Allred could spend up to 100 MILLION DOLLARS to defeat me, far outpacing my past far-left opponent Beto O'Rourke from 2018.

Friend, we need to make sure that Democrat Senate leader Chuck Schumer fails.

_Texas voters must teach Schumer and his far-left pals a lesson -- don't mess with Texas!_

I'm serious: We can't let him beat us. We can't let the Democrats take Texas -- because if they win Texas our entire American way of life is at risk.

**[I urgently need YOUR support to save Texas from Schumer and the Democrats.
Please fuel our fight with a donation of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z895irq76ovfvl21t60c9a9spahaeh1ra9qaoc9o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chg69oj6cth2bs)**

******************************************************[CHIP IN NOW TO SAVE TEXAS, AMERICA& OUR FUTURE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj88sl6ervmhdgdsl9jmnsgk7dl0c1i1p1tnpbro_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chg69oj6cth2bs)******************************************************

Your contribution will keep our ads on the air and online. And your support will help my campaign unleash the most extensive grassroots voter contact effort in state history.

_**[We're facing a tough battle ahead. But with you fighting by my side, I know we can save Texas -- and be part of a nationwide RED WAVE that sweeps the Democrats out of power.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4h63k61eq6561rklj2l5t58ui21bclbn9im1rf0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chg69oj6cth2bs)**_

Thank you for rushing in your support!

For Liberty,

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z22nlal45uigcn217je5kvaksa5qug9gpae45c88_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi64p76chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zalqlbll3req8h333iqdcmp4ts7ioelph9qcjq9g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi64p76chh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2jgjjoc3n1j3mp2jgh2l0bt0mdlrf5k8g5rs6no_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi64p76chh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z88fbh0mpk3rrp9vnso1cvekjfd6ge36jk5p9c1o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64o70c9h69oh1k8gn48n24hjm8or4chh69pj4c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi5a55kgedjd2khbmanpsgb8t9ob0mi6dutjvoo8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi64p76chh2bs)_

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6q4lkugqc8nk0plv8fog05i0akugb256tqg5cqg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi62or6c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkgj3g9em9trtr7ra7b1vcu6p17t8jnsnt2lqs3g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi62or6c1h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znhjrms6sgvahe31du19on6glqlpu8elcdlns6bg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi62or6c1h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Bogus criminal charges... This is a travesty of justice.

Friend,
---
This letter I’ve written to you comes entirely from the heart...
---
I knew full well the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history.
---
_But the fight for justice is always worth it.__
---
Now, I find myself in a battle for my own freedom and justice as Crooked Joe Biden’s accomplices seek to destroy me...
---
**Wall Street Journal: “Trump Advisers, Including Giuliani and Meadows, Indicted in Arizona”**
---
It wasn’t enough for the Biden Regime to have its FBI raid my home, wrongfully arrest me, take my mugshot, or push me to the point of bankruptcy... _**They have now indicted me before a Grand Jury**_
---
But despite all of these vicious attacks, despite the Fake News calling me “a dead man walking,” I’m still standing strong – _thanks to unbelievably kind souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to stay free, and ensure that justice prevails for ALL Americans._
---
_Times are tough in Crooked Joe’s America, so if you can’t afford it, please take care of yourself. But, if you can, any contribution you can make will be greatly appreciated to fight this INDICTMENT._

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkj1jescd06jr64sgnsnqun04gcjck6mqhusgml8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi61oj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9hhdsgeho5c9i7npql4vbkvsfj948lbofibcm40_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi61oj4cjh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmfligv88vfu477oea50mbg0pigqrjhdhs7t60g0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chi61oj4cjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Trump Train News
---

This is beyond the pale -

Radical Democrats know individuals on the terrorist watchlist and criminals are breaking into our country in droves... **And rather than supporting American law enforcement, 148 House Democrats JUST voted against detaining and deporting illegal immigrants who assault police officers.**

It's a national disgrace.

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they’ve tried to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But in order to do that, we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts. Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: BREAKING: 148 House Democrats vote to support criminal illegals instead of American law enforcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is beyond the pale –

| |

---
| | | _**BREAKING: 148 House Democrats vote to support criminal illegals instead of American law enforcement**_
---

This is beyond the pale -

Every corner of our country feels the gruesome effects of the border crisis. And when you add in the ridiculous soft-on-crime policies in Liberal cities, there's no question about it: We're facing an emergency.

Radical Democrats know individuals on the terrorist watchlist and criminals are breaking into our country in droves... **And rather than supporting American law enforcement, 148 House Democrats JUST voted against detaining and deporting illegal immigrants who assault police officers.**

It's a national disgrace.

Our Conservative House Majority believes you should be held accountable if you break the law. _**[So if you agree, we urgently need you to sign our nationwide petition to DEPORT CRIMINAL ILLEGALS IMMEDIATELY.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkid4s2b7gab5ucoa0gj1i61tl3b4n3i831981p8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chh68o74cph2bs "So if you agree, we urgently need you to sign our nationwide petition to DEPORT CRIMINAL ILLEGALS IMMEDIATELY.")**_

---
Listen:

We won't tolerate open-border Democrats and their radical policies ANY LONGER. It will take a massive movement of Conservatives - _1,700,000 strong_ - to prove that they don't speak for the will of the American People.

That's one signature for every known 'gotaway' since Joe Biden became president.

_**[PLEASE: Stand with our Conservative House Majority and sign our nationwide petition to deport every last one of these criminal illegals.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za9ucnobq05djinrpos64qdtb5g7dgpvj6015pa0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33chh68o74cph2bs "PLEASE: Stand with our Conservative House Majority and sign our nationwide petition to deport every last one of these criminal illegals.")**_

We'll be looking for your signature. Thanks for all you do.

- House GOP

Majority Leader Steve Scalise

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sQ1-COExKJhfcNC5mfQYiA~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sQ1-COExKJhfcNC5mfQYiA~~/AARclAA~~~)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sQ1-COExKJhfcNC5mfQYiA~~/AARclAA~~~)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ogXqUhodDBsL2ceB64U00g~~/AARclAA~/RgRoLFVwP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmZGCb1JZhkGXqhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/egLjni8WQLVWbbctozq6Zw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoLFVwP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmRgm9SWYZBl6oUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0512cb314feb404486c3b9d4e20d01ee&_e=r9-gehC22569drgpZI8ukiwkflvMK2NiohZM632vTc23iCEpFJvcXmlDV995qP_3iyAflGy9FoYuggX-etdYFivy2oy5UEv8UQkrHhJe4FbSiMI1Cm0SCxuNx15LDq_Sdxu0buTPjplxHY7jbWRIECJciF-vk91Gq05pqnIiVfFozk6qD5MIeuOU-7HcWOmIm2z-L1tCt4v6QUSoLFbSYPZBqUaDJ3mhbcnhTufWTLxz1TimdZ1_U9d5wD30k3lssN1_votf0nlS2EV5hcFJUf8ujQtHecGaLfk-5AmndP5j5ssix9YHdyZTfG1Lds-jblk-2xNvXNU5-TNkIV4tZ8FKnZVIFyHs_KWekXdjsbcwdMLBfrX4lezYcYvD3uZT7eZv8PogmveEAZQsLBH6to3uY4sxqdnDCMQ6IVpJclk%3D)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyEkcuK3EAMRb-mvLNRPdqPhRcNnobAzCTQiyyN2iW7NdQLVzkhfx9MZtbZ6qAjce_Pt_kN2XHY3tHTyDnPe54Dzk92rs7oZgXK1HCp5TDLyo4XJfu1r2iUnWylbHulqudo5EPJVg7YP7AdFMrOdoM0Gq01BAYqHk8PXOQAg-l130CvHi3gukrsLtCvwsCRLBZqOGS2lJcYU4qOCy-5iftWufFZSspCX4W6CXVzqTmfzBYdNWQPoW6WEu7FUyh1XOuPIxdeqM7H_ov-nEv6lhehJ5Bg4B2UUa9wnb5PLy93odqj-DnHY19I6CntMSdaCoftE3myfHihJ_LI7nO4oE_IWxB6svHj69A_FEOhUISe7tfX-ce1_na_118hVPto0292jnPbCQPb6WyW6Kvyvw7-BgAA__-XI4o-) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyEkcuK3EAMRb-mvLNRPdqPhRcNnobAzCTQiyyN2iW7NdQLVzkhfx9MZtbZ6qAjce_Pt_kN2XHY3tHTyDnPe54Dzk92rs7oZgXK1HCp5TDLyo4XJfu1r2iUnWylbHulqudo5EPJVg7YP7AdFMrOdoM0Gq01BAYqHk8PXOQAg-l130CvHi3gukrsLtCvwsCRLBZqOGS2lJcYU4qOCy-5iftWufFZSspCX4W6CXVzqTmfzBYdNWQPoW6WEu7FUyh1XOuPIxdeqM7H_ov-nEv6lhehJ5Bg4B2UUa9wnb5PLy93odqj-DnHY19I6CntMSdaCoftE3myfHihJ_LI7nO4oE_IWxB6svHj69A_FEOhUISe7tfX-ce1_na_118hVPto0292jnPbCQPb6WyW6Kvyvw7-BgAA__-XI4o-)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyEkcuK3EAMRb-mvLNRPdqPhRcNnobAzCTQiyyN2iW7NdQLVzkhfx9MZtbZ6qAjce_Pt_kN2XHY3tHTyDnPe54Dzk92rs7oZgXK1HCp5TDLyo4XJfu1r2iUnWylbHulqudo5EPJVg7YP7AdFMrOdoM0Gq01BAYqHk8PXOQAg-l130CvHi3gukrsLtCvwsCRLBZqOGS2lJcYU4qOCy-5iftWufFZSspCX4W6CXVzqTmfzBYdNWQPoW6WEu7FUyh1XOuPIxdeqM7H_ov-nEv6lhehJ5Bg4B2UUa9wnb5PLy93odqj-DnHY19I6CntMSdaCoftE3myfHihJ_LI7nO4oE_IWxB6svHj69A_FEOhUISe7tfX-ce1_na_118hVPto0292jnPbCQPb6WyW6Kvyvw7-BgAA__-XI4o-)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. clean_body: Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

clean_body: Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _
