name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8033e6f28584c0fbf76d2ab8a76c710&_e=li9c3oxndmDF0NPNbvbfJTPAlHwRrWyVTFpn9fB9s4aunpFM2o2oeFeyolUJYbKLMvV3iXd-6N8bVYpZEXo2Wh59HUPN9T2XPF1hiQcOXwX-IGoBtE9nTQFbqhBqzH6SYqu3LGmZDk7xxkd7Y_aUUHx6NUoUljMJjbJR2idLSqQuqRAEzQ_8_DrJkBp8R2XhzKczM5DNorPkbzNTB3qksOx3ATsjh411MmGZtQ4MdDJcXHrrm8HQaonorz92sywAeuPB8Zib-vUu9ZCiXJ4tGnZHIAbDh_gTno0sqyBA-J8jXemZvBAD7m9KMk0SRuRXqDFwRO00fW1BVCtmY2PPmY4ZL8U4Dk8IPJ078-E-sPs9J6wgF0qohVxb35GEy6e43EkM2r-AfErXglLvr0yoCQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8033e6f28584c0fbf76d2ab8a76c710&_e=li9c3oxndmDF0NPNbvbfJTPAlHwRrWyVTFpn9fB9s4aunpFM2o2oeFeyolUJYbKLMvV3iXd-6N8bVYpZEXo2Wh59HUPN9T2XPF1hiQcOXwX-IGoBtE9nTQFbqhBqzH6SYqu3LGmZDk7xxkd7Y_aUUHx6NUoUljMJjbJR2idLSqQuqRAEzQ_8_DrJkBp8R2XhzKczM5DNorPkbzNTB3qksOx3ATsjh411MmGZtQ4MdDJcXHrrm8HQaonorz92sywABcSgMzAI_4soPxxJ9VF-PrUnfnK0mle2MJpG7Gt4YWcpVBha-z_JX3Fd8IvbzUqGJNnsbQe_Q2arNFHmzcQI9cvaNJNdH0jsinboGdjwtqxJT9QEXQoVlQs6kQCKsjKAyW_OUrlnemLEili94Wjq8Q%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8033e6f28584c0fbf76d2ab8a76c710&_e=li9c3oxndmDF0NPNbvbfJTPAlHwRrWyVTFpn9fB9s4aunpFM2o2oeFeyolUJYbKLMvV3iXd-6N8bVYpZEXo2Wh59HUPN9T2XPF1hiQcOXwX-IGoBtE9nTQFbqhBqzH6SYqu3LGmZDk7xxkd7Y_aUUHx6NUoUljMJjbJR2idLSqQuqRAEzQ_8_DrJkBp8R2XhzKczM5DNorPkbzNTB3qksOx3ATsjh411MmGZtQ4MdDJcXHrrm8HQaonorz92sywAlDpWDndGG6KP0gu-p6VlOKvM2JrRPJchAaaKdp_9Gi-kyOnDE790TRXz3l5fFSrht2Prh6z3NUwOXK4hbL1Bl_4ynaqC5jVBfVGnx5dg3VHAYvDLnvwMYRBlp-fzXKmHgSCkDD_OkEehawoz1y-c7Q%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

name: Governor Wes Moore
subject: What comes next for Maryland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca74de0d-a47c-473d-9901-598935d0d143/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | Peter, Marylanders turned up in droves to make their voices heard in the Democratic Primary, and delivered a clear, decisive message: Angela Alsobrooks is the right choice to represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate. But if you think that defeating Republican Larry Hogan is a foregone conclusion solely because Maryland is a blue state, think again, Peter. It’s going to take you, me, and every other person who made up Angela’s winning coalition in the primary — and a whole lot more — to defeat Larry Hogan in November. [Will you join me and Blue Amp Action in supporting Angela’s campaign to keep Maryland’s open Senate seat in Democratic hands? If so, please make a split grassroots donation to become a Founding Donor to her general election campaign today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfdfbb877-d27c-418f-b82c-d4988a476d1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T949451bf-594e-4f18-9ca9-e03cacf511ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Larry Hogan benefits from the perception that he’s a moderate Republican, Peter, and he’s banking his entire campaign on the hope that voters believe that. He hopes that you’re unaware that he’s backed by Mitch McConnell and shady super PACs dead set on the GOP taking back control of the Senate. He wants you to believe that he wouldn’t support a national abortion ban, but can’t say it with a straight face and said that reproductive rights can be “emotional for women.” He thinks you won’t realize that if elected to the Senate, he’d be a rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda. But he’s wrong, Peter. This grassroots team is not only going to outmaneuver and out-work him at every turn, but we’re going to make sure every single voter in Maryland has a clear, accurate picture of just what kind of senator Larry Hogan would be. [I need your help getting Angela’s general election campaign underway with a massive groundswell of grassroots support, which is why I’m asking: Can Angela and I count on you to become one of her 10,000 Founding Donors by splitting a donation between her campaign and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T107b5505-aad5-4c65-891a-ca608f827a68/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Osborn for Senate
subject: Welcome to Osborn for Senate! (Information enclosed.)
body:
Peter,
Thanks for signing up to receive updates from our campaign to elect Dan Osborn to the U.S. Senate!
This is a unique opportunity. If we win, we will change politics in this country. In order to elect Dan we need more folks getting involved. Here’s how you can help:
[Sign up to volunteer.](https://www.osbornforsenate.com/volunteer) This is a volunteer powered campaign. We will never outspend our opponent, but we can outwork anybody.
[Give a few bucks to the campaign.](https://www.osbornforsenate.com/donate) Dan needs your support because he’s not seeking support from party machines or corporate PACs.
Follow us on social media for up-to-the-minute campaign news. You can follow us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/OsbornforSenate), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/OsbornforNE), and [Twitter](https://www.twitter.com/OsbornforSenate).
Thank you for your support. Whether it's your time, your money, or your word-of-mouth: all of these bring us closer to making history.
Yours,
Team Osborn

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Do NOT pardon Trump!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Do NOT Pardon Donald Trump!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12e52dcb-a2c0-41ed-bb8e-ded13beeb82b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36b08511-bbd3-40b5-8d97-8852203bf2e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Senator Mitt [Romney](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8df1d28-b8b5-4906-b8fd-2a9d8ed968f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) just ignited a firestorm by saying that President Biden should have pardoned Donald Trump. We'll give credit where credit is due. Mitt Romney has been one of the few Republicans to criticize Donald Trump, and to support impeachment. **But he's 100% wrong on this. Trump must pay for his crimes, and cannot be allowed to escape justice. And there is no evidence whatsoever that his lunatic followers would come to their senses if offered an olive branch in the form of a pardon.** Try him, convict him, and punish him -- but do NOT pardon him. [**Add your name: Do NOT give Donald Trump a pardon!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5409842f-9014-47e3-9671-a583fb4cc56f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend,
---
This letter I've written to you comes entirely from the heart...
---
I knew full well the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history.
---
_But the fight for justice is always worth it._
---
Now, I find myself in a battle for my own freedom and justice as Crooked Joe Biden's accomplices seek to destroy me...
---
**Wall Street Journal: "Trump Advisers, Including Giuliani and Meadows, Indicted in Arizona"**
---
It wasn't enough for the Biden Regime to have its FBI raid my home, wrongfully arrest me, take my mugshot, or push me to the point of bankruptcy... _**They have now indicted me before a Grand Jury**_
---
But despite all of these vicious attacks, despite the Fake News calling me "a dead man walking," I'm still standing strong - _thanks to unbelievably kind souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to stay free, and ensure that justice prevails for ALL Americans._
---
_Times are tough in Crooked Joe 's America, so if you can't afford it, please take care of yourself. But, if you can, any contribution you can make will be greatly appreciated to fight this INDICTMENT._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my legal defense trust - the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund - to help me fight for my freedom and justice as the Deep State tries to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c7b707583e4c46a68c8055d5e9296a9a&_e=fOb-ynCGQe30f4AlRrpeDx3Co5_z856yTph5G9EoBW0A2LbXxytn19XSVvWSa4YCF8WK4FQpgB5g90UpDjnPWftWU7ITSLtbEdSlitITRxtUDQ2YryvivItnawkWnqoa-cs1c1B9d_D1H-v41az3DTECycyK1T-GdunptWuHR1LH8Jj98FIMyA_njGnIDvk1WUw_ApTaaKYeWTExokke4KlT3g7u5Tt-dmu6WCKLINEN56HF42JKMvqJPUNF0nkiFArG2n-AcfD6gcysEEiQPLvDKaFvWv3aAFndbZPvYiSRILLOBbIcTbwDX-DF-ZAAhPMUApHACLJS7atfjKRx_gIi-8yA6sOD2dVMhMqkdDOrxG3KPBxwGE1OS-HyYFhuhQ8f6-MlYiKz6pHawD9yCg%3D%3D)

I knew full well the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history. But the fight for justice is always worth it. Now, I find myself in a battle for my own freedom and justice as Crooked Joe Biden's accomplices seek to destroy me... Wall Street Journal: "Trump Advisers, Including Giuliani and Meadows, Indicted in Arizona" It wasn't enough for the Biden Regime to have its FBI raid my home, wrongfully arrest me, take my mugshot, or push me to the point of bankruptcy... They have now indicted me before a Grand Jury But despite all of these vicious attacks, despite the Fake News calling me "a dead man walking," I'm still standing strong - thanks to unbelievably kind souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to stay free, and ensure that justice prevails for ALL Americans. Times are tough in Crooked Joe 's America, so if you can't afford it, please take care of yourself. But, if you can, any contribution you can make will be greatly appreciated to fight this INDICTMENT. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Hostilities Deepen at Delco Prison | Kensington's Future After Cleanup + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e2ae5f743e&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Hostilities deepen between warden and staff at Delaware County prison](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b004b81083&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
Hostilities between the rank-and-file correctional officers and the warden of Delaware County’s prison have become so tense that dozens of officers refused to attend a planned recognition and awards ceremony as well as an appreciation barbecue as a part of National Correctional Officer Week, according to two sources with intimate knowledge of the prison’s day-to-day workings.

Those two sources also described several disciplinary events in recent months that the rank-and-file officers have perceived as being unfair to the point of being retaliatory.

**Why It Matters**. The persistent turmoil at the prison continues at a time when the county is facing new challenges and scandals.

Just last week, the county fired its emergency services director, Timothy Boyce, amid allegations of workplace misconduct.

Meanwhile, the county has been laying the groundwork for a large tax increase amid its spending on the prison, the new health department, and other projects. As Broad + Liberty previously reported, Councilwoman Christine Reuther said in a meeting that the county was facing a “sizable” tax increase.
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4e88e2bf31&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Cleanup on Kensington Avenue](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=71c2ae70f8&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Paul Davis_
Photos and stories of the Kensington open-air drug market and drug-addicted street people have been featured prominently in the press worldwide, and even Mexico pointed a disapproving finger at Philadelphia. I spent time in Mexico when I was in the Navy, and I saw impoverished neighborhoods and indigent people there, so for Mexico to offer criticism of our city is telling.

I reached out to the former detective and asked for his take on the city government’s encampment closure on May 8th that took apart the street squatter’s tents and other makeshift dwellings on Kensington Avenue. The city workers picked up trash, garbage, discarded needles and scrubbed the streets and sidewalks.

**Why It Matters**. The city government stated that outreach teams have been engaging people daily, providing services, offering resources since the winter months and will continue to do so. And for the first time, the city government piloted an extended outreach effort that started on April 9th and included interagency outreach teams to engage from 4 to 8 p.m. three days a week in addition to their regularly scheduled outreach efforts – 32 of our placements came directly from that effort.

They added that it did not require anyone to accept treatment or housing, and it was strictly voluntary. Their housing assistance included offers of low barrier shelter, recovery focused shelter, safe havens, and respite. Four people were connected to drug and alcohol services.

**Quotable**. “We should all remember that Kensington is not only the home of criminal gangs selling dope and the drug-addicted street people. There are also good people suffering who live in residential homes in proximity to the open-air drug market,” my friend said.

“I pray that this action is not just a Band-Aid, and that the area won’t sink back to its previous hellhole. This has to be an ongoing effort. I pray that the city can eradicate once and for all Kensington’s drug traffickers and the poor people who suffer and die from the criminal’s greed and the inhuman consequences of addictive drugs.”
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b1a6620bf2&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Richard Koenig: The EEOC swings the cudgel of ‘adverse-impact’ doctrine](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b294feab73&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Casey showing fewer county visits than claimed](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=12b5962a26&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[McCormick pledges to serve only two terms if elected](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c3d9b25a21&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Delco prison union planning no-confidence vote against current management](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d5001c682e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Cremation? Not for me.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=99752ce384&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
In his Substack, _The Liberal Patriot,_ [Ruy Texiera writes about the continuing shifts of voters between the two major parties](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d1ced062bd&e=b7b3eddce2) and, if the polls are to be believed, it’s dramatic. “Across the battleground, Biden is losing to Trump among working-class voters by 16 points. That compares to Biden’s national working-class deficit of just 4 points in 2020. It’s also slightly worse than Biden’s performance in last October’s Times poll which covered the same states, when he was behind among these voters by 15 points.” You might find it surprising that there would be such large shifts in four years, given that the candidates are the same, but we live in interesting times.
---

Those two sources also described several disciplinary events in recent months that the rank-and-file officers have perceived as being unfair to the point of being retaliatory. Why It Matters. The persistent turmoil at the prison continues at a time when the county is facing new challenges and scandals. Just last week, the county fired its emergency services director, Timothy Boyce, amid allegations of workplace misconduct. Meanwhile, the county has been laying the groundwork for a large tax increase amid its spending on the prison, the new health department, and other projects. As Broad + Liberty previously reported, Councilwoman Christine Reuther said in a meeting that the county was facing a “sizable” tax increase. | | 2. By Paul Davis Photos and stories of the Kensington open-air drug market and drug-addicted street people have been featured prominently in the press worldwide, and even Mexico pointed a disapproving finger at Philadelphia. I spent time in Mexico when I was in the Navy, and I saw impoverished neighborhoods and indigent people there, so for Mexico to offer criticism of our city is telling. I reached out to the former detective and asked for his take on the city government’s encampment closure on May 8th that took apart the street squatter’s tents and other makeshift dwellings on Kensington Avenue. The city workers picked up trash, garbage, discarded needles and scrubbed the streets and sidewalks. Why It Matters. The city government stated that outreach teams have been engaging people daily, providing services, offering resources since the winter months and will continue to do so. And for the first time, the city government piloted an extended outreach effort that started on April 9th and included interagency outreach teams to engage from 4 to 8 p.m. three days a week in addition to their regularly scheduled outreach efforts – 32 of our placements came directly from that effort. They added that it did not require anyone to accept treatment or housing, and it was strictly voluntary. Their housing assistance included offers of low barrier shelter, recovery focused shelter, safe havens, and respite. Four people were connected to drug and alcohol services. Quotable. “We should all remember that Kensington is not only the home of criminal gangs selling dope and the drug-addicted street people. There are also good people suffering who live in residential homes in proximity to the open-air drug market,” my friend said. “I pray that this action is not just a Band-Aid, and that the area won’t sink back to its previous hellhole. This has to be an ongoing effort. I pray that the city can eradicate once and for all Kensington’s drug traffickers and the poor people who suffer and die from the criminal’s greed and the inhuman consequences of addictive drugs.” | | 4\. Lightning Round | 5\. What we're reading In his Substack, The Liberal Patriot, and, if the polls are to be believed, it’s dramatic. “Across the battleground, Biden is losing to Trump among working-class voters by 16 points. That compares to Biden’s national working-class deficit of just 4 points in 2020. It’s also slightly worse than Biden’s performance in last October’s Times poll which covered the same states, when he was behind among these voters by 15 points.” You might find it surprising that there would be such large shifts in four years, given that the candidates are the same, but we live in interesting times. | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. You're getting Broad + Liberty updates due to your interest in our site -- and stories for free thinkers in the Philly region and beyond. Our mailing address is:** Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, Pa 19063 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . name: Jill Stein 2024 Field Team
subject: We're about challenging empire every single day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Every day there is a way to support the movement for people, planet, and peace.

| | | [](http://www.jillstein2024.com?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=field_events_may&n=1)
---
Peter**,

This campaign isn't about challenging empire only on some days of the week, we're about challenging empire every single day.**

That's why we need you with us as the movement for people, planet, and peace kicks into high gear. Please review our new campaign action events calendar.

This is a great way to support the campaign around _your schedule_. **We're also excited to announce the launch of TWO new campaign action events!**

Community Organizing 101 for People, Planet, and Peace: Every Wednesday and Saturday volunteers who are new to organizing can connect with campaign staff to learn the basics about organizing and how to get started in your community.

Virtual Field Office Hours: Every Friday supporters and volunteers are invited to join this weekly conversation with the campaign. Come make new friends and take on new projects to support our growing movement.

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Democrats defend access to the ballot while Republicans push anti-LGBTQ+ bills… and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, May 19th, 2024 | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJVhamStH0yBHJI9uhbj_q0lHgAj3Pt5qX4VrdnF0fE5GPE0b0RfzVgJhsIgiEARWOOJ9JPsfcGNi4xjiR2fj4HSLcdsxVoXaHI6p7kJJsPwoRlndJqYrkBeBEkhkHnxxuB8z0FkALFiDyIU5Qlj3KL2Cs39DYGa5Aw9sLz5nJwkq9n7tWPRd1hoi7jGakGRxsh4dAwTJmnKLa4Gqp8c4IsjMkRkt3s3AFqiw703R0GIOj4MS6h-2zV6AJw4bXX8OCKONSk8f36OiPLsQyln9LgsoAIjtiHFzt_2ymB-2RTX-7fdzeVlXdVV5jwbm532QQvsdrd-uuPj_Gow4CeDWhNrknWl5vtYo-bVvyqaomuyioTXdAzQbhI8mtidgeAyNUzOgzcv-j0PYwv9RHhl6wBn1IlqMcholPzuxOwWropz8Lg/46h/CJ4tAVj9Tw2FUUxrXB_7fA/h0/h001.FsIYp4NGqfq0Vvvo4rxQ1xKhBlk86u_a8HEKNCwOb9w)
---
1️⃣ **_Missouri:_ Democrats successfully protect ballot measure process **
Missouri Senate Democrats set a record with the longest filibuster in the chamber's history while blocking a vote on a Republican plan to make it more difficult for voters to amend the state constitution. [Democrats are standing united and doing everything they can to stand up for our fundamental freedoms → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMa7jQmwdXqRbibHUpPFBVtgcTNpTp2OOo-3YaJ8uq8dphR65g9AtBPq-J4ExsTLwCtYvKhPGksNRlnjsch_frZm8OzLrSsHzGoxrbMqp2kzHQf0aqQjzfKlG9IsLWu02t4Gl1QXQsUDyYUkh26sfBVibkkt3OBam3Qz-gTkomx75qUQJT_y0io7e6X1g-WcBK295c3ORSze6xZa7FBzq7bLHf4X-Juot4hfQ2KJpsWIsPLDREcIyZyLz9y8o_7dXZraDeGERk2wlUQ_vDNu4bSk4PonRAdzNifzfsmAK4H7iuvFYD29elV95egzunobKSdpcCor-lUl-yruXIzHW4UaSvxphMCvXlrSYA8iyBY5xKg1HzzVqxvfYRIMK3WkUxfyi8DpIaWrspUuvr2msBKcRQJxXv_wOszgo6wdUXk-BrngDgHEqHCeJg2FC7B5dDpB53gQeNK1pFc4AZFlX8OJb-xMmZ0I-gtawLYELkww3S_Obx2IeBuRU1waoEO327R8talXuk2kFrj_tJ-zYjTta54wdC61Ba-Dw2IYy3b3PdGD2Ib26LrsdbsZXZCVadsymYs1eqpFVjoV37n5Mrbk/46h/CJ4tAVj9Tw2FUUxrXB_7fA/h1/h001.4h_RFBKOcAqj7z84CkDT8FPf0IierNi3Y3_bDyTXnCg)
2️⃣ **_New Hampshire:_ Senate Republicans passed three anti-LGBTQ+ bills, sending them to the Republican governor’s desk for signature **
In New Hampshire, Republicans continue their attacks on the LGBTQ+ community by sending three dangerous and discriminatory bills to the Republican governor for signature. [**These bills would ban trans youth from sports, restrict gender-affirming care for families, and encourage teachers to out their students →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sVdIL_pADM7ZzeFmfA9anHI0UWIpZdqaqhfx2rsCiLy8hov_gpkkSjomdydUziAm-3MPcS9gk1E2FmAMhaujVbVMwCMnDqFt6Q0GYuqkE3id71HSPmIyHb_-dFDu6CuVYf4v_fQUZYhDYeui5VvGa4Dmb83GmMl1IiWtbV7KjMK5DoS-vSN3lUpes3iaVKhhu52DAQcWHAX0euGiCyjLismk4p462_KJ-9CHa-8kBjjxjpJzVaKyvFoqaxLQncUi_u_ccmTNpoN2VrpqkXg7KqPy4Aa-IqtdmhPj3p-sJQ5VOQf5M-tpqJoQe1B4yIoQjG25a6hJrgOf88M5VJmI4DVXXGSrOh1O9yNqfTq3Z9y7hAvXvjG9clLzWvgSOmVEDxVwELT8RmhVcN8YXP6_PISpYe0aGsOfRsdz5c54TYMQz8wyx4VCubSvGfmvci59jcBghzg0Tljut_0KQoL1puonImqHgtNgyDKoeB19T7nURCerlVZmUjO9lWCmxJbllDQd1UouIorBSin15WryuDf2Og75QmvT-mHYeVxbEqW6UeNz096Fu-LJ7EfV9U1uu3-mNYM_u09LzInPXmp5nm4/46h/CJ4tAVj9Tw2FUUxrXB_7fA/h2/h001._rs0TDgrznefexPTP1qoA-jm72_5kH01sYiHZSU8W2k)
3️⃣ **_Court Watch:_ If SCOTUS rules in Idaho’s favor, abortion bans could worsen**
The _Idaho v. United States_ decision, if ruled in favor of Idaho’s abortion bans, could empower Republicans nationwide to pursue the most extreme abortion bans. [**Click here to see how this decision could reignite attacks on reproductive freedoms in state legislatures everywhere →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW_61YQTEeb-F7_KBq8PeNEC-CiP6K5bzanoSqwfAtN9hItcIN58lY6LM6aEQSda0aWl0earpdd2Lq_tssF_BxW4cC6cE-ZiE00PnaTtNrpX7zGLcJjAUPt4pTexyPxvDPMEgIROQ3npZADBZYvGlg3-yaG5gggOUYLT7LhQ7Sk7wL2mRASq3WWF9oi0KcjXjLUrKb_zz-4DLnL9vfRdsmUAYhMRZ4PjRp4x2WWBHdyJkXzp6KlepdxZ8CYN_OIOi8hiOyjKpeLVQAigJmOko6k4W5XsNZ4j5d5e_M7Sg6apIqIGeyjzf7B8SNnWvyh8OqOQxAQ-piCYgPE5DuHoAFXGCuXUTaEAHckair23m0pP-Wix_r-IHQ6MoDFTRcdgIrMXRe2glLJbiEaTLF2Z8sssSlwb_qFM1i1n1d8511JqggSTGMgYErpQQCJtrIkx4rm9sZTV921z53peEGNfMkH2rLAhqO0V4R1ElOqDr-GxQvvvmvA_Ijt-uBCwYz2PvzhbeknArTQ3eU-qDyyIoRU7zWRyC1KXNfgGMTSO6KZjsbN8qamKP12YjR0cZ8M9NYeuA-hB-AaVC0ZltTePRc-3UbpE4ubSGd43jXHO-5ekPEfjNiuTGqFVB3zl4F7-7_9UQjpQqXpyje_dXRUGmUYY7hbTDdYOFgjB5El_Gi1Jv/46h/CJ4tAVj9Tw2FUUxrXB_7fA/h3/h001.58c_rV8ILLWLDAZKbKTQ540-EH-9h-8XLiLZyHFeMGU)
📖 **_Read:_ Strong Democratic candidate recruitment continues to build momentum **
As we inch closer to Election Day, early investments and on-the-ground teams are building strong Democratic campaigns for state legislatures in every corner of key battleground states, which can boost up-ticket efforts while securing Democratic lawmaking power in states where fundamental freedoms are on the line. [**Click here to learn more →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW_fKSIN47Pps1xHgd_NkQihs5ORlXvFx49K5CLSTi7wukcSpn2Rv64O8EDthoSRKzxtUmB-krvQ4U-Eev-eG6MT5zJGLb35cy-r629kWlUkUsMv0-t9Nqvkk03PqSto-SkBZaHuchbeVJCSwYL1Y1_YP7IrYXrTl_C_Epj0uynXm-bC5I8KVhBSrY5N69_BcHCrr0OfAA-6VvJ7QfCJcIjOomAXa5lXIrVY3nPY5SCGKkFOkBhKt2yqx3b-9EY096HSU-zOoxXpV2ag5mmQ4OC3ad4oZpIyma55hBXm78XSjRhq7Ukvi9-eu8SyrrgluaY9rHn0M979pfJO9JZObQvY4Oyz1LNoIRaNKrEeG8TItFBC2SyyHt8QQ06UE57ahiDvlQvksZh0Ba6b389IfK8HnRVqk2OiwpFGZL8jqhZ0YHnafT89C9VojbDJuza61TmdRmvGz83TXRmQW5MH9MfIpMClM3wtHWRODJGpW9OZ0GckRVsg5gdJxCw8RB_mOGhLoaXnkFNcne6ElcywtnKtO2FoJi57UL9ACp-igZAKL2jBhXDDI-O76qbZq2aJDyzrAloihiNntlID39jvLDiSuZrE5roxGzcoKVNHxsMREt4x2pn3gI7XBkEo2kxwnpQ3-EUL5oGtoaDYOO4XRH6Q/46h/CJ4tAVj9Tw2FUUxrXB_7fA/h4/h001.INaw2p2LyTG1fJAuhtOGPp0VIKnDwKALfPSPfx6Xgz8)
**🗳️ _Looking to Election Day:_ Democrats prepare for upcoming races**
This fall, Democrats are facing ultra-competitive elections in states like Arizona, Pennsylvania, and Michigan, so [**we’re calling on grassroots Dems to invest early and help power our candidates to victory →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_VJtfmrgEjjR84h6dasTO7AcO3tSWDLSo0m-1RGisrCA-FTw-wsIwu4MIUrASGUbEdcijI2_SVJAc-tCyHXjkJcK-zCyixl8FX3l20mT0QWOrwRJ7g3iBCEglFi3R39uL5eKDAKysRQ1V-39i7njvSt6BLuHl5rZX-Lj8vCNPtIzWFagZNSJo9ZneuXocuB5s1BQuYDdNbRvWXcTvBVUhOStKhTvvLc7rTGfGX2xsiDV7t42eu456dwhgB9ngau6I4_hJuwvZVoFCJ4vFQYCiN7NzFwDzc0ZRBv7m4tCZA2QA3-xBJgTk653HcAMTwM1ZvNuOJRPemRHuY5tyI5tgTsPB3N9Rhnev1YWq7J4KRv25BZSZ4N9VaqIPOoQ09QEu5IfGKPMEG6ITWdhoBqHDc5jRCMYmmpzTRSxTrQKAvI7XJA8MF9QyEaGbXUk1L8tzkJ4SsU0Rpdb01rYSCnFMgQbV7ONCrH71nJi--IAv-9EaPkUoa9RFEQOVVY3Wl9Ls/46h/CJ4tAVj9Tw2FUUxrXB_7fA/h5/h001.8YHbxc7u33XOsxoTeleX5ulyjHRCQDcOU462VUISRUo)

clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, May 19th, 2024 | | | | | 1️⃣ Missouri: Democrats successfully protect ballot measure process Missouri Senate Democrats set a record with the longest filibuster in the chamber's history while blocking a vote on a Republican plan to make it more difficult for voters to amend the state constitution. 2️⃣ New Hampshire: Senate Republicans passed three anti-LGBTQ+ bills, sending them to the Republican governor’s desk for signature In New Hampshire, Republicans continue their attacks on the LGBTQ+ community by sending three dangerous and discriminatory bills to the Republican governor for signature. 3️⃣ Court Watch: If SCOTUS rules in Idaho’s favor, abortion bans could worsen The Idaho v. United States decision, if ruled in favor of Idaho’s abortion bans, could empower Republicans nationwide to pursue the most extreme abortion bans. 📖 Read: Strong Democratic candidate recruitment continues to build momentum As we inch closer to Election Day, early investments and on-the-ground teams are building strong Democratic campaigns for state legislatures in every corner of key battleground states, which can boost up-ticket efforts while securing Democratic lawmaking power in states where fundamental freedoms are on the line. 🗳️ Looking to Election Day: Democrats prepare for upcoming races This fall, Democrats are facing ultra-competitive elections in states like Arizona, Pennsylvania, and Michigan, so ****** | | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: Watch RFK Jr. Break the Mold!

body:
We can win this election, but it requires every supporter to step up.

|
---
| | | [We can win this election, but it requires every supporter to step up.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=break_mold_5_19_24_rs_nd1&n=1)

Dear Peter,
Great news.
With only 6 months until election day new polls reported by the _New York Times_ say it all...
| ➢ RFK Jr. “is polling stronger than any third-party candidate in decades.”
---
➢ RFK Jr. “has emerged as an unpredictable X factor” and “a force of unpredictability.”
➢ Pollsters and insiders from both the Democratic and Republican parties are “alarmed” by RFK Jr.’s growing support.
This is amazing news.
Most Americans thought the presidential election would be a very close yet disappointing 2020 rematch between Trump and Biden.
NO MORE! _RFK Jr. is blowing up that idea_.
It's hardly surprising that recent polls show strong support for RFK Jr. among those disillusioned with Trump and Biden. Why should voters trust the traditional two-party candidates?
Neither Trump nor Biden are offering fresh ideas. Instead, they're caught up in petty arguments over how little they should have to debate RFK Jr., or even each other, before the election. It's outrageous!
We can win this election, [but it requires every supporter to step up.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=break_mold_5_19_24_rs_nd1&n=3) We're up against the vast resources and corporate backing of our opponents, and full participation is critical to level the playing field.
You see, RFK Jr. can’t self-fund his campaign and needs folks like you generously standing by his side. [Will you stand with RFK Jr. today?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=break_mold_5_19_24_rs_nd1&n=4)

[ **ENDORSE JIM JORDAN** ⇒](http://links2.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=9114cc42fb144e139d82566656ebb3c3&_e=_2gAD9fKdFUHOCIIpD4Qi49LKdeidVCvJnvBUlcF8TVePOMiTd3z53N0eA4n8awgdI9hncslbLWlN1aP9TlPR1wXSD0Iup_IW7_P9Yyctw02Im_dG1hoXDeNQEzuhy73DKVAgnRhIrPqpy19P9lTogO2cr2SCD_5ta4VnjjOvEQj0yEujrgPmlDeHqY1RAqw8xg5n7GoSU3gRIJMiXQEo3K2hiECN6PspLxOha_2PpqItS_6Iy_0NMxrKm2iBpR3uFQKngAGU2Ul1xz-zEqwPAtjfewGde9ZJuzjnIEauzspRa2uDmZAc5VZLVff-hPYh5d0Ty8HPWv-a0U1fG_nO1wFaVV3qLy5QxzEidHl8cMZLaxJpz1DSrDKtHLsXM7dvOAMsuTW3Zdj4-KBZawtbSd6WYtlVCVG6yNKy-UU02w4kpYbNCwSCf0cDsFATZ0gB0fK0gFY2kkXwQru1rMcO0j7BllOdRYU4Vf0SywKVQaCi3pJqoYqM7n_DyBnOonUruFc-9lyixSO5iF1PtpSbA%3D%3D)
As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, [**Democrats have long targeted me for electoral defeat**](http://links2.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=9114cc42fb144e139d82566656ebb3c3&_e=_2gAD9fKdFUHOCIIpD4Qi49LKdeidVCvJnvBUlcF8TVePOMiTd3z53N0eA4n8awgdI9hncslbLWlN1aP9TlPR1wXSD0Iup_IW7_P9Yyctw02Im_dG1hoXDeNQEzuhy73DKVAgnRhIrPqpy19P9lTogO2cr2SCD_5ta4VnjjOvEQj0yEujrgPmlDeHqY1RAqw8xg5n7GoSU3gRIJMiXQEo3K2hiECN6PspLxOha_2PpqItS_6Iy_0NMxrKm2iBpR3uFQKngAGU2Ul1xz-zEqwPAtjfewGde9ZJuzjnIEauzspRa2uDmZAc5VZLVff-hPYh5d0Ty8HPWv-a0U1fG_nO1wFaVV3qLy5QxzEidHl8cMZLaxJpz1DSrDKtHLsXM7d_dm6uXqf87sLnOZdY0bBqy3-AFXueLcuNTjNw2x7SbYTf87NYf3B0BYcXilBZwINJ1QV46KDNm6lTdJCnzm44KPlCAPD0nUQGT1SDWKuSnXNscPGYS2JwoHp6cavnKWpuezv1gWu0oQGuSBF2R-k-Q%3D%3D) in November's election.

They don't like debating with me with regard to important legislation in the House; and they cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that **Democratic leadership in Congress is more focused on partisanship than getting things done for the American people**.

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: The floodgates have opened
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We hadn’t seen significant spending in Arizona up to this point — but with the Senate GOP putting up their cash, special interests and dark money groups and Super PACs are going to pile in, too.
#

Peter —
This is an extremely honest email about the importance of making your first donation to Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate.
This will be **one of the most expensive races in the country.** News broke this week that Kari Lake and the National Republican Senate Committee are putting at least **$10 million up on television** to take Ruben down. If that sounds like a lot — it is. And more is on the way.
**That’s the truth.**
With Kari Lake and the NRSC up with their millions, **the floodgates have opened.** We hadn’t seen significant spending in Arizona up to this point — but with the Senate GOP putting up their cash, special interests and dark money groups and Super PACs are going to pile in, too.
They can collect and spend virtually unlimited amounts of money — and **it is all headed Ruben’s way.**
That’s why we need to keep up the pressure and get enough resources in the door to defend Ruben and push back on all of these attacks. It’ll take a lot, and even a small donation will go a long way.
If we’re going to take back Arizona’s Senate seat, Ruben needs you to make your first online donation right away. It’s our only shot.
Please: [**Make a $3 contribution to Ruben’s campaign. We missed our mid-month goal last week, and with millions of dollars of attack ads coming our way the timing isn’t great. We need you right now.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240519-1-160&t=1&akid=2349%2E734936%2EozW8Cg)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWuqCdQWNw

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWuqCdQWNw

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1445%2E135344%2EL9w9Dg)

See this? Throwback to when I won my first 2018 House race, in a Republican-leaning district. The lessons I took from that first race -- and my subsequent House races -- guide how I approach our Senate campaign now.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-may24.waY6cu&refcode=em240519-1-LA&t=2&akid=1445%2E135344%2EL9w9Dg)
Let me explain: One of the reasons we are going to win this race is because of our campaign's ability to reach and turn out moderate, Independent, and even Republican voters this November.
It's how I got elected to the House, and how I'll get elected to the Senate this November.
I like to call it "losing better." We get more votes in places Democrats normally get clobbered.
But it doesn't happen by luck. There's no magic potion that wills that result into existence. It takes work. Organizing. Advertising.
It takes resources.
The truth is, the response to emails like this has to make up the MAJORITY of our fundraising going forward. That doesn't mean I expect you to donate to every email, but as we're a bit short of our goals to this point in May, I hope you'll donate to this one:

We'll put your donation right to work holding this seat for Democrats this fall while also turning out voters in Michigan for Joe Biden.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-may24.waY6cu&refcode=em240519-1-LA&t=3&akid=1445%2E135344%2EL9w9Dg)

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: “MAGA Queen” 😓
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, Kyrsten Sinema is not running for re-election.
Kari Lake is the presumptive nominee of the Republican Party in Arizona’s U.S. Senate race.
Someone who cozies up to the furthest of the far-right: Steve Bannon, Mike Lindell, Mike Flynn, Roger Stone — and of course, Trump himself.
Someone who supports the near total abortion ban in Arizona and who continues to level baseless and unfounded conspiracies at honorable election workers.
She is a threat to our democracy, and there is nothing she won’t say or do to get elected.
It’s embarrassing. It’s sad. But most of all, it’s dangerous.
Ruben Gallego is the only thing standing in the way of the “MAGA Queen” becoming a United States Senator. And today, he desperately needs your help.
Can you split a donation between Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S. Senate and Serve America today to help us put an end to Kari Lake’s march to power? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you,
Team Gallego

But Rick Scott puts them all to shame. He built his massive fortune at the helm of a massive Medicare fraud scheme. body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2989%2E552475%2EtfVJEW)
Peter,
On our road trip across Pennsylvania, the team and I had Bruce Springsteen playing, per my request.
There’s one lyric in particular that has stuck with me since:
**“You can’t start a fire without a spark.”**
I believe this quote embodies the spirit of the campaign we’re running.
In November, our victory will be a fire. Protecting this seat allows us to hold onto the Senate majority and continue fighting for Pennsylvanians, but we can’t do it without the spark of each individual supporter.
Whether you tell a friend about our campaign, wear one of our t-shirts, or chip in when you can, you are lighting a spark that helps power this re-election campaign. I couldn’t be more grateful for your support.
[**Please, if you can, share a spark by chipping in any amount right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240519-1?refcode=em20240519-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2989_552475_tfVJEW&akid=2989%2E552475%2EtfVJEW)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Lucy McBath
subject: This map says a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
It’s a whole new segment of voters I need to reach before May 21st
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T234d8a12-8488-4acb-b2a3-4e8d9cf89e5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| | | | | **Peter, take a look at this map the _Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ just published.** [****](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55143067-dc83-4ec6-bccf-eb749cdec769/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s why it matters: I’m running in the new GA-06 (illustrated in blue). _As the map shows, it has very little overlap with the districts I’ve represented before (yellow and red)._ [**This means that for all those folks in the blue area, they’ll be seeing my name on the ballot for the first time ever in the May 21st election – just 2 days away. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action so we can keep our foot on the gas pedal with our GOTV outreach?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a52960e-c4c8-4871-86eb-92d609ca431c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf18efbca-2978-4540-96d2-11e5c2086d40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This has been my challenge since the Georgia GOP redrew Congressional districts again in December. I need to get my name and my story out to every voter in the new GA-06 so I can continue doing this work in Washington, DC. With only 2 days until Election Day, time is running out to connect with voters, print campaign literature, and distribute yard signs. We cannot afford to let up now. [**Please donate to my campaign so I have the resources to reach every single voter in GA-06******** →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83a7d951-ff94-4c9b-854a-ebbcf0cb246e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks so much, Lucy McBath
---
| | | | [CHIP IN](https://default.salsalabs.org/T351e34bf-a042-4bfe-89b2-31e8d67c7bd5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|

|

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

---

**THEN** Cheney was **_shunned_** by her Republican colleagues because she told the truth about Trump and all of his wrongdoings.

**SO NOW** she’s doubling down on her commitment to holding Trump accountable and standing up for our democracy! **[So we need you to take our poll to let us know what you think: Do you approve of Liz Cheney? »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/lizcheney?source=FFR_20240519_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21422%2E4449941%2EgkKrEN)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/lizcheney?source=FFR_20240519_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21422%2E4449941%2EgkKrEN) | **[Yes, I approve of Liz Cheney »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/lizcheney?source=FFR_20240519_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=21422%2E4449941%2EgkKrEN)**

name: Claire Low
subject: A drop in the bucket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Let’s make waves together this year.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85230245/474099202/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzOTIxZDJhLWVhMTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N_D8x3X0cbxz2DuhqS_SL-VCHfzRprO39y98EzjX-RQ=&emci=2859f4ec-6914-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=23921d2a-ea15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=8431045)
---

You know the phrase “a drop in the bucket,” right? Sometimes when we see the massive fundraising hauls from high-profile races, it’s easy to get discouraged and think that there’s no way my donation can make a difference. **It can feel worse than a drop in the bucket — it can feel like a drop in the ocean! ** But what if I told you that you can make a serious difference in a state legislative race with the same [**$30 donation**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85230247/474099204/2035465197?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_mayfun_email_20240519-NDRC-Red-StateLegCost_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240519-NDRC-Red-StateLegCost_&utm_campaign=mayfun&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzOTIxZDJhLWVhMTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N_D8x3X0cbxz2DuhqS_SL-VCHfzRprO39y98EzjX-RQ=) you might make to a higher-profile election? Just look at this chart: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85230249/474099206/2035465197?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_mayfun_email_20240519-NDRC-Red-StateLegCost_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240519-NDRC-Red-StateLegCost_&utm_campaign=mayfun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzOTIxZDJhLWVhMTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N_D8x3X0cbxz2DuhqS_SL-VCHfzRprO39y98EzjX-RQ=)
---
Supporting ALL Democratic causes is important, but we’re investing in the most critical races for the fair maps movement — and the sad reality is that many often go overlooked and underfunded.
**The NDRC is targeting several state legislative chambers this year, and we’re asking you to help us make a SPLASH in races like those — where (bonus!) your dollars go a lot farther. **
[**Can we count on you to make a donation to the NDRC today? **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85230251/474099208/2035465197?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_mayfun_email_20240519-NDRC-Red-StateLegCost_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240519-NDRC-Red-StateLegCost_&utm_campaign=mayfun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzOTIxZDJhLWVhMTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N_D8x3X0cbxz2DuhqS_SL-VCHfzRprO39y98EzjX-RQ=)

clean_body: Let’s make waves together this year. | You know the phrase “a drop in the bucket,” right? Sometimes when we see the massive fundraising hauls from high-profile races, it’s easy to get discouraged and think that there’s no way my donation can make a difference. It can feel worse than a drop in the bucket — it can feel like a drop in the ocean! But what if I told you that you can make a serious difference in a state legislative race with the same = you might make to a higher-profile election? name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsUBgdQWiN
American Cornerstone Institute

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osUBgdQWiN

Dear Fellow American,

I am reaching out today because I believe that you,
like me, are concerned about the increasing trend of legal
persecution against Americans who wish to live their lives
according to their faith. Our cornerstones of faith, liberty,
community, and life form the bedrock of our great nation, and we
need your help to maintain them.

From a high school football coach in Washington who
lost his job for praying on the field (KENNEDY v. BREMERTON
SCHOOL DISTRICT), to a Colorado baker hauled through the legal
system multiple times for not wanting to bake a cake that
violated his religious convictions (MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v.
COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION), we can't ignore the gradual
erosion of religious freedom in America.

That's why I created the American Cornerstone
Institute to advocate for commonsense solutions to these issues
and to strengthen the bonds that keep our nation united. But we
can't do it alone.

We need your voice.

I want to personally invite you to participate in
this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in
America.

You can share your thoughts using this secure link:
https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/

Your responses are confidential and will be used
solely towards furthering our advocacy efforts.

Please, take a few minutes of your time to complete
the survey. Your input is vital in helping us understand the
scope of these issues and develop impactful strategies to
counteract them.

Your opinion truly matters. Together, we can ensure
that religious liberty continues to thrive as an integral part of
our American society.

For Liberty,

Dr. Ben Carson

Founder and Chairman

American Cornerstone Institute

Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our
mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious
liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and
developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in
society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's
citizens.

Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute,
All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isUBgdQWiN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osUBgdQWiN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-75245287286-echo3-3B0B4C79963B079B95CC2DE1C3192C78@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

All eyes are on this campaign. | | |
---
Peter -- In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to make your first contribution to President Biden’s reelection campaign. But first, please allow us a moment to explain why your donation -- especially NOW -- is so important. **Here is the reality we face:** From Palm Beach to Manhattan, Donald Trump is raking in big checks from far-right billionaires. And frankly, Peter, right now he is outraising us with all these billionaires. In a race as close as this one, that could have catastrophic consequences for the outcome of this election. Fortunately, we have something far more powerful than Trump’s billionaires: A massive team of grassroots supporters like YOU powering our movement. Donations like the one we’re asking you for help to keep this campaign running. It’s how we’re going to open more field offices, place more ad buys in critical battleground states, and hire more staff to coordinate our voter outreach efforts. You will be the reason we defeat Donald Trump and his billionaire buddies again at the ballot box. But right now, we’re falling behind our goal. We need to pick up the pace in the next few days to get our fundraising projections back on track and PROVE that we can outraise Trump and his MAGA minions. **So we don’t need you to give to every email we send, but if you pitch in right now, it will help us reach our critical fundraising deadline at the end of the month.** [To help combat the big money Trump’s campaign is receiving, can President Biden and Vice President Harris count on you to make an $25 contribution today to keep up the pace?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29VytIaOnF8B0g4p1Y9bHqCLqEMWVuVw86eifplhTRLHFkxlX6h7sdUoga1iMoit6Y2Qqmxmc3Ojt4ur2o_xx43Og3WnOUBP0M0t87ZyqtzZ0O6rDU4EjEw0k1TvBUnW1-oTEVxxRX3CgH2pmB_pbCAvSgWF0aS1cr-_9ob6XhEB7eaFUsbwfUS56jWesCevFfosO0tnrnc8tev7AKd5sxi4uSdBlQ3qFP_rinSIzywfvIWWROaz_Cwx2pj3yTeC_jl6HOaSOreLk6HbhqTTSZ8aCe-s9aCWogAYj2SQY8nn0tA/46h/NWHhT6CWT8aD2w_qhvTazA/h0/h001.0jnYiw8T_5O8vlEL9sdARsOowuGRcwpHSZBcRu9L5yw) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

According to the _Cook Political Report_ , CT-05 is among the most vulnerable Democratic seats in November. It is just one step away from being rated a “Toss Up,” and anything from strong fundraising by Jahana’s opponent George Logan to our own fundraising tapering off could shift the dynamics of this race.
We have less than six months left to build the campaign infrastructure across western Connecticut, and your support is crucial to helping us fend off this challenge before we have to suffer another rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda taking Jahana’s seat.
[**While Jahana works to deliver the resources and legislation our communities need with legislation like the Farm Bill, will you help give our campaign a boost by making a small donation of $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85234599/474109548/880646440?amount=3&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjMzMzI3Ny1mMDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0n1E852cm1c-Mqd8D3pvz46kdXCJ-0E5_pud5MpqAro=)

| MANAKIN SABOT, VA \-- 100% Pro-Trump 5th Congressional District candidate, former Navy SEAL, Virginia Senator, and business owner John McGuire today announced that he has been endorsed by Kirby Burch, CEO of the Virginia Dog Hunting Alliance (VAHDA).
---
| 2A Endorsement Alert: Kirby Burch
---
| | |
---|---
|
"As a founding member and now CEO of the Virginia Hunting Dog Alliance (VADHA) --The Largest Hunting Organization in Virginia -- as well as the the Chief Executive Officer of the Hunting Dog Alliance, Chairman of the Commonwealth Sportsman Alliance, Chairman of Sportsmen for Governor Allen and Chairman of Sportsmen for Governor Youngkin, I know first hand how hard John works to support Sportsmen and our 2nd amendment rights. John McGuire is a Navy SEAL who puts unbelievable effort into getting the job done. John is on our side and he won't let us down in Congress. I warmly endorse my friend John McGuire and urge every conservative worthy of the name to support John McGuire for Congress."

-Kirby Burch

Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia
| The citizens of the 5th Congressional District deserve a representative who will show up and vote to protect our Second Amendment rights. McGuire has a perfect pro-gun voting record every year and has fought for Constitutional carry, sovereign immunity, and so many more pro-2A policies.
McGuire said: "I deeply appreciate Kirby's support for our campaign, for Virginia's hunting heritage, and for the 2nd Amendment. As a father, I taught my children everything they needed to know about handling a firearm safely, and about the rights that are guaranteed to them by God, and protected by the United States Constitution. As a Navy SEAL for over ten years, I defended our nation and our Constitution against all enemies, both foreign and domestic. I have a perfect proven record of standing up for our Second Amendment rights and working to repeal infringements to the same. With your support, I will continue my fight in Congress. We must win in June and give President Trump a Congress that 100% supports his America First Agenda."
McGuire is running against Never Trumper Bob Good in the VA-05 primary. McGuire has been seeing significant momentum during the race for the Republican Primary on June 18th.
McGuire has been endorsed by prominent conservatives like [Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HK_t4Wc6g1VpG9Ug8natkCTDUB3efgAcmMmhotJB79fks440TDPPXgklbAu7hHBwjY7k61ooYvWdPC0_8sssylZAzQDlzlBCTVzafAX9QuvuxLE_qPo6BeUZcU455UWdaAVr-wOuxR7UNAZ1azy1qOrMvMEN9VrpRJA5plqbb7eWLaxSpuBbj07-0Ewr0YrNUxN13DIgrCpg7Il_F5Nr7e0-Gz9WfDeOQPVqC3osa6zg0xpyOVpWIJl4hXIxso1zX2VBpU7kK8r-dL1zNzTTblWhYy1Uf7g0rZK_bkU7uy1P2rijCQ_AA-rbAOBFn_C6FXzmhZHh8v8AwA0Mq1_Nbw==&c=Rj2Xd7_spa-gyy0SRFwJHBEO-eM-TmhWoUqgk6Q1pkl6g5AOBwZUpw==&ch=aIhBZf1WeoisZiOkJ48f2pcfWHLNpGajBjyjLH-gqcKxfxikmTHlhw==), [Congressman Derrick Van Orden](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HK_t4Wc6g1VpG9Ug8natkCTDUB3efgAcmMmhotJB79fks440TDPPXuqkl_8Yhw0KH04-kZwQAV5mNY3KNkjfuYAqjVtxh6CIKQNHbKtoKengoGACH53hrdjXeuCSYXsaZ27AHj6fMvQQNm-c_5fixgCCUUxu0dlwPU-Gym_MlkMNCGgeygln1DaK28Six8YTOiP7b9jYFifoQDTqLOcN9A==&c=Rj2Xd7_spa-gyy0SRFwJHBEO-eM-TmhWoUqgk6Q1pkl6g5AOBwZUpw==&ch=aIhBZf1WeoisZiOkJ48f2pcfWHLNpGajBjyjLH-gqcKxfxikmTHlhw==), and former [Speaker Newt Gingrich](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HK_t4Wc6g1VpG9Ug8natkCTDUB3efgAcmMmhotJB79fks440TDPPXq6JfRGo2jsrq29n-6iT5DXjzot4c0XT1YsW6JTKwyth4pja6LasjjB8TotVo0mhPnHXyjIo-xXGVjNmgpRbPETAuk7VyqhdtiaRJw_7vIA2IzMrsU1do2x8WhT-GONFfQ9BDtV-LjL3vtTed6wV7Im1sl8jt1mVWg==&c=Rj2Xd7_spa-gyy0SRFwJHBEO-eM-TmhWoUqgk6Q1pkl6g5AOBwZUpw==&ch=aIhBZf1WeoisZiOkJ48f2pcfWHLNpGajBjyjLH-gqcKxfxikmTHlhw==). In addition, McGuire has received endorsements from local supporters like [Lynchburg Mayor Stephanie Reed](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HK_t4Wc6g1VpG9Ug8natkCTDUB3efgAcmMmhotJB79fks440TDPPXkB99368ePhIjNhplQR6-mM6GgSFoP2hLnepFQtV5XVIKu3mu4a_naUSBknzYGlrMjJoV3YhwAf8Z9bzrqxWLEZ4ATGn4sZHfQ9JsTFdX-yGd-Z4ZRatpAmTfbRsK1GcPlFe41wZbcTjGgtDZ3NxMYqo-i_nWYHRHKlJ5Gc8ytG_9bqx0sLGDyXtKhuMXeVVIDcLbglt17qlrW_QugYM4V2DIqhNI3oUUok47Diat2YdxHX9eTI-mQub1PoOR31RpnyqW0nk980T&c=Rj2Xd7_spa-gyy0SRFwJHBEO-eM-TmhWoUqgk6Q1pkl6g5AOBwZUpw==&ch=aIhBZf1WeoisZiOkJ48f2pcfWHLNpGajBjyjLH-gqcKxfxikmTHlhw==), multiple current and former [Campbell County Supervisors](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HK_t4Wc6g1VpG9Ug8natkCTDUB3efgAcmMmhotJB79fks440TDPPXhuyGA1J4hQvUnxOwofMTcVzySxrp-VZMSqxxaMFRuGlutwfk4xvJ6muBJFzfFBv2gjeSrrkVcHsFiPCX92FG5U5-V7fs4zHbJGpM2mGxysJIy4hh2VPHiySDfk3LZ2Z76oAOJBhSDYy5qvAIISnY4QHXW_vSfDtww==&c=Rj2Xd7_spa-gyy0SRFwJHBEO-eM-TmhWoUqgk6Q1pkl6g5AOBwZUpw==&ch=aIhBZf1WeoisZiOkJ48f2pcfWHLNpGajBjyjLH-gqcKxfxikmTHlhw==) (Bob Good's home county), Virginia Senator Christie New Craig, former [Bedford Sheriff Mike Brown](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HK_t4Wc6g1VpG9Ug8natkCTDUB3efgAcmMmhotJB79fks440TDPPXs2TX_8LryIPfxH6DFSMSzZMy0b-KTvbpVCelhxDwSVgQYxFDxvPmR9PbURRKGgZccCwzaE0Ra96cOJ7SL2TPcCnJyEm4-A2LqqJm8xdIQ9YVV4YpaUNNaoX5d9cSSHWsY7x-04EyDAvGSzhOEXh_rc=&c=Rj2Xd7_spa-gyy0SRFwJHBEO-eM-TmhWoUqgk6Q1pkl6g5AOBwZUpw==&ch=aIhBZf1WeoisZiOkJ48f2pcfWHLNpGajBjyjLH-gqcKxfxikmTHlhw==), and [Buckingham County Sheriff Billy Kidd Jr](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HK_t4Wc6g1VpG9Ug8natkCTDUB3efgAcmMmhotJB79fks440TDPPXgklbAu7hHBwPvYW2cYGNzaLylghERTkyPJAxFftRDiIyYgUrGhCDICilDca17CU8F6l7IF0EKgTrKOWLKSEDRflmOVNgmJWOCeWsQ2gGjDmMMXR49fpW6NbHJC4_rBoM3DrnSs7zCfSZ4rrnREbyXfWKDT58myodA==&c=Rj2Xd7_spa-gyy0SRFwJHBEO-eM-TmhWoUqgk6Q1pkl6g5AOBwZUpw==&ch=aIhBZf1WeoisZiOkJ48f2pcfWHLNpGajBjyjLH-gqcKxfxikmTHlhw==), who has spent nearly 50 years in law enforcement.
Please vote John McGuire by June 18 in the VA05 Republican primary. [To my opponent who likes to bully constituents and who admitted on CNN he says one thing in public and another thing in private about Trump, no one is buying your lies.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HK_t4Wc6g1VpG9Ug8natkCTDUB3efgAcmMmhotJB79fks440TDPPXlva6PKie51G4mgUjdm3VhrxYw77yDkX_B2EbTAn5o3rg8VVHK6nt2reczxRemXzWFN54f5DFg_NYHUjwWsosmr2Ip8hfOQTfoAWlaV2D-wZUWFjxXAUrvN0a5X_x7ZEC08EjHhQ57s20aBLcKxe_f6MTfCACQxrzNTsR9gPbaoX68H4vfck6OvLekCLOjaKFw==&c=Rj2Xd7_spa-gyy0SRFwJHBEO-eM-TmhWoUqgk6Q1pkl6g5AOBwZUpw==&ch=aIhBZf1WeoisZiOkJ48f2pcfWHLNpGajBjyjLH-gqcKxfxikmTHlhw==) Washington D.C. did not recruit me for Congress, constituents who voted for me for Senate and others tired of Good's bad behavior recruited me for Congress. clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | | MANAKIN SABOT, VA \-- 100% Pro-Trump 5th Congressional District candidate, former Navy SEAL, Virginia Senator, and business owner John McGuire today announced that he has been endorsed by Kirby Burch, CEO of the Virginia Dog Hunting Alliance (VAHDA). | 2A Endorsement Alert: Kirby Burch | | | ---|--- | "As a founding member and now CEO of the Virginia Hunting Dog Alliance (VADHA) --The Largest Hunting Organization in Virginia -- as well as the the Chief Executive Officer of the Hunting Dog Alliance, Chairman of the Commonwealth Sportsman Alliance, Chairman of Sportsmen for Governor Allen and Chairman of Sportsmen for Governor Youngkin, I know first hand how hard John works to support Sportsmen and our 2nd amendment rights. John McGuire is a Navy SEAL who puts unbelievable effort into getting the job done. John is on our side and he won't let us down in Congress. I warmly endorse my friend John McGuire and urge every conservative worthy of the name to support John McGuire for Congress." -Kirby Burch Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | The citizens of the 5th Congressional District deserve a representative who will show up and vote to protect our Second Amendment rights. McGuire has a perfect pro-gun voting record every year and has fought for Constitutional carry, sovereign immunity, and so many more pro-2A policies. McGuire said: "I deeply appreciate Kirby's support for our campaign, for Virginia's hunting heritage, and for the 2nd Amendment. As a father, I taught my children everything they needed to know about handling a firearm safely, and about the rights that are guaranteed to them by God, and protected by the United States Constitution. As a Navy SEAL for over ten years, I defended our nation and our Constitution against all enemies, both foreign and domestic. I have a perfect proven record of standing up for our Second Amendment rights and working to repeal infringements to the same. With your support, I will continue my fight in Congress. We must win in June and give President Trump a Congress that 100% supports his America First Agenda." McGuire is running against Never Trumper Bob Good in the VA-05 primary. McGuire has been seeing significant momentum during the race for the Republican Primary on June 18th. McGuire has been endorsed by prominent conservatives like ==, ==, and former ==. In addition, McGuire has received endorsements from local supporters like ==, multiple current and former == (Bob Good's home county), Virginia Senator Christie New Craig, former ==, and ==, who has spent nearly 50 years in law enforcement. Please vote John McGuire by June 18 in the VA05 Republican primary. == Washington D.C. did not recruit me for Congress, constituents who voted for me for Senate and others tired of Good's bad behavior recruited me for Congress. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: A Robin Williams joke & a cartoon
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Untitled%20design.png]
I'm running for Congress to represent hardworking everyday families, freedoms, and futures because we need a leader who will stand up to corporations, not be sponsored by them.
"Politicians should wear sponsor jackets like Nascar drivers, then we know who owns them." — Robin Williams
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Corporate money be damned, I'm determined to represent the people, not special interests or ultrawealthy corporate donors. Rep. Bergman has never faced a second-time challenger, and to defeat him , I rely on the generosity of grassroots contributors like you.
Grassroots donations - no matter their amount - have been absolutely crucial in this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CONTRIBUTE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friends,
Massive tax cuts for giant corporations and the loss of family-sustaining union jobs have led to a $50 trillion transfer of wealth away from working-class people's homes and retirement accounts.
Windfall benefits to the ultra-wealthy never "trickle down." They lead to larger deficits and more income inequality. I refuse to answer to corporations because our Congressional leaders should answer solely to the people.
Friends, I'm honored to have received more contributions from individuals within the district than Rep. Jack Bergman this cycle, but our work is unfinished.
We fundraise not with promises to CEOs but with a platform that resonates with hardworking, everyday Americans. My funding comes from many small-amount donations, and I am the only 'American Promise' pledger in the race committed to campaign finance reform and eliminating Big Money from politics.
Name recognition will be crucial in November, so to date, over two cycles, we've invested nearly $1 million in grassroots contributions to inform voters about my candidacy.
Even though more voters have put their faith behind our campaign than any other candidate in the race, we're slightly behind our monthly goal, I'm being outspent by corporate PACs, and Friends, I need you in my corner.
Your support is making a significant difference in this race. Thank you.
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

clean_body: [] I'm running for Congress to represent hardworking everyday families, freedoms, and futures because we need a leader who will stand up to corporations, not be sponsored by them. "Politicians should wear sponsor jackets like Nascar drivers, then we know who owns them." — Robin Williams [] Corporate money be damned, I'm determined to represent the people, not special interests or ultrawealthy corporate donors. Rep. Bergman has never faced a second-time challenger, and to defeat him , I rely on the generosity of grassroots contributors like you. Grassroots donations - no matter their amount - have been absolutely crucial in this race. [] CONTRIBUTE NOW [] Friends, Massive tax cuts for giant corporations and the loss of family-sustaining union jobs have led to a $50 trillion transfer of wealth away from working-class people's homes and retirement accounts. Windfall benefits to the ultra-wealthy never "trickle down." They lead to larger deficits and more income inequality. I refuse to answer to corporations because our Congressional leaders should answer solely to the people. Friends, I'm honored to have received more contributions from individuals within the district than Rep. Jack Bergman this cycle, but our work is unfinished. We fundraise not with promises to CEOs but with a platform that resonates with hardworking, everyday Americans. My funding comes from many small-amount donations, and I am the only 'American Promise' pledger in the race committed to campaign finance reform and eliminating Big Money from politics. Name recognition will be crucial in November, so to date, over two cycles, we've invested nearly $1 million in grassroots contributions to inform voters about my candidacy. Even though more voters have put their faith behind our campaign than any other candidate in the race, we're slightly behind our monthly goal, I'm being outspent by corporate PACs, and Friends, I need you in my corner. Your support is making a significant difference in this race. Thank you. -Bob Bob Lorinser Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 DONATE NOW [] [] Or, send a check to Friends of Dr. Bob PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR. BOB

body:
#

**FIRST:** The NRA hosted their annual convention in Dallas, TX this year. Even though the NRA is a shell of what it used to be, tens of thousands of attendees still flocked to Dallas to support the organization’s dangerous “guns everywhere” agenda.
**THEN:** The Texas chapter of GIFFORDS Gun Owners for Safety held a rally outside of the convention center yesterday—the same day that Donald Trump delivered a speech to a room full of supporters.
**NOW:** As the convention comes to a close today, we need to make a bold statement that our movement for gun safety is stronger than ever.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: January 6th 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
A lot of people have asked me what that day was like for me as a combat veteran, so I wanted to take a moment to share some reflections with you.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=j6)
---
| | | | See this? That's me on January 6:
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=j6)
---
| As a Marine Corps veteran, I never imagined having to use my training to protect myself and my colleagues on the House floor. I never imagined teaching my House colleagues how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing. I never imagined I’d be helping frightened colleagues move to safety as insurrectionists started streaming into the Capitol. I never imagined I’d stay behind after the Capitol security came in to do one more sweep for colleagues who might have frozen and gone to cocoon somewhere hard to find. I never imagined I would ever have to teach my staff how to knock on the door of our office a certain way to signal it was them and not some attacker — something we did in the Marine Corps when surrounded by insurgents and you didn’t know who was good and who was bad. And I never imagined I’d have to text members of the House and urge them not to get on buses ready to evacuate us from the Capitol because if we left we’d lose the building to the coup. Maybe it is the Marine in me, but I will always fight for our democracy. I'd have done it in the Capitol that day -- and I will fight as hard as I can to win this race and keep GOP election-deniers out of the Senate.. Nothing less than our democracy is at stake in this election. If Republicans win Arizona, they win the presidency and they take control of the Senate. We can't let that happen, and I can't do it without you. [** _Can you please split $20 between No Dem Left Behind and my campaign for the United States Senate today? Everything comes down to Arizona, and I cannot do this without you. Please,_ folks _._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=j6&amount=20)
---
| If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | | | [ Chip in $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=j6&amount=20&express_lane=true)
---
| | | [ Chip in $40](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=j6&amount=40&express_lane=true)
---
| | | | [ Chip in $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=j6&amount=100&express_lane=true)
---
| | | [ Chip in $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=j6&amount=250&express_lane=true)
---
| | | | [ RUSH $500 >](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=j6&amount=500&express_lane=true)
---
| | | [ Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=j6)
---
| | | | And as someone who joined the United States Marine Corps to defend this country and protect our democracy, you can always count on me to be on the front lines of this battle. Thank you,
---
|
---
| Ruben Gallego
---
