body:
I know it doesn't sound like much, but my entire fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85237852/474117787/-1997846893?refcode=jtk1451-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhjNThmMC1mMzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qS0MYaVkSJDCAuWvJT8akSheiOQTKP1uGLgTV4zI67g=)
---
$20.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $20 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85237853/474117788/-1997846893?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=20&refcode=jtk1451-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhjNThmMC1mMzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qS0MYaVkSJDCAuWvJT8akSheiOQTKP1uGLgTV4zI67g=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we continue on into 2024, I must keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $20 as we end the 20th week of 2024 to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85237854/474117789/-1997846893?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=20&refcode=jtk1451-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhjNThmMC1mMzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qS0MYaVkSJDCAuWvJT8akSheiOQTKP1uGLgTV4zI67g=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85237855/474117790/-1997846893?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=20&refcode=jtk1451-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhjNThmMC1mMzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qS0MYaVkSJDCAuWvJT8akSheiOQTKP1uGLgTV4zI67g=)

Letitia
With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

clean_body: It’s time to take back the Senate from Chuck Schumer’s grip, and we’re gonna do it with Bernie Moreno in Ohio. | Peter – It’s time to take back the Senate from Chuck Schumer’s grip, and we’re gonna do it with Bernie Moreno in Ohio. He’s a Republican firecracker with a heart of gold and a passion for this country like you wouldn’t believe. Now, let me tell ya about his opponent, Sherrod Brown. This fella has held elected office since bell-bottoms were cool. He’s been a rubber stamp for Biden’s disastrous agenda and is about as sharp as a marble. But here’s the real kicker – he’s been raking in MILLIONS of dollars courting Hollywood elites and billionaire bigwigs to stay in power, and it’s working. But enough of me blabbering on – I’m asking you to dig deep and chip in whatever you can to support Bernie Moreno’s campaign. Bernie can’t do this alone, Peter, and he needs folks like you and me to help get him there. Yours truly, Senator John Kennedy Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

I need your help.
| | |
---
Friend, it's Kirsten. I'm about to ask you to **[make a $5 donation ahead of my midnight deadline tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85240707/474125537/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5062-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWNkNDM3My1mNzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r-rpcn2MI5Cv0Q9G4dSWE93HKfiGS_6CHs8l4M9patg=)** This is an incredibly important deadline, and I'm counting on your help to hit my goal. **But first, I want to thank you — so much — for supporting my campaign.**
I'm fighting every single day to earn your support and deliver on the promises I've made to you. From certifying the Equal Rights Amendment so that we can restore reproductive rights nationwide to fighting gun violence and keeping our communities safe, I'm working tirelessly to win change for your family.
As my grandmother taught me when I was a young girl, politics isn't about parties or polling numbers._ It's about the people._ It's my job to serve your family and do everything that I can to make life better for _you_. And it's an honor that I'm grateful for every day. So thank you for trusting me with your support and giving me this incredible opportunity to serve.
I wish that I could end this email here. But unfortunately, elections are an unavoidable part of politics. And to continue to serve your family in the Senate and win progress on all the issues you care about — reproductive rights, affordable health care, protecting our seniors and so much more — **I need your help.**
Democrats are heading into a historically difficult election cycle. And here in New York, right-wing extremists had their best election in decades in 2022. I'm confident that we can reverse that trend this year. **But because I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, I'm counting on grassroots donations to compete with far-right megadonors. **
**[Please, if I've earned your support and trust fighting for you in the Senate, will you make a donation to help me continue this work and defend my seat? I'm up against a critical deadline tonight, and I need a surge in grassroots support now to hit my goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85240709/474125538/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5062-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWNkNDM3My1mNzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r-rpcn2MI5Cv0Q9G4dSWE93HKfiGS_6CHs8l4M9patg=)**

name: JanePAC.com
subject: Ready to foil Big Oil's plans?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC,[janepac
body:
Now is our chance.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85240786/474125765/1328794144?refcode=ea.5102fa92-f715-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.5102fa92-f715-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxMDJmYTkyLWY3MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NVm9a2lLUJH9AIsBoNpBNqpxuZVGD5OqyF9t_RP_bW0=&emci=dffd0ad4-8714-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=5102fa92-f715-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)
---
Imagine waking up every day to an oil well just steps from your backyard. Sounds like a nightmare, right? Well, for too many Californians, it’s a reality. Before we dive into the details, we need your help. **[Can we count on you to split a donation between the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and our partner, The Campaign for a Safe and Healthy California, so we can educate California voters on a dangerous ballot measure Big Oil is bankrolling this year?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85240787/474125766/289005889?refcode=ea.5102fa92-f715-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.5102fa92-f715-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxMDJmYTkyLWY3MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NVm9a2lLUJH9AIsBoNpBNqpxuZVGD5OqyF9t_RP_bW0=)** California passed a bill in 2022 that prohibits new oil drilling within 3,200 feet of homes, schools, and other sensitive areas in our communities. This law was a monumental victory for the health and safety of over _7 million_ Californians who live within a mile of oil and gas wells. Despite clear public support for the law, Big Oil launched a massive campaign to try to subvert the will of Californians by overturning this life-saving measure via ballot referendum this November. You should care about this whether or not you live in California. Let us explain... A win for Big Oil would lead to devastating public health outcomes (increased respiratory and neurological diseases in children, greater exposure to toxic pollutants in predominantly communities of color, and more). It would also set a dangerous national precedent. **Big Oil is using California as a testing ground for a broader agenda to undermine environmental protections nationwide. They are spending millions to mislead, manipulate, and dismantle _any_ climate progress they see as harming their bottom line.** But there are just two big problems for Big Oil: _We’re not backing down. And**we’re not alone.**_ **The Campaign for a Safe and Healthy California** — a massive grassroots coalition of health professionals, environmental justice advocates, and community leaders — are leading efforts to ensure Californians reject the fossil fuel industry’s self-serving agenda in November. **Here’s what we're doing and how your support can help:**
* **Educational Outreach:** We need resources to inform the public about the dangers associated with nearby oil drilling through mailers, phone calls, social media, emails, texts, and in-person outreach — and in a state as diverse as California, we’ll need to invest in multilingual outreach. Disinformation is a potent tool in Big Oil's arsenal, but truth is more powerful.

* **Legislative Advocacy:** Supporting candidates who champion environmental justice is more crucial than ever. Your contributions to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC will allow us to support more down-ballot candidates who prioritize public health over fossil fuel profits.

* **Community Engagement:** We have to amplify the voices of those directly impacted by oil drilling. While the climate crisis caused by continued reliance on fossil fuels impacts all of us, people in frontline communities are bearing the brunt of these deadly extraction projects. Their stories underscore the urgent need for critical measures like the one CA passed in 2022.

**[Your support is essential. Your donation to Jane PAC and The Campaign for a Safe and Healthy California will help us fight the California referendum and back candidates dedicated to our health and the environment. clean_body: Now is our chance. | Imagine waking up every day to an oil well just steps from your backyard. Sounds like a nightmare, right? Well, for too many Californians, it’s a reality. Before we dive into the details, we need your help. = California passed a bill in 2022 that prohibits new oil drilling within 3,200 feet of homes, schools, and other sensitive areas in our communities. This law was a monumental victory for the health and safety of over 7 million Californians who live within a mile of oil and gas wells. Despite clear public support for the law, Big Oil launched a massive campaign to try to subvert the will of Californians by overturning this life-saving measure via ballot referendum this November. You should care about this whether or not you live in California. Let us explain... A win for Big Oil would lead to devastating public health outcomes (increased respiratory and neurological diseases in children, greater exposure to toxic pollutants in predominantly communities of color, and more). It would also set a dangerous national precedent. Big Oil is using California as a testing ground for a broader agenda to undermine environmental protections nationwide. They are spending millions to mislead, manipulate, and dismantle any climate progress they see as harming their bottom line. But there are just two big problems for Big Oil: We’re not backing down. Andwe’re not alone. The Campaign for a Safe and Healthy California — a massive grassroots coalition of health professionals, environmental justice advocates, and community leaders — are leading efforts to ensure Californians reject the fossil fuel industry’s self-serving agenda in November. Here’s what we're doing and how your support can help: Educational Outreach: We need resources to inform the public about the dangers associated with nearby oil drilling through mailers, phone calls, social media, emails, texts, and in-person outreach — and in a state as diverse as California, we’ll need to invest in multilingual outreach. Disinformation is a potent tool in Big Oil's arsenal, but truth is more powerful. Legislative Advocacy: Supporting candidates who champion environmental justice is more crucial than ever. Your contributions to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC will allow us to support more down-ballot candidates who prioritize public health over fossil fuel profits. Community Engagement: We have to amplify the voices of those directly impacted by oil drilling. While the climate crisis caused by continued reliance on fossil fuels impacts all of us, people in frontline communities are bearing the brunt of these deadly extraction projects. Their stories underscore the urgent need for critical measures like the one CA passed in 2022. = | = Let’s do this! The Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC,, authorized by Campaign for a Safe and Healthy California, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: Get ready to ride the waves of change! Join us and the surf community for a sun-soaked day of environmental action. Let's keep our coastal paradise pristine together. Mark your calendars and grab your SPF – it's time to make a splash for a cleaner ocean! 🌞🌴 | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | | | | COMMUNITY EVENT ALERT!! | | | | | Join us for one of our exciting events of the season - the Spring Beach Cleanup Party! We're taking action to keep our beaches safe, clean, and enjoyable for all. Gather your friends and family for a wonderful day of community service and environmental awareness. | | | | | | Imagine the joy of a pristine beach - the sound of waves crashing, the feel of warm sand between your toes, and the scent of salty air. By coming together on May 19th at 1pm, we can make sure this experience is available to everyone. | | | | But that's not all! We're excited to announce that our event is supporting the . This partnership is part of our commitment to uplifting small businesses in our community. Be prepared for a thrilling day of fun, friends, and surf! | | | | | | | | | Event Details | | | | | Date: Sunday, May 19th, 2024Time: 1PMLocation: Huntington State Beach on Brookhurst and PCHGrab your gloves, sunscreen, bags, and join us as we make a positive impact on our environment. Don't miss this chance to support our surfer community and inspire environmental justice! Questions/Inquiries Please Contact Chris Girardi at domjonesforassembly@gmail.com | | Connect with us | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | This email was sent from .

name: Jon Tester
subject: A government that fights for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| _Tammy Baldwin here — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my colleague Jon Tester. Jon is running for reelection in Montana to defend our Senate majority, so I hope you'll read his message and[chip in, if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo)_ Hi, Peter. Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding day in 1905. That was a couple years before they picked out a flat piece of grassland just outside Big Sandy to homestead. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo) That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up; where Sharla and I raised our kids, and where we still farm the land to this day. Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating windstorms, bitter cold, fires, poisonous snakes—pretty much everything but locusts. They had a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill, their healthy son and daughters (including Helen, my mom), strong muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America. I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents. Folks like our teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that fights for them. But the special interests trying to unseat me don’t care about that. Dark money groups are spending millions of dollars to misinform voters and replace me with a mouthpiece for their own agenda. They’ll do whatever it takes to elect their handpicked candidate because they don’t care about protecting our way of life—they’re just in it for power and influence. **That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the mountains of cash these outside groups have earmarked to defeat me.** [**Can I count on you to split a contribution between my people-powered campaign and Tammy Baldwin? With the election season in full swing, we need to fight back now >>**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-tester.5zk3A_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo)
---
[SPLIT $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-tester.B4djTN&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo)
---
| [SPLIT $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-tester.bxtC9B&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo)
---
[SPLIT $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-tester.71esfR&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo)
---
| [SPLIT $250 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-tester.w3aEnx&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_AM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo)

Your donation—no matter the amount—plants the seeds of our movement, ensuring we grow the resources we need to win.
Thanks for your support. Together, we can keep me in the Senate fighting for the little guy.
—Jon
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=2&akid=2627%2E35263%2EetZuOo)**

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: I'm counting on you to stick with me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, I've always been guided by the values I was raised with in Minnesota -- and that's why working to make life better for the American people is so important to me.
From allowing Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices to reducing the price of insulin for millions of seniors, I've worked hard to lower costs. But we still have more work to do.
[**I'm asking for your continued support so we can build on the progress we've made. Will you split a donation to the MN PA Victory Fund today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240519-mnpavf?refcode=em20240519-2&refcode2=3000_552475_lK3U0x&akid=3000%2E552475%2ElK3U0x)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240519-mnpavf?refcode=em20240519-2&refcode2=3000_552475_lK3U0x&akid=3000%2E552475%2ElK3U0x)**
I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college.
No one expected me to run for elected office -- **and not many people expected me to win either.** But thanks to supporters like you I was elected to the U.S. Senate.
[**I'm counting on you to stick with me because I'll be on the ballot in November. Will you make a donation to the MN PA Victory Fund today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240519-mnpavf?refcode=em20240519-2&refcode2=3000_552475_lK3U0x&akid=3000%2E552475%2ElK3U0x)
Thank you!
-- Amy

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=3000%2E552475%2ElK3U0x)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=3000%2E552475%2ElK3U0x)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.
clean_body: Peter, I've always been guided by the values I was raised with in Minnesota -- and that's why working to make life better for the American people is so important to me. From allowing Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices to reducing the price of insulin for millions of seniors, I've worked hard to lower costs. But we still have more work to do. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either. But thanks to supporters like you I was elected to the U.S. Senate. Thank you! -- Amy

clean_body: I’m TIED with my MAGA Republican opponent – and I’m counting on your help.| | | = Please – If we don’t act now, it will be too late.I just got word that The New York Times**released a BRAND NEW pollthis weekthat shows me tied with my far-right GOP opponent. Please take a look ⬇️: = It’s clear: Nevada has become the GOP’s TOP priority.**Unfortunately, their attacks are working, and I’m in danger of losing this seat to Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate.= = I wish I could sugarcoat it, but this is a bad sign. Experts at The Cook Political Report recently downgraded my Senate race to a “toss up,” and national Republicans took it as a green light to go ALL IN to try and flip Nevada red. Just this morning, Mitch McConnell’s dark money group announced that they’re spending nearly $6 MILLION on ads to try and defeat me. We can’t sit idly by while the GOP massively ramps up their attacks against me. body:
I’m asking you to invest in North Carolina’s future. | I have a question for you, Peter: What is North Carolina’s future worth _to you?_ I believe creating a brighter future for every North Carolinian is _priceless_ — and I bet you’d agree. But the fact is, national GOP money groups are trying to buy this governor’s race out from under us and give extremists like Mark Robinson free rein to push their job-killing agenda. _If we’re going to stop them, we have to raise the funds to stay competitive._ **[So if I asked you to chip in RIGHT NOW and split a donation between Governor Cooper’s team and my campaign — would you give? $10? $25? More?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85244118/474133788/261388563?refcode=ea.3ae67938-fb15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.3ae67938-fb15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU2NzkzOC1mYjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-iUpbtJ8r3Tk_K5UbSb_a3Lf-3szOwyfbAlS1qbrFRA=)** Your contribution could help make the difference between putting North Carolina on a path of progress or allowing the GOP to drag us backward. It could help elect a leader who is ready to fight for our rights instead of one who is determined to strip them away. It could help determine whether we protect our democracy or whether it falls to right-wing extremism. **Our race is a toss-up, and your donation could make the difference between victory and defeat.** **[Peter, I’m asking you to put just $10 or $25 — or any amount that’s right for you — into the fight to secure North Carolina against far-right radicalism. Please click here to split a contribution between our teams today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85244119/474133789/261388563?refcode=ea.3ae67938-fb15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.3ae67938-fb15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU2NzkzOC1mYjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-iUpbtJ8r3Tk_K5UbSb_a3Lf-3szOwyfbAlS1qbrFRA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [SPLIT $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85244120/474133790/261388563?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.3ae67938-fb15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.3ae67938-fb15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU2NzkzOC1mYjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-iUpbtJ8r3Tk_K5UbSb_a3Lf-3szOwyfbAlS1qbrFRA=)

name: Brian Mast - U.S. Army Veteran
subject: Time to start acting like the home of the brave again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden lost his backbone

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=195aa29bb57e41aa8030028dfa7678d3&_e=uC-uwzcOKZg0hoWULFy2nnV8nvSsxWl3pqGXgRJhLvT9wTAA6ZId2TAAw0WZjnD-EJr0QptiM3cJpXHiyn2OY7zaTNxzpTpTNphf4AI4xv9XPb23TRw3er_6DI943v_w8xwxGtamcWXUE4GMJipGuFiLX3kpcQPXmfk6zQXJc8Wnk91d2Qjp9b6o0dyy2mb7_EqtJPW0exmWc0LPd3YuN8X2xc9syqTRTWmggb73EO8p1rmVXAIKSPajBxCXH_CyHIrgpLW7v-qY5uskexVgMxVh9-obgSawlk8KXfWbFfLwFwleW8mv1RQRNFkGyUcRbuXWOu7T4DgOIRovlnZ1b-ouCbRuA1b-YcjSzOnGh1pCrRj8goRhsYYSG0hjA-F5)
---
Patriot,

If you're getting this email, it's because I believe that you are a member of the America First movement and that you agree with me on one critical issue:

**Joe Biden is harming our nation.**

I'm reaching out to members of our community because I know that things look bleak right now across the board — high inflation, chaotic college protests, rising antisemitism, foolish federal funding bills, attacks on the American dream — the list goes on.

We know that **Joe Biden lost his backbone a long time ago.**

The duty of the President of the United States is to project strength and act quickly to stop all threats to the American people.

Yet, Joe Biden continues to project _weakness_ by:

* Allowing radical antisemitism to fester all over college campuses
* Standing by while our border is overrun by criminals and terrorists
* Wrecking our economy with skyrocketing inflation
* Spending American tax dollars on wasteful foreign projects

**The bottom line is Joe Biden is bending over backward for everything except America's public safety.**

**The result:** A weak and woke America that is vulnerable to attacks from foreign threats and radicals in our own country.

This is the exact opposite of what America needs from our leader.

**America is not a weak or lawless nation! We are the land of the free and the home of the brave — _it's time we start acting like it again!_ **

If you agree with me that we need to intervene before it's too late and Joe Biden runs our nation into the ground, **[I need you on my team](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=195aa29bb57e41aa8030028dfa7678d3&_e=uC-uwzcOKZg0hoWULFy2nnV8nvSsxWl3pqGXgRJhLvT9wTAA6ZId2TAAw0WZjnD-EJr0QptiM3cJpXHiyn2OY7zaTNxzpTpTNphf4AI4xv9XPb23TRw3er_6DI943v_w8xwxGtamcWXUE4GMJipGuFiLX3kpcQPXmfk6zQXJc8Wnk91d2Qjp9b6o0dyy2mb7_EqtJPW0exmWc0LPd3YuN8X2xc9syqTRTWmggb73EO_jmO6NmV_nAB8JPNw4BX_t36Eat3omt88Zou2lcHNnjQnrgH9spzLCiSMZfsu40sunz0pzSkKtvJlDBhi1qlJc1X4gT5oNrP-ly9ZWAIvqe0xs8cvGINCVOgm_NVAWR7G76bjev8RkbsA9aENrACxP).**

Serving in the U.S. Army I learned the power of having a strong team that you can rely on. Heck, I wouldn't even be here today if it wasn't for my brothers and sisters in arms rushing to haul me out after my legs were blown off in a terrorist bomb explosion.

All of this to say — we can't rely on Joe Biden, but I feel like I can count on you.

If you want to secure the future of our country, **[please join me today](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=195aa29bb57e41aa8030028dfa7678d3&_e=uC-uwzcOKZg0hoWULFy2nnV8nvSsxWl3pqGXgRJhLvT9wTAA6ZId2TAAw0WZjnD-EJr0QptiM3cJpXHiyn2OY7zaTNxzpTpTNphf4AI4xv9XPb23TRw3er_6DI943v_w8xwxGtamcWXUE4GMJipGuFiLX3kpcQPXmfk6zQXJc8Wnk91d2Qjp9b6o0dyy2mb7_EqtJPW0exmWc0LPd3YuN8X2xc9syqTRTWmggb73EO-KWHoSo2dzO_t_n86FX9BLG_-YGpYUweSBD8Horhf2kZXpqWm5cDGTB7o2FOXVExtzDwkNwm_lwhwJ0WX5k-0NnhrMKPW_XrT-VbjJJyQ80WL8eqmd-ACz4dm14XhrNp0tlQbcEZ2Q48oeXDld1_CQ).**

clean_body: Biden lost his backbone | Patriot, If you're getting this email, it's because I believe that you are a member of the America First movement and that you agree with me on one critical issue: Joe Biden is harming our nation. I'm reaching out to members of our community because I know that things look bleak right now across the board — high inflation, chaotic college protests, rising antisemitism, foolish federal funding bills, attacks on the American dream — the list goes on. We know that Joe Biden lost his backbone a long time ago. The duty of the President of the United States is to project strength and act quickly to stop all threats to the American people. Yet, Joe Biden continues to project weakness by: Allowing radical antisemitism to fester all over college campuses Standing by while our border is overrun by criminals and terrorists Wrecking our economy with skyrocketing inflation Spending American tax dollars on wasteful foreign projects The bottom line is Joe Biden is bending over backward for everything except America's public safety. The result: A weak and woke America that is vulnerable to attacks from foreign threats and radicals in our own country. This is the exact opposite of what America needs from our leader. America is not a weak or lawless nation! We are the land of the free and the home of the brave — it's time we start acting like it again! If you agree with me that we need to intervene before it's too late and Joe Biden runs our nation into the ground, . Serving in the U.S. Army I learned the power of having a strong team that you can rely on. Heck, I wouldn't even be here today if it wasn't for my brothers and sisters in arms rushing to haul me out after my legs were blown off in a terrorist bomb explosion. All of this to say — we can't rely on Joe Biden, but I feel like I can count on you. If you want to secure the future of our country, . Stand with me, Brian Mast U.S. Army Veteran | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | Mast for Congress · PO Box 3016 · Stuart, FL 34995 · USA

name: New joints
subject: Unique protein grows new cartilage?
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Breakthrough research proves how
you can reverse cartilage loss…

Modern medicine has been treating
bone on bone joint pain with cortisone shots… But, these
injections are proven to have the opposite effect…

They can actually weaken your
cartilage and cause inflammation, both of which worsen joint
pain.

That's not all Big Pharma has
lied about…

⇒ 6 Myths About Joint Pain
Debunked

This is why Big Pharma HATES
studies like these and why you haven't heard about it…

It turns out, all you need is to
eat more of this protein to improve the density of your
cartilage.

So, if you want brand-new
joints…

Click here to read more about
this unique protein and how you can get it now

Not having enough of this protein
was once considered to be an irreversible step in the progression
of joint pain… Until now.

As always-to being & staying on
The Path together.

-Dr. Chad Walding
DPT, ISSA Nutrition Specialist &
NativePath Co-Founder

Peter, **Pramila is the leader you call when it’s all on the line.**
From inspiring volunteers and recruiting new voters to leading the fight for abortion rights and championing the labor movement—**there is no one who fights harder for the people than Pramila.**
[**Click here to watch Pramila’s newest campaign video and then chip in to support this campaign.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240519.tbJHhT&refcode=em20240519-3893&t=2&akid=3893%2E420207%2EVsU_wc)

But we also know our movement, our country, and our democracy are still facing some of the greatest threats and challenges we’ve ever encountered. **Pramila is ready to lead the fight back—and she needs you to join in this fight with her.**
Not every community has a champion like Pramila fighting for them in Congress. But with our collective power, we will elect even more progressive leaders like Pramila to keep up the fight to protect our democracy, defend our rights, and stand up for working people.

body:
our chance is disappearing before our eyes
| We thought when we reached out to let you know that Colin Allred was within **STRIKING DISTANCE** of Ted Cruz in the polls, _donations would POUR IN!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68414?t=6&akid=14632%2E878179%2E1T4y1A) **But we couldn’t have been more wrong.** We missed our $10,000 goal by a full $4,576!

If we don’t make up the difference immediately, we’ll be too far behind to catch up and we’ll lose our chance to send MAGA Ted Cruz packing!

[We have until midnight to right this wrong: Chip in $7 before midnight to not just save our single seat Senate Majority, but EXPAND it »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68414?t=7&akid=14632%2E878179%2E1T4y1A) | [**MISSED $10,000 FLIP TEXAS FUND GOAL: CHIP IN $7 BEFORE MIDNIGHT TO SAVE THE SENATE AND SEND MAGA MONSTERS LIKE TED CRUZ PACKING »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68414?t=8&akid=14632%2E878179%2E1T4y1A)

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14632%2E878179%2E1T4y1A). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14632%2E878179%2E1T4y1A).**

name: Steve Garvey #6
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff!!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6a4d3086d2a64ae6840ec44c7ff7d32e&_e=VloMZlqiLGdJ0_-6ellg1e4YNym3kg4LazMeU1Lm9JAlHyZrmVfRAHfiWVfTaLfpsCH45EiM_5FfaGlcLvSohvHWHgLPIKw-pE17nWi751FtyVJROgUWqZwAV9Vz1EUyYcn8BD9t2DLR-CRaDPvyw9Hnjd9ocFd_A30HuERxkE-RqR09J2tm0iHnce1TKmS_HZvCBe4N0uPfRqv2ICSETy-h8MSBeMjox1zE_b6Bo_zkgJ7Y9_NBppxfETgDdfOChj11yS6ObMHO3q9kjc5rxrGXdn7oH86kYIXdoNdy64xr0YGq2flS0bNS8Y62LRoyYUtKP-1zcd-HIQKzGFh9rX2zKszTZQ6UFaN5_UzXUTLlkSFJCAEDX-WiwplTlAJm9XVLIYg9dJkFLOyG1t8HiA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees......well, as they say, “Those were the days.”But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.
---
| [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6a4d3086d2a64ae6840ec44c7ff7d32e&_e=VloMZlqiLGdJ0_-6ellg1e4YNym3kg4LazMeU1Lm9JAlHyZrmVfRAHfiWVfTaLfpsCH45EiM_5FfaGlcLvSohvHWHgLPIKw-pE17nWi751FtyVJROgUWqZwAV9Vz1EUyYcn8BD9t2DLR-CRaDPvyw9Hnjd9ocFd_A30HuERxkE-RqR09J2tm0iHnce1TKmS_HZvCBe4N0uPfRqv2ICSETy-h8MSBeMjox1zE_b6Bo_xkRalSNWnszAaKXeD-YeAPDrq8fOzuYQV6Wamz1MzOaVjl-2HRGWJ2NwuFbuW2N0HYsPJ1ePFDHtzQykeS31XUtzw1WAx2jbtOs1sVxBFDotFupkJ6HfG-MJBlJn4cF6OEs3MyBD9xDqdgbJbGD4f6p6b6gEaGqGzhdld49T7aWA%3D%3D)
---
| | **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6a4d3086d2a64ae6840ec44c7ff7d32e&_e=VloMZlqiLGdJ0_-6ellg1e4YNym3kg4LazMeU1Lm9JAlHyZrmVfRAHfiWVfTaLfpsCH45EiM_5FfaGlcLvSohvHWHgLPIKw-pE17nWi751FtyVJROgUWqZwAV9Vz1EUyYcn8BD9t2DLR-CRaDPvyw9Hnjd9ocFd_A30HuERxkE-RqR09J2tm0iHnce1TKmS_HZvCBe4N0uPfRqv2ICSETy-h8MSBeMjox1zE_b6Bo_w7JNJBZSVpaPYnU90Ps4Ne-v_ZrBxOto5Rh_Fyb1vjeOuVgt3d_Jk5874qrk7yzIY53SLci6pys9d8bEJKPsFBbWdm2SHFIB6LwGCoOuARBXEvaF5MCuWiRR2N4eWEQlQ5W9pDClGbr9gBn9wpnZJk2fS7-kKsUR_agQpc-udEFQ%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November.Democrat policies have brought America to its knees.There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California.Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And that’s why I’m running for Senate.**_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.**And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do.But there is no way I can pull it off without you.**[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6a4d3086d2a64ae6840ec44c7ff7d32e&_e=VloMZlqiLGdJ0_-6ellg1e4YNym3kg4LazMeU1Lm9JAlHyZrmVfRAHfiWVfTaLfpsCH45EiM_5FfaGlcLvSohvHWHgLPIKw-pE17nWi751FtyVJROgUWqZwAV9Vz1EUyYcn8BD9t2DLR-CRaDPvyw9Hnjd9ocFd_A30HuERxkE-RqR09J2tm0iHnce1TKmS_HZvCBe4N0uPfRqv2ICSETy-h8MSBeMjox1zE_b6Bo_ySwcz8PNz3Ye1QWncB9Lk7Ae7WJp_BOpTah2s82WSPcOdZ9l_IotvmQN2ZK-aZm772CFtZAHnkqyidVriZDZSy94r8Aggq-GmdTcAAqoVy6ewpHZ4_W2QM0CeifRPYkuhrEfITjthpwPMerZIcpccW6jLcoconmR6Oud6vhgfQgw%3D%3D)** I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before.They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California...I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_.I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians.When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff...**...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6a4d3086d2a64ae6840ec44c7ff7d32e&_e=VloMZlqiLGdJ0_-6ellg1e4YNym3kg4LazMeU1Lm9JAlHyZrmVfRAHfiWVfTaLfpsCH45EiM_5FfaGlcLvSohvHWHgLPIKw-pE17nWi751FtyVJROgUWqZwAV9Vz1EUyYcn8BD9t2DLR-CRaDPvyw9Hnjd9ocFd_A30HuERxkE-RqR09J2tm0iHnce1TKmS_HZvCBe4N0uPfRqv2ICSETy-h8MSBeMjox1zE_b6Bo_ywqaIJSnw7AEVezq11R8btS2IVBfH_vOUlzvdpas45GoSFmSqxFr4dxuaWVRu5H8pkBZ7j-OVfUzd8SIzHxJbN_AzJCqLPeunJFXvJYnFrcpsUqhqBqwJuo9Fuv6P4NWjax9YK7Lj1h0h1RqBsmIvH9lJRpvWOH9r0dLe5GUwhmw%3D%3D)

I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before.They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California...I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win.I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians.When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff......we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails |

clean_body: I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP! I need your help. I missed my fundraising deadline, and without your help, I'm in deep trouble again this month. | I NEED YOUR HELP! Fellow American, There's no other way to put this: My next deadline is around the corner, I 'm losing donors, and I need your help. We can't afford to let the Left outraise us in our race to keep the House Majority. | I 'M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP. Look, the Radical Left is bound and determined to unseat Republicans and push Biden's Socialist Agenda down the American people's throats. We can 't have a Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist putting the greatest country in human history in danger. It's make-it-or-break time right now, and I know you've done so much to make sure we maintain the House majority, but I've got to have your help RIGHT NOW. Thank you for all your help in advance. I promise that all your support will go directly to saving our beautiful country. In liberty, Wesley Hunt Changing Washington won 't be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges. I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area.****** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. body:
Hi Peter!
Did you see the most recent poll on our primary race? It shows us leading our opponents!
The support you’ve shown our campaign is paying off.
It’s clear we’ve got a shot at winning this, but we’ve got to do everything we can to communicate our message to every voter in our district.
To do that, we need to supply our campaign office, train our volunteers, print yard signs and posters, and get our ads up and running.
We’re counting on donations from grassroots supporters like yourself to help us make it happen. If you can, consider donating today. Even just $20 goes a long way.

subject: Most Liberal Senator
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Sherrod Brown stands as one of the biggest enablers of Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda, which has wreaked havoc on our nation. | | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: We’re thrilled that conservative outsider and businessman **Bernie Moreno** (R-OH) won the Republican nomination for the U.S. Senate in Ohio — but the fight is far from over. **Now, we must turn our focus to November and the crucial task of defeating liberal Senator Sherrod Brown (D-OH).** As a grassroots organization dedicated to electing true conservatives to the U.S. Senate, we understand the importance of this moment. Sherrod Brown stands as one of the biggest enablers of Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda, which has wreaked havoc on our nation. Sherrod Brown advocates for open borders, soft-on-crime policies, runaway spending, and relentless taxation on hardworking American families. **A career politician since the Nixon era, Brown’s voting record aligns nearly 100% with Biden's destructive policies.** **[**Please help Bernie Moreno defeat Sherrod Brown today!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=68e389f631734dcab1e3d089ad1fd9e1&_e=Ko6pKYpTHIZYc-6jYhA5TN_7vENP0NGcsB_CYiUURdf5-u37IA4mYoXYBinVwHat9UrWk6EQb42c1AmtLkpLKsGnymVy0iDDyY7L3H9hBYybz5Wvrk4BAjyJzRj3Q6ZY9HtV7xoPDcBvVLVhvhS-ba7_vZf_oQlqsD155GeldLvVQnfLqwVdIb9Eqw8QLtR7Lvuj9wCrCSWpYcN19INYJ3lQWhDZzfyytHaaUTBXzgmHej52yZc5W5RVMWBdcM_33lACdHFZyPpgBuAw624TDA%3D%3D)**
---
---
Now, more than ever, we need your support to combat the onslaught of attacks and misinformation. The DC Democrats are prepared to spend over $100 million to keep Sherrod Brown in the Senate. While we don’t need to match their exorbitant spending dollar-for-dollar, we do need your help to fight back. **[Please contribute to Bernie Moreno’s campaign today!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=68e389f631734dcab1e3d089ad1fd9e1&_e=Ko6pKYpTHIZYc-6jYhA5TN_7vENP0NGcsB_CYiUURdf5-u37IA4mYoXYBinVwHat9UrWk6EQb42c1AmtLkpLKsGnymVy0iDDyY7L3H9hBYxr1a09TwLZFY3T0zjyixTFY9of3BtvtBjKWLcBZhtL8wAjXpk2CaDmRuSkSTJMcRZ_voWoH3kKUxiN-OKucbJEBkK4FHkq6bfISdVNvK35aHNYEat0A_B5jLVFxoNJGuT_LSJSX3j_oHBbcKwjH8Z66EBpu7wTg2J3BpwQ_m2jXQ%3D%3D)** Senate Conservatives Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution to his campaign. And since candidates are guaranteed the lowest media rates, your contribution to Bernie Moreno’s Senate campaign can buy three times the advertising as the same amount spent by Chuck Schumer’s super PAC. _**Supporting Bernie Moreno through SCF is the best way to help him fight back and win.**_ We have also created a powerful new tool that allows you to set up a monthly contribution to Bernie Moreno’s campaign and schedule it to end on Election Day automatically. This will give him the sustaining support he needs to get his conservative message out.
---
---
**[**Please sponsor Bernie Moreno with a monthly contribution today!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=68e389f631734dcab1e3d089ad1fd9e1&_e=Ko6pKYpTHIZYc-6jYhA5TN_7vENP0NGcsB_CYiUURdf5-u37IA4mYoXYBinVwHat9UrWk6EQb42c1AmtLkpLKsGnymVy0iDDyY7L3H9hBYxea7366V8HPX1cvvLPmlDrvwoFuppU8jlFHse-2Ktx4QPHqrn8xd-7BTMQaa_m-yldTYXHEnRcd1Xy4mjMwlkXSz1mcJRokfj3mECCpqgy-_orhclP6xwDzpMIJaxPNOV08iMsbSQJtmqQy8ZenjCrZNAWnVAGUdF8z3QE4Yhmqw%3D%3D)** Even a $5 contribution will make a significant impact in our efforts to flip this seat, retire a liberal career politician, and establish conservative leadership in the Senate. Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senate Conservatives Fund P.S. Please sponsor Bernie Moreno with a monthly contribution that gives him the sustaining support he needs to win!
---
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH** **COUNTDOWN**
---
|
---
---
|
---
[**DONATE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=68e389f631734dcab1e3d089ad1fd9e1&_e=Ko6pKYpTHIZYc-6jYhA5TN_7vENP0NGcsB_CYiUURdf5-u37IA4mYoXYBinVwHat9UrWk6EQb42c1AmtLkpLKsGnymVy0iDDyY7L3H9hBYwvaNi1QByUVFNDB04PL-h5aaaDAqmDccZlDEecZAF9243NMENNmkOcgUU_x4fJPXdzeqG59GLmeSn6bBBrkIUgi1wStkql_cGb0mPJKkEjhCcWwrMQzt1cm-ycOfYT59BWsCLSXhCX1Xqn5u_S7OnaAYjTJ_ElzwF6u-krstSJ2Q%3D%3D)

SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. clean_body: As voters cast their ballots in these remaining 3 days, all they’re seeing are TV ads from extremists trying to buy this seat and keep OR-05 under MAGA control. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | This is urgent: A Republican super PAC just swooped in with a massive $466,000 TV ad buy in a shameful attempt to stop Janelle Bynum from winning the Democratic nomination in Oregon’s 5th District. | | You read that right, Peter. Republicans are so afraid of having Janelle face MAGA Republican Lori Chevez-DeRemer that they’re willing to do whatever it takes to block her from becoming the Democratic nominee – including trying to meddle with her election. But here’s what this means: As Oregon voters cast their ballots in these remaining 2 days, all they’re seeing are TV ads from extremists trying to buy this seat and keep OR-05 under MAGA control. Janelle is the only Democrat who can flip this TOSS UP seat from red-to-blue in November, so fighting back has never been more important. And with 3 days to go, it’s now or never. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Janelle Bynum and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | – The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Get the truth about illegal immigration
body:
I’m sure you agree – our open southern border is a huge problem.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=02f984ce0a324f8d89e9512ba03cff2c&_t=iBkm6RApH0tsvr2nEkD0DnjohhuBDL_Jes1V8JGH8x6hdeuAJzXSa58fSAlcGAnd4_-mT7cyFlmB76xsHwOaP2HN-lWm6XCumVotEhaOQhs%3D)_

| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm sure you agree - our open southern border is a huge problem.

Patriots like you should be equipped with the facts and figures on just how much damage illegal immigration does to our country.

**That 's why my team put together this free eBook called _The Real Costs of America 's Border Crisis_.**
---
|
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=02f984ce0a324f8d89e9512ba03cff2c&_e=sh77rSMSXN1YwJWecisMuGCjnmqRJ4aT79mM3CDGj9r7IzDZfimKSSE9WCp4tj3ge8iPBFNM00VMlWjz_cP2q-sYGz_EqQGKFORMNvoOhzkfN4hHBqdFzT5yQ4TxlHbSzc-9xchbs2yVdLQYlDHYMOHO8uP0syAFn3vQTj-j5lY3oz3uJn9aIc0Sjn0WQ5ZmAeaTnFho7NNjhl3UDC3AFtf0hlmBiC6O5j2Eo3fvSMu7qBfaTE9WWW3JDYvZD2_-wqRvkUn-Xl1rNubQUlNedPWH7fN31Pa_rrIMJyKmMdGKLOypAJmdIu6gqWXlhnkqBD4GTdGWDR71duzuYA2BfQI4trjNICC9DtVZI3sYyd8XTMFMxVTH9BLBvVm8H2uN)

| | This free resource details the concrete costs to America's economy, education system, and society thanks to mass illegal immigration, not to mention the death of American citizens we've seen in the news lately.

It also provides policy solutions to these issues from Heritage Foundation experts. We promote these solutions everyday thanks to our members.

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/the-real-costs-of-americas-border-crisis/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=02f984ce0a324f8d89e9512ba03cff2c&_e=sh77rSMSXN1YwJWecisMuGCjnmqRJ4aT79mM3CDGj9r7IzDZfimKSSE9WCp4tj3ge8iPBFNM00VMlWjz_cP2q-sYGz_EqQGKFORMNvoOhzkfN4hHBqdFzT5yQ4TxlHbSzc-9xchbs2yVdLQYlDHYMOHO8uP0syAFn3vQTj-j5lY3oz3uJn9aIc0Sjn0WQ5ZmAeaTnFho7NNjhl3UDC3AFtf0hlmBiC6O5j2Eo3fvSMvt07aeV1sPDvDWL8Y5LkzKezSKsdOqxsTCerGkxdxq9p7zTTHGazEjlB_kko9XrVMLbdJs391Ju6ED9zCtcIN5ilP2hz59rHgAwizaJZwTsG58qcDBcHr3xS168eakUBgEbkfRn6hSx8yJs7Om5BhC)

When leftists that you know try to dismiss the costs of illegal immigration, I hope this resource provides the intellectual ammunition needed to prove just how bad illegal immigration is for our country.

**Please download your free copy of _The Real Costs of America 's Border Crisis_ using this secure link right now: [https://secured.heritage.org/the-real-costs-of-americas-border-crisis/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=02f984ce0a324f8d89e9512ba03cff2c&_e=sh77rSMSXN1YwJWecisMuGCjnmqRJ4aT79mM3CDGj9r7IzDZfimKSSE9WCp4tj3ge8iPBFNM00VMlWjz_cP2q-sYGz_EqQGKFORMNvoOhzkfN4hHBqdFzT5yQ4TxlHbSzc-9xchbs2yVdLQYlDHYMOHO8uP0syAFn3vQTj-j5lY3oz3uJn9aIc0Sjn0WQ5ZmAeaTnFho7NNjhl3UDC3AFtf0hlmBiC6O5j2Eo3fvSMuCEs7irpRpVd3ChXKhET3A8p8CKu0O85FxvPdftG_XYNQme2fCDh5b_PbOCp-Oa-YV4tOzW0be0DXZR8cJRQizkru2rdDbHku0TnsSMNvTML-TeYYNjI0rSh1rgQ162xy4BKzdnCwzkObjtj0qYEnu)**

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Fellow American, I'm sure you agree - our open southern border is a huge problem. Patriots like you should be equipped with the facts and figures on just how much damage illegal immigration does to our country. That 's why my team put together this free eBook called The Real Costs of America 's Border Crisis. | | | This free resource details the concrete costs to America's economy, education system, and society thanks to mass illegal immigration, not to mention the death of American citizens we've seen in the news lately. It also provides policy solutions to these issues from Heritage Foundation experts. We promote these solutions everyday thanks to our members. You can download your free copy using the secure link below. When leftists that you know try to dismiss the costs of illegal immigration, I hope this resource provides the intellectual ammunition needed to prove just how bad illegal immigration is for our country. Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

clean_body: Just $5 or $15 | | Y’all, we need every last committed Democratic supporter to read this message. Please don’t click away. Consider the values we share: a commitment to democracy, the freedom to decide when and how to have a family, equality no matter who you are or who you love, and more. And consider how extremist Republicans like Marsha Blackburn are determined to strip our most fundamental rights away. The fight to uphold reproductive freedom, voting rights, and our democracy depends on holding our Democratic Senate majority, but with critical seats leaning Republican, Democrats MUST expand the map. We have to defeat Marsha Blackburn here in Tennessee and send Gloria Johnson to Washington to deliver for us. If everyone reading this gave $5 right now, we’d be on track to exceed our April projections and put us in a position to WIN. Are you with us in the fight to hold our Senate majority and DEFEAT Republicans’ attacks on our rights? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for all you do. I need to know you’re with me. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0efe79d93e3d4274bafde75be74cafb1&_e=W7AGhiDZyDGe-RAsy1ARkJ5WX01wrbXVrPKILfYLAIwua4NqAddaKK7SyQOJr5jL_6-_EwCSfmCgRCrBubB4HBnOhBjPQvcAouAh0TJ519u_XpD1iriMV_9YBOFHF8i0TZmEjZvN3JYyLReAAp-6kSOKTnZ2UoJRyR9V21pk5ofXe3rWdD8mb5U5KHNvAzQILN4atgMr2Q74B9DZAWUi40eAwGvlXOTREqY3uaEKiyP7LoQoWhRxbVF-Asy3OotoqcxeVme3A13B6l2OObUXk_Ev-QgZzzH5x6B8-nu2H98mx1Dik8ubarO0BDNJFqjJLfMAYMFM_zBVc3dhnHK_SEnMJJwWTHeeksTX4NScWJ1Tuzb-y2yIGqlWm5sXHBh0crIQpP7B6yWQ7AR4jKJbFVmUbpAwQc8UO1cv3CUE07A%3D)

Peter,

Today, State Delegates will officially nominate a Republican candidate to take on career politician Tammy Baldwin.

Wisconsinites are sick and tired of the mess Tammy Baldwin and Joe Biden have gotten us into. On their watch, Wisconsin families are reeling from crushing inflation, we have a crisis at our southern border, and our country is less safe.

We simply can’t afford career politicians who just nod along with the DC crowd and get nothing done. It’s time to retire Tammy Baldwin and send a real problem solver to Washington.

That’s why I got into this race - and that’s why I need your support. I’ve set a really aggressive goal for our grassroots supporters on convention weekend. **We're looking for 10,000 folks who are sick of the way things are going in Washington to step up.**

[**It doesn’t matter if you give $5 or $100 -- every person who joins me today is sending a clear message to Tammy and Joe -- _we’re ready for an outsider._**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0efe79d93e3d4274bafde75be74cafb1&_e=W7AGhiDZyDGe-RAsy1ARkJ5WX01wrbXVrPKILfYLAIwua4NqAddaKK7SyQOJr5jL_6-_EwCSfmCgRCrBubB4HBnOhBjPQvcAouAh0TJ519u_XpD1iriMV_9YBOFHF8i0TZmEjZvN3JYyLReAAp-6kSOKTnZ2UoJRyR9V21pk5ofXe3rWdD8mb5U5KHNvAzQILN4atgMr2Q74B9DZAWUi40eAwGvlXOTREqY3uaEKiyP7LoQoWhRxbVF-Asy3OotoqcxeVme3A13B6l2OObUXk7p3M9geQUL5kaRwhpx_s7BAl_9fp8CPHc2ZFRhwrsj0lgjXl_nZ23HoULjpynsIkMG9XpVyFrD_1xYeIevXdbiUwvolg1g3v-oDmVWqz_EMB91_8VnPUPikSCurgucWExjO5JJ3L2BoYuREf5aLf38%3D)

We’ve done a lot of work leading up to the State Convention, but I cannot do this without you.

[**Please, before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, will you help us reach this Convention weekend goal?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0efe79d93e3d4274bafde75be74cafb1&_e=W7AGhiDZyDGe-RAsy1ARkJ5WX01wrbXVrPKILfYLAIwua4NqAddaKK7SyQOJr5jL_6-_EwCSfmCgRCrBubB4HBnOhBjPQvcAouAh0TJ519u_XpD1iriMV_9YBOFHF8i0TZmEjZvN3JYyLReAAp-6kSOKTnZ2UoJRyR9V21pk5ofXe3rWdD8mb5U5KHNvAzQILN4atgMr2Q74B9DZAWUi40eAwGvlXOTREqY3uaEKiyP7LoQoWhRxbVF-Asy3OotoqcxeVme3A13B6l2OObUXkwkQF7WPtAus5DKZXMzlrQu-bBPBJvY5_CuQyxtRYk-q8wcDGZUcbz5sww-MRoGNg1E4CmiHF0_7xTyKm-KvlkfSS-eenmuZd1vWY7_0nl_aL8d78cdSyJVnjQHaGkO_JkMuqJaYLVglRdCkRYoyzH8%3D)

Sincerely,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0efe79d93e3d4274bafde75be74cafb1&_e=W7AGhiDZyDGe-RAsy1ARkJ5WX01wrbXVrPKILfYLAIwua4NqAddaKK7SyQOJr5jL_6-_EwCSfmCgRCrBubB4HBnOhBjPQvcAouAh0TJ519u_XpD1iriMV_9YBOFHF8i0TZmEjZvN3JYyLReAAp-6kSOKTnZ2UoJRyR9V21pk5ofXe3rWdD8mb5U5KHNvAzQILN4atgMr2Q74B9DZAWUi40eAwGvlXOTREqY3uaEKiyP7LoQoWhRxbVF-Asy3OotoqcxeVme3A13B6l2OObUXk-gb6rZwxqDSYBIydLwhyksMIjxF_Mzg7ibrOv8RdvrDaoy7z8Gwr0SlWBlcgf1J0ZZ-0UUNayk5-_4KJ7Ao31hLnwznGs2Cud_QXZUW301Gd95gm05u2zApXzDOw0kpXO-8yFORpfUoJ7O8fUlCjUM%3D)

| **MEET ERIC**

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children.

I need to know you’re with me. | Peter, Today, State Delegates will officially nominate a Republican candidate to take on career politician Tammy Baldwin. Wisconsinites are sick and tired of the mess Tammy Baldwin and Joe Biden have gotten us into. On their watch, Wisconsin families are reeling from crushing inflation, we have a crisis at our southern border, and our country is less safe. We simply can’t afford career politicians who just nod along with the DC crowd and get nothing done. It’s time to retire Tammy Baldwin and send a real problem solver to Washington. That’s why I got into this race - and that’s why I need your support. I’ve set a really aggressive goal for our grassroots supporters on convention weekend. We're looking for 10,000 folks who are sick of the way things are going in Washington to step up. We’ve done a lot of work leading up to the State Convention, but I cannot do this without you. Sincerely, Eric Hovde Republican for U.S. Senate | | MEET ERIC Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others. When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin

name: Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
subject: Why are Americans not alarmed by this?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Fellow
American,

It's
nearly election season. We hear promises from both sides of the
aisle and commitments made to causes the American people rarely
agree on.

Surprisingly, however, 7 in 10 Americans agree on this one thing:

Across
our nation, unborn babies should be protected by at least the
point when they can feel pain. The latest science proves that
unborn babies can feel pain by as early as 15 weeks.

72% of
voters agree on this issue but the American people are still
being bombarded with lies and misinformation from Big Abortion
and its allies. These "pro-choice" organizations are committed to
using misleading information to manipulate women and destroy
innocent children for their own gain in this billion-dollar
industry.

In their
own materials, Planned Parenthood states abortion is "one of the
safest medical procedures performed in the United States" and
"abortion has over a 99 percent safety record."

But how
can this be true when a child's life is snatched from its
mother's womb because it's purposefully put to death? Who is
telling the American people the truth here?

What do
you think about this?

My team
and I would love to know your opinion about abortion in America.
We want to know your answers to questions like these:

Do you
believe life begins at conception?

Do you
believe abortion is harmful to women?

Do you
believe that unborn babies have a right to life?

We want
to hear what the American people think and invite you to take our
Abortion in America Survey so we know where you stand.

Take the
survey today and let us know if the majority of Americans are
being lied to by a deadly industry. Help us find the truth by
taking the survey today at the link below. We really want to get
10,000 responses from people just like you!
http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/ct/63188372:WWQNWQWTN:m:3:2647771560:B45CA24EB9233447B984332BCBB84067:r

For LIFE,
Marjorie
Dannenfelser

President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B.
Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S.
Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box
803

Arlington, VA, 22206

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights
Reserved.

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Peter, can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Together we can make a difference.

|
---
| | | | [**Together we can make a difference.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=2)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
As I continue to make a strong showing in the polls, the other Presidential candidates are growing very nervous. In response, the other candidates either lash out at me with wild claims or coordinate with their _partners_ in social media to censor me and shadow ban me.
The other candidates know if I have equal access to the digital public square and gain ballot access in all 50 states, _I will be the candidate to beat_.
As I gain ballot access in more and more states – _like Texas just announced_ – the other candidates are using every trick in the book to stop me. But thanks to my supporters, the tricks aren’t working.
Why are they growing more and more worried?
Because I am running a campaign of ideas. It is a campaign based on the values that made us a great nation. My campaign embodies the ideals and the highest values of our nation and our people.
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=5)
---
I have a very clear notion of what this country is supposed to look like.The world still looks to us for leadership. They don’t want a bully or a braggart – they want a leader. And they know the difference.
As President, America will be a moral authority again. We will stop projecting military power abroad and protect and advance economic power at home.
As President, we will rebuild our industrial base and our middle class, the backbone of our country. The entrepreneurial spirit that built our great nation will return and be rewarded under my Presidency.
This is what the American people are longing for and why I am climbing in the polls... _also why the other candidates are growing increasingly worried_.
The election is a mere six months away and we need your support to continue to build on our momentum and get our message out to every American.
I can win this election [but I need your help and support](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=6). Please donate what you can, be it $5 or $10 or even if it’s the change found in your couch cushions.
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=7)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=50&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=8)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=9)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_can_win_5_19_24_un_nd1&n=10)
---

Together we can make a difference.

Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!
body:
Help ensure fair elections by testifying in support of the bill. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=47abbeb1f8&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**
[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=15227857fe&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| | | **
OHIO ELECTION INTEGRITY!
HB 472! • CALL TO ACTION!
REQUEST FOR TESTIMONY!
IT'S EASY! • WE SHOW YOU HOW!**

---
|
Members of the Ohio Election Integrity Network (OEIN) have been working almost non-stop for months on election integrity legislation that has recently been introduced in the Ohio House of Representatives as HB 472. You can find information on the bill [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f84fafd96f&e=5c740fa3e2).

We covered this is a prior GFI email you can find****[**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=307df55e17&e=5c740fa3e2). In that prior email we asked you to hold off on making contact with your representatives in Columbus.

**IT'S NOW TIME TO ACT, AND ACT FAST!**

OEIN & the OEIN legislative team need your help by providing "proponent testimony". It can be written, you don't necessarily need to testify in the upcoming proponent committee hearing (but you're welcome to do so!).

To view the very simple, step-by-step instructions on what's required, go [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=58e1203800&e=5c740fa3e2) or click on the image below. EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW IS ON THE HOMEPAGE AT:

[**https://www.ohio4truth.com/**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=be17bb4705&e=5c740fa3e2)

**YOUR HELP IS NEEDED IMMEDIATELY! PLEASE DON'T DELAY!**

If you have any questions, please contact **Mark Pukita** at **614-499-0599 (c)** by text or call. I will put you in touch with the right people to answer your questions.

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0c9baec33b&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**PARENTS! LEARN ABOUT & JOIN
"MOMS FOR LIBERTY"
IN OHIO! **

---
|
Are you tired of feeling like you’re alone in your concerns for the future of your children?

Do you try to speak to community leaders about your concerns and your voice goes unheard?

There is power in numbers and Moms for Liberty (M4L) is putting up the numbers! The purpose of Moms for Liberty is to fight for the survival of America by unifying, educating, and empowering parents. Moms for Liberty are Moms, Dads, Grandparents, Aunts, Uncles, and Friends joined together to stand up for parental rights at all levels of government.

Moms for Liberty is a boots-on-the-ground organization. Join them and you'll be asked to show up to school board meetings, speak out in public gatherings, and do whatever it takes to stand up for our children. Our voices need to be heard and change will only happen through taking action!

Find and join a chapter today! Moms for Liberty Chapters: [https://www.momsforliberty.org/chapters/](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d2afbe7438&e=5c740fa3e2)

If you do not see your county listed, consider starting one! [https://www.momsforliberty.org/start-a-chapter/](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4288191910&e=5c740fa3e2)

If you have any questions on joining or starting a chapter, contact Ohio M4L Ambassador Sarah Simon with any questions: [sarah@momsforliberty.org](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=68dcccea9f&e=5c740fa3e2)

THANK YOU!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9de8c50557&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**WE HAVE A SOCIAL MEDIA ARMY!
WE NEED MORE SOCIAL MEDIA SOLDIERS!
SIGN-UP TODAY!**

---
|
GFI is helping to build a social media powerhouse espousing self-governance in Ohio. We are building a world-class, social media team who develop messaging and messages, post original content developed by the team, and amplify, through sharing, the "reach" of our messages. This is becoming a well-organized, well-managed, team of volunteers working to get out our messages of freedom, small government, self-responsibility, sanctity of life, and constitutional order, to name a few.

To join our team, please go [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9c0a5e951f&e=5c740fa3e2) (or click on the image below) and fill out the quick survey. Someone will be back to you soon!

THANK YOU!

subject: Hovde’s dark money allies just got caught in a lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
🚨 BREAKING: A dark money group supporting Eric Hovde was caught lying on
the air about Tammy’s record 🚨

This month, Restoration PAC — a right-wing dark money group supporting
Eric Hovde — launched a $3 million ad buy attacking Tammy and blatantly
lying about her record. Then, cable providers across Wisconsin forced
Hovde’s allies to take down their egregious attack ad after it was proven
false.

This kind of thing doesn’t happen very often,
Derek. But it speaks
volumes about how low Tammy’s Republican opponent and his dark money
allies are willing to go to flip this Senate seat red.

There’s no doubt in our minds that another misleading attack ad is in the
works, so we’re counting on you to help us respond and set the record
straight.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/te-baldwinsplit-may24?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20240503_FR_EOM_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_EOM1.7& ]Derek,
please split a donation between Tony
Evers and Tammy Baldwin to help us fight back against the GOP’s misleading
attacks and lies and make sure Wisconsin voters know the truth about
Tammy’s strong record in the U.S. Senate.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.
