name: Team Debbie for FL
subject: hypocrisy and self-serving extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Rick Scott loves getting his photo taken...
| | |
---
Listen, Rick Scott doesn't care much about doing his job. But he _loves_ getting his photo taken.
And whenever Rick Scott gets his moment in the limelight — photo ops, interviews, or attack ads — he makes sure to wear his Navy hat. He wants us to think of him as a selfless, honest senator who cares about Florida families. **But that couldn't be further from the truth. **
**_Rick Scott is nothing more than a self-serving fraud._** He doesn't care about our service members or any of the families that he serves. And despite his efforts to hide this, his record speaks for itself.
**Rick Scott made his MASSIVE fortune while his company defrauded the health insurance provider for _millions_ of active duty service members, veterans, and their families. **He resigned from his role, walked away with virtually no consequences, and used the mega-fortune he made to jumpstart his political career.
It's a story that we see again and again throughout his career. ** Rick Scott's time in office is defined by hypocrisy and self-serving extremism. **
He _claims_ to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. He _claims_ to be a proud American, but he undermined our democracy by refusing to certify the 2020 election results even after the insurrection. **He _claims_ to be a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, he only serves himself. **
**In 2024, we have the chance to defeat him: Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is fighting to flip this seat blue, and polling shows this race is already a tie![But Rick Scott is ready to shell out millions to retake the lead, so Debbie needs grassroots donors like you to stand with her. Please, rush $5 or more before 11:59 p.m. tonight to help her defeat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85252610/474156249/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1263-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjAyMzk3YjQtMGIxNi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0hEamIs1WSHcCLgiac1E2HCxEiYkNYwY7WXYcf3sTJg=)**

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

He claims to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. He claims to be a proud American, but he undermined our democracy by refusing to certify the 2020 election results even after the insurrection. He claims to be a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, he only serves himself. In 2024, we have the chance to defeat him: Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is fighting to flip this seat blue, and polling shows this race is already a tie If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85252785/474156774/1037833720?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-05-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTExMmE2YWYtMGMxNi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jC7Y3U2V4G5t8Q6_kucnsuNLS6ztcI5PKC6PcZzaRQQ=)

| Peter,

We know the 2025 election seems far off, so I wanted to give you an insider’s look at what we’re up to and why your early investment in our campaign matters.

In 2021, the Virginia Governor’s race was a total toss-up — even up until Election Day, and ultimately the Republican won.

We’re again preparing for a close toss-up race in 2025, and we have to win this one!

**The good news? We know how to win close, toss-up races!** Every cycle, VA-07 has been one of the closest races in the country. Our wins in 2018, 2020, and 2022 were made possible by the intense work our team and our supporters have done from day one.

We know how to win in Virginia because we’ve done it before. Leading up to November 2025, we’ll be reaching out to voters to discuss the work I’ve done in Congress—from lowering drug prices to expanding high-speed broadband internet access—and focusing on the work I will do as Governor.

We’re building our campaign team early, so we’re ready to hit the ground running before the cycle is in full swing. And we’ll be investing in advertising to speak the truth to Republican attacks.

The only reason we’re able to begin these important preparations is because of early investment from supporters like you. subject: Biden Logic: drug cartels > American citizens

body:
| [ ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=d8221f4153b947a79a0e9058bd677ced&_e=WP7LH-KMphsRCKDd6nMwNd6GoA2YTFJ9nfOBubJbITQKbF77Jw-rjMiySG548CgmbQ-mNsUNs_xtFRSdJWcqds9CJHaakpifotsOgHPSp0gnEP3KxmX10M5tVg9VFba8g2Tk8KnYj8wLUb1oUpLcmpFT-Y08QJH8oNROS5IAHOr-HzjPI3ravAA77tsU5kDZDinCQzaxTGFD6Ve4mz-pRaaOnoZEFVrjafpSNpLjzBiJCyfX2356svF8Tif7TWSfxHbt2X7QaYmCstKJMBpLK5ojq6o8UiRneXLjT38jQAf7Ao-5cihlPE_SEPy-81uOeBQYGrV6EyQGXb1vjGxPLw%3D%3D)

Listen.

The Biden Administration is doing everything they can to maintain an open border. Our border crisis in America is not for lack of conservatives trying time and time again to put an end to illegal crossings, drugs and crime pouring in, and a burden on state economies. Rather than standing up to protect our nation, Biden officials are patting migrants on the back and propelling them into our communities.

**_It 's critical to understand that not only did Biden create this crisis with his executive orders, but he is doing everything he can to continue it. _**

**Border states put up their own barriers, and the Biden Administration sues.

States also passed their own laws to deport illegal crossers.

Again, the Biden Administration sued.

The Biden Administration also went to court to end Title 42, which limited crossings.

** Joe Biden has fought every legislative & legal attempt to end this crisis. He's putting DRUG CARTELS ahead of AMERICAN CITIZENS. We have the chance to fight back against our depraved leaders in Washington this November and reinstate a conservative, America First leader in the White House and in seats across the country. The responsibility to secure the border falls on us TODAY.

**[If you support closing the border and ending our national crisis, click here to show your support.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=d8221f4153b947a79a0e9058bd677ced&_e=WP7LH-KMphsRCKDd6nMwNd6GoA2YTFJ9nfOBubJbITQKbF77Jw-rjMiySG548CgmbQ-mNsUNs_xtFRSdJWcqds9CJHaakpifotsOgHPSp0gnEP3KxmX10M5tVg9VFba8g2Tk8KnYj8wLUb1oUpLcmpFT-Y08QJH8oNROS5IAHOr-HzjPI3ravAA77tsU5kDZaBQzSfQCsa04Wv6lou13rd37ESZohNZY5HoAUkqQg6R8gEkw0ykwJubfC-1y-STp-CgioyWpCAXevzPSAx3od7vfFynffYUD4M77YaV7Zuuzztsg3tih4jfN3wsCWfFNTkLZ5bb9vtKmSfTmCmVd6g%3D%3D)**

- Nicole Malliotakis

body:

---
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make your first contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important. Here's the truth: May is an FEC fundraising deadline month. This means that at the end of the month we will be required to report how much money we've raised and how many donations we've received. Everyone will be watching -- the press, our opponents, and even supporters will be waiting to see the strength of our campaign. We've received a huge number of individual donations so far -- people of all backgrounds and from all communities. It's a big part of how we've been able to withstand the millions and millions of dollars Republicans are spending on attack ads. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. Because this is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election yet. [Can President Biden count on you to contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today? clean_body: Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important. | | | In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make your first contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important. Here's the truth: May is an FEC fundraising deadline month. This means that at the end of the month we will be required to report how much money we've raised and how many donations we've received. Everyone will be watching -- the press, our opponents, and even supporters will be waiting to see the strength of our campaign. We've received a huge number of individual donations so far -- people of all backgrounds and from all communities. It's a big part of how we've been able to withstand the millions and millions of dollars Republicans are spending on attack ads. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. Because this is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election yet. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. name: Defending our Military
subject: Joe Biden’s biggest blunders
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Joe Biden is trying to make a mockery of our military.

From teaching our soldiers critical race theory instead of critical thinking, polluting recruits with woke gender ideology, and letting our enemies win in Afghanistan, the Left is leaving our soldiers behind at the risk of national security.

**_Enough is enough._**

**We put together a petition to keep woke OUT of our military, and we need every patriot to sign on.**

body:

Peter,
Last week, we submitted over 11,873 certified signatures to the Secretary of Commonwealth, officially placing John Deaton on the ballot for U.S. Senate. This is the first step in RETIRING Elizabeth Warren.

name: Johnny O
subject: Everyone deserves a shot at success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
Our team is only as strong as our support from on the ground, and I need your help to carry our momentum through November so we can take our fight to Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85255281/474165999/-1004384328?refcode=BLU_EM_JOC_2024-05-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJiNWI3NGUtMTYxNi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RoEwZJkBZRhZOqnVEanPja8asA_HZRZ5XtV0_71ZWjI=)

| I decided to run for Congress because I believe in the promise of America. which has allowed me to become the first in my family to graduate college and become a public school teacher. Education unlocked the potential in my life, and I believe that every child deserves that same opportunity.

**No matter who you are or where you come from, everyone deserves a shot at success!**

During my time in the state legislature and serving as Baltimore County Executive, I’ve had the privilege to work alongside so many of you to increase wages for hard-working families, create more affordable housing opportunities, improve government transparency, and work to keep our communities safe.

We’ve accomplished all of this and more by engaging with and empowering the communities we serve and working with anyone who wants to contribute to building a better future for all. I’m taking all of those lessons I’ve learned with me to Congress to continue delivering for our communities.

Our team is only as strong as our support from on the ground, and I need your help to carry our momentum through November so we can take our fight to Congress. name: Andrea Salinas HQ
subject: can you answer just ONE question to help us plan our GOTV operation?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85255294/474166068/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWY0ODliZi0xNjE2LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJAm0bcn5JWQncG6q19po-P8wP9yP3zfse7gsO6sZdw=) Andrea’s district is one of the most competitive in the entire country — which means that to win, we can’t afford for ANY of our voters to stay home. So we’re getting started now on building out our GOTV operation. As we do that, we’re gathering some information on how our supporters prefer to cast their ballots: by mailing them, by dropping them at a drop box, or by voting in person. Knowing this is extremely useful to us to ensure we’re getting the right information to the right people, at the right time. clean_body: = Andrea’s district is one of the most competitive in the entire country — which means that to win, we can’t afford for ANY of our voters to stay home. So we’re getting started now on building out our GOTV operation. As we do that, we’re gathering some information on how our supporters prefer to cast their ballots: by mailing them, by dropping them at a drop box, or by voting in person. Knowing this is extremely useful to us to ensure we’re getting the right information to the right people, at the right time. | | | | | We’re proud that Oregon has one of the safest, most secure, and most reliable voting systems in the country. But it’s our job to make sure people actually use it — and that every single one of our supporters has a plan to cast their ballot for Andrea. subject: Progressives want to change the way we elect our president
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president.

| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=6b52263ea26e4b37a4280aaa8d8b0bb7&_t=TMVN8P_vTIpA8pe-JFivYHppCzpQQyMzG0ASP9s-3sDwBdH7AlSFpyDLn13j8H-mA0UkfdyMDsSuOfjYeP6EqmE8V1LaV9OoMnt1V8TSwiY%3D)_

| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6b52263ea26e4b37a4280aaa8d8b0bb7&_e=13tXLtYCKBGIEIY7qu-ktaNWkmmxOTA0Aw8SA0SFRNqBsSxXGA7LUV-h03tOU0qM5ak8BuYWeaKjgvLDZgwUofJX0nl6WAXiOpcR3w7Btln0yHASwESXON_QNMU1YKgMmmW6wH4JDEb0p5KNosE4XfW-gb61Gnxk90M_c_0yDQ2FeysbP2l4qR6Bo1QZ7rMD4XjGexUQduQ-Y_FNshgbeedEjoYSj76-j0XeeNe-WpXbqdh5zGP3cUhly1EmPp7YdrXV0JB_v0AWL3I5iixJ_gooHe493qVSLDfkL9Om0M02kqGDbnoyie2pNJ9yL3B1wHBUdwOlNDQw_jA6NjHJ9N0gAYddWfdiLH0UqFvAjxoRQbPlEsVbqq9nDKOmtnIyE4138P9KXbI6YQFWXhqFU4_mCYh63m5-sF8WX87_OMY%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6b52263ea26e4b37a4280aaa8d8b0bb7&_e=13tXLtYCKBGIEIY7qu-ktaNWkmmxOTA0Aw8SA0SFRNqBsSxXGA7LUV-h03tOU0qM5ak8BuYWeaKjgvLDZgwUofJX0nl6WAXiOpcR3w7Btln0yHASwESXON_QNMU1YKgMmmW6wH4JDEb0p5KNosE4XfW-gb61Gnxk90M_c_0yDQ2FeysbP2l4qR6Bo1QZ7rMD4XjGexUQduQ-Y_FNshgbeedEjoYSj76-j0XeeNe-WpXbqdh5zGP3cUhly1EmPp7Y4J0GeFBScVpY_6GfXKTElUoDmSX59LcEYtodHgiO-Sc95VE4Rt_MyJXNDYunYKW2eeD4UwLkxse4uOvDodX_WQTnpLWcYVh0Yp-livUcJI7xU-MHsOa0QLJ4lUO_V-P7o8QI8AxN5FTFuKjVUL-uRfxuOam2pofGGNa2s4o_ZNc%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6b52263ea26e4b37a4280aaa8d8b0bb7&_e=13tXLtYCKBGIEIY7qu-ktaNWkmmxOTA0Aw8SA0SFRNqBsSxXGA7LUV-h03tOU0qM5ak8BuYWeaKjgvLDZgwUofJX0nl6WAXiOpcR3w7Btln0yHASwESXON_QNMU1YKgMmmW6wH4JDEb0p5KNosE4XfW-gb61Gnxk90M_c_0yDQ2FeysbP2l4qR6Bo1QZ7rMD4XjGexUQduQ-Y_FNshgbeedEjoYSj76-j0XeeNe-WpXbqdh5zGP3cUhly1EmPp7Y1Mt8Ts1oDAUIev_7xzcrs2eguyqjJPI1-1Kxg2THhcUOkLhQw84EPt26eRCxGvW9WQEprPAEecg73Alz8-8Dqjg-FPF6KJCF6thXYFPH-bu9q4D37GhPnSOM1CaHf0L8urTtwNYmHE6uhPTFIE2ST-jBKVWqc6VDGgD-49R6vPc%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 .

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: I went to President Trump’s trial and want to fill you in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | _ Peter, I went to New York to support President Trump at his trial._ _Never has a sitting President actively worked to throw his opponent in jail. It’s the kind of thing you’d expect in communist Cuba - not here in America._ _**
**I’ve stood by President Trump since day one, and that’s not about to stop anytime soon.__**

clean_body: | | | Peter, I went to New York to support President Trump at his trial. Never has a sitting President actively worked to throw his opponent in jail. It’s the kind of thing you’d expect in communist Cuba - not here in America. I’ve stood by President Trump since day one, and that’s not about to stop anytime soon. THIS TRIAL IS A SHAM! THIS IS ELECTION INTERFERENCE! Subject: [Survey] Let Kim hear about your issues
Date: Sat, May 18th, 2024 Team,

**[Before midnight, take our May Priorities Survey and share with Kim what issues you'd like to see her address in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85256174/474169216/241716954?ms=em24_240519_surkik_esrv_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&refcode=em24_240519_surkik_esrv_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&source=em24_240519_surkik_esrv_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240519_surkik_esrv_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ZS7e9skBZvWET2fgL4eCmXja/4rWb8oGgTg+CLalC/XG4m6ubzzcrL2ZK2F2qxV3k5ZV4uUrm1cdWAKYYb9uAVDvgsz6gHwRrOKyV0RsFVLEQ8ZrrCCiCpiFMfStytXUpwIMUbdbOs6oA6QBcHxkz/ywNrKcwLHZ5OztLqa4Pto=&refcode2=09eb825b-1a16-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWViODI1Yi0xYTE2LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbYFV7mUgqpIFxs2U8nEfTxTaAreDh0PUWck2XS5xDM=&emci=7ead30f6-9614-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=09eb825b-1a16-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=15820338)**

clean_body: Our survey closes at midnight Have you taken Kim's survey yet, Peter? Our survey is closing at midnight tonight, and time is running out to share your thoughts on what issues matter to you most. So before it closes, we're asking one more time for you to have your voice heard by Kim. \----------Begin Forwarded Message--------- Sender: Team Schrier Subject: [Survey] Let Kim hear about your issues Date: Sat, May 18th, 2024 Team, Now that Kim has officially filed for reelection, she wanted us to check in with you about what is most important to this grassroots team. Kim knows that the best way to represent your interests in Congress is to ask you directly what you want your leaders to focus on. So our team just launched our new Priorities Survey to learn what's top of mind for you. | Kim's top priority has always been to listen to her constituents and bring their concerns to Washington to be addressed effectively by our government. But that can only happen when each and every supporter lets us know what's on their mind. That's why this survey is so important, team. Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

The NRSC is planning to ramp up grassroots campaign operations in key states over the next several weeks, but we can't take back the Majority without your survey response. name: Adam Schiff
subject: You’ve always had my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team, we’re just hours away from our midnight deadline, and my staff just let me know we’re a bit behind on our goal.

**But you know what I told them?** _I’m not worried, because this grassroots team always has my back._

You supported me as I took on Donald Trump in his first impeachment trial — because just like me, you believe in truth, the promise of our democracy, and in defending our country against authoritarian threats.

You stood up for me when Trump lobbed vicious attacks on me — and you continue to do so every time he tries to smear my character, threatens to jail me, or worse.

You carried me to victory in the California Senate primary because you share my values — and together, we can beat my extremist MAGA opponent, Steve Garvey.

**And I know I can count on you again to carry me and my campaign team over the finish line for our May midnight fundraising deadline.**

[I’ll ask you personally. Can you chip in a split donation of $10 between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to ensure my campaign has the resources we need to win big in November and maintain our Democratic Senate majority?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68344?t=6&akid=14620%2E878179%2Evht3cs) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68345?t=7&akid=14620%2E878179%2Evht3cs)

With gratitude,

Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14620%2E878179%2Evht3cs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14620%2E878179%2Evht3cs).**

And I know I can count on you again to carry me and my campaign team over the finish line for our May midnight fundraising deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | With gratitude, Adam | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. Click here to . | |

name: Sheldon Whitehouse (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: Let’s give Americans the fair shake they deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
_Aloha Peter, this is Mazie. Please read this message from my friend, Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse. He’s running for re-election in Rhode Island and could use our help._
* * *
Peter, [**I’m running for re-election in Rhode Island for the United States Senate.****I’m hoping you’ll split a $10 donation between my campaign and Mazie’s ****– and here’s why.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85256963/474171725/-584728582?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNiODI1MC0xYzE2LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W69Wic1ElCBNwRtFCkX_5OEslcKuBr_tTN5uV41JvqU=) _It’s been clear for a long time that the Supreme Court has a corruption problem._ I recently published a law review article highlighting how this captured Supreme Court often simply makes up false facts to arrive at decisions that ultimately benefit partisan Republican special interests. Take _Citizens United v. FEC_ as an example. Remember when the Federalist Society justices said that all the unlimited political spending they were unleashing would be “transparent”? Well, we’ve seen dark money in politics prove them wrong several billion times over. Our system is designed to leave fact-finding to the lower courts that hear testimony, make credibility determinations, and review evidence. The Supreme Court is then supposed to defer to – and not alter – factual records in its decisions. Think about it: if the Highest Court in the Land makes up phony facts, there is nowhere else the parties can appeal to. The captured Roberts Court has done a lot of this phony fact-finding in big decisions that have fundamentally changed life in America. The Dobbs decision that ended a fundamental freedom for women is another one that was built on made-up history. How are the American people supposed to trust a Court that makes up its own rules to concoct decisions that suit right-wing special interests? [**I won’t give up my fight to improve transparency and accountability at the Supreme Court, but I need your help. Split a contribution today to send me back to the Senate so I can protect American democracy and make sure our Court is giving Americans the fair shake they deserve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85256964/474171726/-584728582?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240519_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNiODI1MC0xYzE2LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W69Wic1ElCBNwRtFCkX_5OEslcKuBr_tTN5uV41JvqU=) Americans deserve a Court that plays by the rules. — Sheldon Whitehouse
Friends of Mazie Hirono
335 Merchant Street
#677
Honolulu, HI 96809
United States **[info@mazieforhawaii.com](mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com)** | **Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
---
**This email was sent to**dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IXX1bOq_HUCaPNAPmQIyCg2?unsubscribedata=gYmUHMCbV4ZMwVrFBJPYi%2FDMKini5KTNrHpSfnzIpeSqQsSa1qHhId386MNo1jbRtuiCWJG8jZRc7o2eZ61pewx%2Bhn1o32uVNU0Ir4Bt2DJKCorXMk69bAg3oDCPcrZLaEZMHPEH0q4sobexS8FrzxYN7N8Vjs1pGvHGpR7WfY%2FBUvZ2q0Zo3pvgAgCPVP2FNveznazZhkI4VvQ2t2%2B8vKCchiNs%2F9jjfH5dwgd39p9QV%2BawCOrt%2BxzWtVznaLJ0PeJ%2BS86Wk7PnJyngWMzXpD58kaMkie12mDtr9iFBg469z9AO9%2BxEoxF%2BuBzwiotohLU9h175abRxd6DBa%2ByNr9SbDRy6sbTUQVpfrnoErj46boCR1gDKTILG%2Bh2FkOx2l5pWQFWvBTgai7AON%2FsZthdTVNWMpSzUnhoyfY5I1bEcS61NMK2BST9%2FtJzPGXbs)**

Montana has already begun sending ballots for the June 4th primary. We’re facing an 18-year incumbent this fall, and we need every single Republican in the state who can vote to cast their ballot in the primary.

We have a list of reliable Republican primary voters we’d like to target with an online ad to be on the lookout for their primary ballots in the mail and return them ASAP.

If you can swing it, **[your $2 will help us ensure every voter who needs a reminder about the June 4th primary receives one](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c9f09aef224741b683e62d3977d068bd&_e=tpg-9yybtc-ct23fGbzHC-8FPE26tmkqs-jasDpdpgCzR-72GFIoIO2L0EsvGLjbJvceBLRxgmbP66cxoiD6SgsOvDuUD0Ib_GTIHr0InfbW31bD0JguRDqzmhGQrd8v3RiZPe3czXPYRgDJA5q-8QT3cK2vxSOeaM7W5NVSqmOIXDbyGk1g42yVgyiVtl5DiQ4OeTLDYEAG4O7BIiusLuGL3fx5nsjfkGQb1YuGuMmcZ5HNj2dswys6Qt5F4to9Vikju_4CGocN_Pe9GU1S5tUcIznkfNIR71ByEPaLwj7h0REE7rIhWP2LWmz6tL1Cfh0bEs48O6eR5b6tov7QGcBfDk2NQDRCg2cupkxCMRrKdM_9Xzj35M2yRlHNqhXs6cWnKK43S9K6QuLKQyRUyg%3D%3D)**.

clean_body: We budgeted $7,500, but that’s no longer enough to reach every voter we must contact before Primary Day. | Fellow Conservative, Montana has already begun sending ballots for the June 4th primary. We’re facing an 18-year incumbent this fall, and we need every single Republican in the state who can vote to cast their ballot in the primary. We have a list of reliable Republican primary voters we’d like to target with an online ad to be on the lookout for their primary ballots in the mail and return them ASAP. We need to find an additional $12,500 to supplement the $7,500 we initially budgeted for this ad campaign. Can you to help our campaign reach the voters we’ve identified? I’ve included a carbon copy of the ad below for your reference. or more donation. If you can swing it, . We must have a good showing on June 4th. Democrats will watch how many folks vote Republican in the primary and use the results to tailor their campaign strategy for the general election. body:
We can’t overstate that this election will determine the fate of abortion access across the country

| | Peter, Across the country, in states with draconian abortion bans, women are forced to risk their lives to get the care they need, and doctors are afraid to give their patients life-saving care under the threat of fees, jail time, or worse. The _LA Times_ recently reported about a woman who miscarried in the lobby restroom of a Texas emergency room as front desk staff refused to admit her. Another learned that her fetus had no heartbeat the day after a security guard turned her away from a Florida hospital. In North Carolina, a woman gave birth in a car after an emergency room couldn’t offer an ultrasound, and her baby died. **_This is the future Kevin Kiley and the rest of the anti-abortion MAGA crowd want for every. Single. American._** We can’t overstate that this election will determine the fate of abortion access across the country, with Trump already bragging that he would support a federal ban if re-elected. It’s our job to vote out anti-abortion extremists like Kevin Kiley across the country and replace them with pro-choice champions like Jessica Morse. **It’s just one part of the puzzle, but an important one. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Your Opinion Needed on Religious Liberty Issues in America
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=7db4cf6d4ac74fe69b421e4eaa81f24c&_t=guSGxLNPowFxn-_d5lxS0ySU2KUN5wrukLQw9YAOijHypcoAHtP1F8KUvK0-0TvmFSRkc6j6Y-ep9lz83_QOJUDobpkirNjl1mYYnKxI32s%3D)_
---
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7db4cf6d4ac74fe69b421e4eaa81f24c&_e=1OhXX10gXQCjNOF8l225rJvDRHRDoSQRhISvZWTXSN3Bxv8NX1is3ewABn6VG0W32gWRVOAkFmevaFTkXzqoSkljI21adSzoigsMtlIhs9TAI12DeBDd1wV9T7ikQs8UM1vOf40RS3n15AmGOsg4lRBM6lhY0R4-RVA8JFii3dtYuPCuKNLpScCT6Oo3juflSucRrFEkSbHx7mSqAy0XfpXKWvtAiLuPdmL-yHTYekqBizeLyKA2Sob94BJ-mcuj_yJZCFmtq0UoUUO_csbr1g8xIQBE2EVmlPdmQScWGUKTkC3ev1KXu0cY9bnlTKlhAsW2pXWVtM9junumfn0V1pkuGx8bfVz8TFXBeIUml0Z0F7jsmk1F9AKXf18sL7nLZGVKULqqp2jEcAhrwVU4XE75H-xVa4GjhmWck9rpXv4%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty_?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7db4cf6d4ac74fe69b421e4eaa81f24c&_e=1OhXX10gXQCjNOF8l225rJvDRHRDoSQRhISvZWTXSN3Bxv8NX1is3ewABn6VG0W32gWRVOAkFmevaFTkXzqoSkljI21adSzoigsMtlIhs9TAI12DeBDd1wV9T7ikQs8UM1vOf40RS3n15AmGOsg4lRBM6lhY0R4-RVA8JFii3dtYuPCuKNLpScCT6Oo3juflSucRrFEkSbHx7mSqAy0XfpXKWvtAiLuPdmL-yHTYekqBizeLyKA2Sob94BJ-mcuj_yJZCFmtq0UoUUO_csbr1m1n-tkms7RpF5Pm69PFlmJH8WZ_IlerjntQbNnwvklvdSWnt5zWyYn0OUSxlQ-jPzd9ehGxJAA6Er3O0pjTYvpC3P036zB2Dd6TnA-3RnlzzWdQ9vEHG62MqhId3A5YVFoKQKzI6QgbnkEH__eJh4I%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values.**

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values,**are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7db4cf6d4ac74fe69b421e4eaa81f24c&_e=1OhXX10gXQCjNOF8l225rJvDRHRDoSQRhISvZWTXSN3Bxv8NX1is3ewABn6VG0W32gWRVOAkFmevaFTkXzqoSkljI21adSzoigsMtlIhs9TAI12DeBDd1wV9T7ikQs8UM1vOf40RS3n15AmGOsg4lRBM6lhY0R4-RVA8JFii3dtYuPCuKNLpScCT6Oo3juflSucRrFEkSbHx7mSqAy0XfpXKWvtAiLuPdmL-yHTYekqBizeLyKA2Sob94BJ-mcuj_yJZCFmtq0UoUUO_csbr1jgsrXwHF1EWBB7I5_EggdIzdZiwxVqkpqH7rNDwMG7Vzy35uwXvW5kTvJlv5rCQ8bafNL6yA2tMbY2YlsqTC1oxUR4sEz5vdWMRjWnTNwLnc7aTgeNsu5Z9xOHRKHUKeckbaiiCtRSEclLEHjcBtDo%3D)

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values,are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. .

body:
This November, we must seize our opportunity in battleground Wisconsin, turning seats red to blue, breaking up the Republican stronghold, and protecting Democratic Gov. Tony Evers’s veto power. | | |
---
| |
---|---
For the first time in _decades_ , Democrats have the chance to build power in Wisconsin and reverse the Republican takeover of the legislature. This is a _huge deal,_ and President Obama is highlighting the importance of this moment: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_VJtfmrgEjjR84h6dasTO7PDR1JQlfGsPOG2-w_K4mAFhMcK9QVCidx7Ct3Abei4GJtd-vFUuU3JFQ-9QcE9A9EhRcVxDJ4JQUSao_zAvwakzjTwqIvKKLlzHGbZS1GdaM6wW2c4WL6Z1wwf4-Xr6rFljc-PJ9g0PlipzJEMpW1hML7q8aUCvNWxtOg4G6HTMkLsFLDsot5Ky1kMHLz-X2bGUJ_S4ju1LTMzHgCe4SQVab218AFU9f6axr2PtnaQQqXZSxk29yrRbCucdETWqemQYWVpWrjMQt_eQ-ac-SnW0ZPcAvap3O8Em54AdCpZ3AkvY28UIAx62o2IDx52-SccWz5dIJBRwNJQ7kVEBbThISh9UZHwIitwkRiXExFxz_c-xVU8xRtESov1yruBwaI8iaJfV622a3ePqmAGDAxCjyfo0s7DnQx_dCB2neEA5gPl7PlOd8W5LVqrdLit9JXbDOW9yI893yDzD8U95kVtwDXUOGjdGc_w5-xgX42LEARJkZUmXr8I5Y0GpNPoajOzYoGoo3YFO5JP1lrWYrymW0VOP1G8js3RbtelAPx1A/46h/tdASoFbHTsKdDAG4wllKcw/h0/h001.WJvJ0hcwWsmxhW9NkkBhOz2r9k41pRy2Zv1P2jjOYzY)
Photo by Adam Schultz for Biden For President on Flickr This November, we _must_ seize our opportunity in battlegrounds like Wisconsin, turn seats red to blue, break up the Republican stronghold, and protect Democratic Gov. Tony Evers’s veto power. **The GOP is willing to do whatever it takes to maintain power in Wisconsin – we’ll need to fight tooth and nail for every win.** Donations from grassroots supporters have powered our candidates to victories in ultra-competitive special elections and laid the foundation for victories this fall. But to compete against extremists in battleground states like Wisconsin, we’re relying on Democrats like you to step up and invest in this fight. clean_body: This November, we must seize our opportunity in battleground Wisconsin, turning seats red to blue, breaking up the Republican stronghold, and protecting Democratic Gov. Tony Evers’s veto power. | | | | | ---|--- For the first time in decades , Democrats have the chance to build power in Wisconsin and reverse the Republican takeover of the legislature. This is a huge deal, and President Obama is highlighting the importance of this moment: Photo by Adam Schultz for Biden For President on Flickr This November, we must seize our opportunity in battlegrounds like Wisconsin, turn seats red to blue, break up the Republican stronghold, and protect Democratic Gov. Tony Evers’s veto power. The GOP is willing to do whatever it takes to maintain power in Wisconsin – we’ll need to fight tooth and nail for every win. Donations from grassroots supporters have powered our candidates to victories in ultra-competitive special elections and laid the foundation for victories this fall. But to compete against extremists in battleground states like Wisconsin, we’re relying on Democrats like you to step up and invest in this fight. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. I know it may seem like a strange question to ask. After all, how much impact can $1 have?

Your donation, no matter how big or small, grows the momentum of this movement, and the power of this campaign. Because this campaign runs on grassroots donors, like you.

It’s not high-dollar donors that fuel these fights or sustain us when the campaign days get long and stressful. **It’s the faith and support from folks like you.**

This fight will be a struggle, friend — MAGA Republicans still have a Majority in the House and are banking on Democratic inaction to expand it.

[**So I'm asking: will you give just $1 to our campaign & help us hit our $500 daily goal? name: John James
subject: What it’s like to lose an election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | **Here’s what it feels like to lose an election. **** ** All of the dreams and the plans you made for the future are shattered overnight. You feel like you’ve let your friends, your family, and your supporters down. You’re angry that you can’t fulfill the promises you made, and you’re devastated that the lies of the Democrat Machine were able to get the best of you. **It’s one of the worst feelings I’ve ever experienced.**

Most people would quit after such a devastating blow.

_But I’m not the kind of person to give up so easily. _
* I didn’t give up when I was at West Point.__
* I didn’t give up when I was going through Ranger School.
* I didn’t give up when I was commanding platoons in Iraq.
* I didn’t give up when I was flying Apache Helicopters in Operation Iraqi Freedom._ _

When you’re in the air, you don’t “give up” on a mission when it gets tough - you power through until you take the enemy down.

**I never gave up on our country then, and I’m not about to give up on Michigan now. **

That’s why I decided to keep fighting and ran again in 2022. This time, we won.

Now, we’re in our toughest race yet, and I need your help.

**The entire House of Representatives could come down to our district, and we could see the DEVASTATION that Democrat control brings if we lose. **
---
[**SUPPORT OUR MISSION**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=283245c331804279a552ec08a9591fda&_e=ZJf4LyFGfSnk20N01AZPbfPPWtOWPMAnOyFql9V3JwUeany9CWGAGbDSrPxpSzupmQ6T4Mk07v5uwLds6ZeIBui44fTCy2U_5rq4TBolaHHjWNxlnxFvicIA3rQGMPkDvf1_Xv02kPbXZomRQhQ1rKnVZHgVhT-ayhsG3Zc7MUtSXaeBRmUggyOtcUEU6YF8ggds7u7shlQCuhfsj3hAr_fPd6s4okESlbwcLNAhCD7sXilRBTChGPtW95d9d7gv1Y-PeEKBiPCSV_4dlot3ULcNEOjYGod9hYy0zRQxgLa_eJ79JMpG4wjiqTUj3QVQuLwFBL7lkQZlZFUs5da2H3mZOnjgHmcfWD5SSKMxiaQ%3D)
---
**I don’t want to have that feeling of losing ever again, and I don’t want to let you down.

[Will you pitch in now and help us WIN and defend our House majority?](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=283245c331804279a552ec08a9591fda&_e=ZJf4LyFGfSnk20N01AZPbfPPWtOWPMAnOyFql9V3JwUeany9CWGAGbDSrPxpSzupmQ6T4Mk07v5uwLds6ZeIBui44fTCy2U_5rq4TBolaHHjWNxlnxFvicIA3rQGMPkDvf1_Xv02kPbXZomRQhQ1rKnVZHgVhT-ayhsG3Zc7MUtSXaeBRmUggyOtcUEU6YF8ggds7u7shlQCuhfsj3hAr8Nkc_ad-0FBurZ1L_MMa9YrKYfwaF_svxEnLMYZF1InF_tsVFVqxkbdi79qNeIuOBq7YFy3ICEiYo_RB1yE1MJSpRL2jXXKw_Kw2CNJV3JQpGeP7y_v2K1I71zGtBbpYhevBnJV9nN4hFFO3jPb3_0%3D)**
---
[**PITCH IN NOW**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=283245c331804279a552ec08a9591fda&_e=ZJf4LyFGfSnk20N01AZPbfPPWtOWPMAnOyFql9V3JwUeany9CWGAGbDSrPxpSzupmQ6T4Mk07v5uwLds6ZeIBui44fTCy2U_5rq4TBolaHHjWNxlnxFvicIA3rQGMPkDvf1_Xv02kPbXZomRQhQ1rKnVZHgVhT-ayhsG3Zc7MUtSXaeBRmUggyOtcUEU6YF8ggds7u7shlQCuhfsj3hArwUVjM2q0wpqSjf7GBJ2fW-r1i2xyDjNlAS4Ugqb2kN9iKJp4JNwPFUn0qkfMYqpAfB05Vlf3Efjg6yN8IihV_cD0cIBqSFiw_ZWYDC_SKr9OY4DUFxVeiRVV56eqp4dkJAAJLrHbxSCeEJg38DfUq0%3D)

subject: Our opponent has spent millions

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2999%2E552475%2E73zAnC)
$5 is about the cost of a hoagie from Wawa or a pack of soft pretzels. $5 is also what we hope you’ll chip in today to keep both the Senate and the White House blue this November.
We cannot sit on the sidelines while our opponent has spent millions to put ads on the airwaves across Pennsylvania.
We need to actively fight back — whether that be increasing our TV ad spending to share Bob Casey’s message, or knocking on doors on the ground. No matter what, we need to do whatever we can to make sure that our campaign is heard loud and clear.

Friend, President Biden is doing everything within his power to unite our country and move us forward in the right direction. He’s **reduced health care costs** , **created more than 15 million jobs** , **protected Medicare and Social Security benefits** , and emphasized his commitment to **protecting reproductive rights** and **taking action on environmental justice**.
**But despite all of this progress, the latest polling shows President Biden locked NECK AND NECK with Donald Trump as we enter the most pivotal months of the presidential election. **
**With so much at stake, Democrats need to show President Biden that we have his back. But to do that, we need to hear from 22 more supporters in 43614 before _midnight tonight —_ and we still haven't heard from you, friend. So please, tell us now:**

A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85257993/474175065/1575385346?code=jtk5045-su-nd&refcode=jtk5045-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjFhOWM1Yy0yMTE2LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TQqVXtgH_WDfbcUElzN9dlkrIQCMDXfgs25iukI-vc=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85257994/474175066/1575385346?code=jtk5045-su-nd&refcode=jtk5045-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjFhOWM1Yy0yMTE2LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TQqVXtgH_WDfbcUElzN9dlkrIQCMDXfgs25iukI-vc=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
| | | Peter, we won’t mince words: we only have to flip one seat to take back our GOP majority in the Senate.

**We have two options -** 1\. We can accept defeat and let Schumer and Biden ruin our country. 2\. We can fight back with a grassroots team that’s capable of delivering a huge victory. **[If you selected option 2 - we need you to chip in now to fuel our conservative movement. ](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=584a3e0e029545c5a234d48034b5ef16&_e=rJHvrOjEn-v-yXZjEKneVJuoM5-R4JYmQXrv6XH7JaRfQj_wz3yD9YNwWds4h9H2ToYiHuAPOHf8o69ET9W9wkVw1sMJZev_RIPoE0iNREQZVqHbozH8bFlHCjwi2Fp7JTKynH5N-eE4nyGFVeHycHRorhSO737A0BGykgFovvJTKxB8J5yOyk4SmThw32mj-wroKTv0N49391c1c0UfcnWKHhFFc1cfXNEsoUlj_xVjIbtq3sfj-VQSuupo_gH4dUcpjofj4BT5QuXSQLxB3IvN2c1a8vupPzYAaaDHfHmIJALHgsSg3EbbCo7HxWk4WY8FcqKM9VRStHjDydlZWfmd8VJL_qYwbxOOHu1A8Y1SSOZpmvZtnXQgeUwaUuQO)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our most vulnerable incumbent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Progressive champion Rep. Jamaal Bowman is one of the most vulnerable
incumbents up for re-election this year in what’s being called the most
competitive Democratic primary in the country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240519-jb.WEkj8K&refcode=em20240519-34877&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34877%2E1203867%2EIRgDNu ]Tweet from CNN’s Manu Raju: New — with @IsaacDovere. Gaza war and
Israel emerging as dominant issue in some key primaries — and progressive
Dem Jamaal Bowman now seen as the most vulnerable and at risk of losing in
June primary. MORE on @InsidePolitics Sunday 8aET and 11aET

Not only is his primary race against a GOP megadonor-funded, conservative
challenger in NY-16 looking extremely close, but it’s also shaping up to
be the most expensive House primary race in U.S. history.

A big reason for that is AIPAC: the anti-Palestinian lobby group has
dropped more than $1.3 million in this race already as part of their $100
million spending spree against the Squad this cycle.

Jamaal’s opponent is staunchly anti-ceasefire, which is no surprise when
most of his campaign contributions have come from a group largely funded
by the same anti-abortion, pro-insurrectionist Republican millionaires and
billionaires supporting Donald Trump.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240519-jb.WEkj8K&refcode=em20240519-34877&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34877%2E1203867%2EIRgDNu ]This primary is just over a month away. Can you make your first contribution of
$5 now to Jamaal’s campaign and Justice Democrats to help
Jamaal win?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240519-jb.WEkj8K&refcode=em20240519-34877&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34877%2E1203867%2EIRgDNu ]Contribute $5

Jamaal is a crucial member of the Squad and our young, diverse,
working-class bloc of progressives in Congress. Let’s come together and do
everything we can between now and June 25 to re-elect him!

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240519-34877-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34877_1203867_IRgDNu&akid=34877%2E1203867%2EIRgDNu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34877%2E1203867%2EIRgDNu

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=965d54a24f334818807aff072d156242&_e=kSIPMsIcYnCWcdkcNVauJnPfolgBb7VR2PWTdLsGaaq591LwCMXFAOiywm8r5pf2B4gUmfUkaC4Ayup9ro7tyeiY4fppJ59fn4J6UrrW_xcLIpA5xyWVYZKBs2b6_Lwo0ZCPexvDOlzopx3cJfJ3rOTOz8PPwvU50ASxe3M3vjzWERD9zsedFQCy6rxpi7AGwkx8dpXb6nw92rZH4RWt00xwDpDpVbzJuxayMMY_GMrm9QKEjRynEt8hv50tUNG47qku22QK6FrCLQFg_zV1LrTL7GXxdrUSZHO5UqTJC13rSiZhxcQphi8WCDDgL6P7sw0j0k8w-VJhlJbdurhEfVLW-Id-NiqfVIh2vf7VUVBrB28ymTI-Y1qQYMppcgmCOcn7DPlqwwaQKMl2hfQtgg%3D%3D) Over the past few years, we've witnessed a remarkable surge in union participation in Montana and nationwide. This surge not only speaks volumes about our increased dedication to fair labor practices but also underscores the pivotal role unions play in shaping our communities and business landscape. Jesse is committed to championing union membership and advocating for the rights of workers across our state. Unions have long been at the forefront of the fight for fair wages, safe working conditions and equitable treatment in the workplace. clean_body: Folks, Montana stands as a beacon of union strength, boasting one of the highest rates of union membership in the nation. Just check out the illustration below! | | | Folks, Montana stands as a beacon of union strength, boasting one of the highest rates of union membership in the nation. Just check out the illustration below! Over the past few years, we've witnessed a remarkable surge in union participation in Montana and nationwide. This surge not only speaks volumes about our increased dedication to fair labor practices but also underscores the pivotal role unions play in shaping our communities and business landscape. Jesse is committed to championing union membership and advocating for the rights of workers across our state. Unions have long been at the forefront of the fight for fair wages, safe working conditions and equitable treatment in the workplace. So we’d like to know your personal opinion. Do you support unions? As Secretary of State, Jesse will work tirelessly to uphold the rights of workers and promote policies that support union growth. Montana is a perfect example of a state that can balance high union membership with business prosperity. Thank you for letting us know your thoughts. Your support in this moment is critical, because Scott Perry is one of the BIGGEST villains in Congress right now. Here’s an overview of some of his greatest hits:
🚨 Helped plan the deadly January 6th insurrection
🗳️ Voted to throw out our ballots in 2021 to protect Trump
🏥 Co-sponsored the Life at Conception Act — a national abortion ban with no exceptions — every Congress since 2018
👷🏽 Voted against labor unions and working families at every opportunity
Janelle is a champion for women’s rights, democracy, and Pennsylvania families, but she won’t make it to Congress without your support. Now that she’s officially the Democratic nominee, the GOP is pouring MILLIONS in dark money into this race.
I know how extremists are defeated because I did it myself in 2022. Now I’m asking you to support Janelle Stelson because I know she will fight like hell for all Pennsylvanians in Congress. With grassroots supporters like you, we can defeat the GOP and deliver progress.

clean_body: My friend Janelle Stelson is the Democratic nominee running to defeat MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Something big is happening in Pennsylvania. Hi, it’s John Fetterman. My friend Janelle Stelson is officially the Democratic nominee running to defeat MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry in Pennsylvania’s 10th Congressional District. And, she needs your support right now. = | | = Your support in this moment is critical, because Scott Perry is one of the BIGGEST villains in Congress right now. Here’s an overview of some of his greatest hits: 🚨 Helped plan the deadly January 6th insurrection 🗳️ Voted to throw out our ballots in 2021 to protect Trump 🏥 Co-sponsored the Life at Conception Act — a national abortion ban with no exceptions — every Congress since 2018 👷🏽 Voted against labor unions and working families at every opportunity Janelle is a champion for women’s rights, democracy, and Pennsylvania families, but she won’t make it to Congress without your support. Now that she’s officially the Democratic nominee, the GOP is pouring MILLIONS in dark money into this race. I know how extremists are defeated because I did it myself in 2022. Now I’m asking you to support Janelle Stelson because I know she will fight like hell for all Pennsylvanians in Congress. With grassroots supporters like you, we can defeat the GOP and deliver progress. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m all in for Janelle. Are you? ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for more than three decades as an Emmy-award-winning journalist. Now, Janelle is taking on Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — good-paying jobs to support our families, abortion rights, the highest quality healthcare and education, and someone we know we can trust. Janelle needs your support to unseat MAGA extremist Scott Perry and flip Pennsylvania's 10th District blue.** | = = Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Dear Peter,
More great news.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and his running mate Nicole Shanahan announced they turned in _over 245,572 signatures, more than twice as many as required_ , to gain ballot access in Texas.
This huge news comes only days after it was revealed that RFK Jr. will appear on the Oklahoma and Ohio state ballots!
As we pick up speed and garner more ballot access, the attacks are getting more vicious from the Democrats and Republicans.
And we know why:
| ➢ Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., is among the best-liked figures in national politics, 45% of Americans have a very or somewhat favorable opinion of him.
---
➢ Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., is leading the polls in voters under 45; and—according to CNN...
| | _“A look at the polling reveals Kennedy is polling _better than any independent candidate since Ross Perot_ in 1996... And he is poised to do what Perot failed to do before him ... _make the fall debates against the major party nominees_.”_
---
We have the momentum, we are the future—and we need you to help us close the deal this November!

name: River Gassen
subject: Campaign Update and more
body:
Celebrating the Colfax Marathon | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/riverforcolorado/campaign-update-and-more?e=3818d77efc)
---
[](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=af9e04cd13&e=3818d77efc)
|
# Celebrating Our Success

Did you know? My campaign has more individual contributes than any other candidate in the 5th Congressional District right now.
I also have the most donation from inside our own district, and within Colorado as well.

It’s the result of hard work, and simply putting in the hours to be willing to reach people. But that not the only thing our campaign goes the distance on.

As many of you may have known, this weekend was Colfax Weekend. And I took some time off for the campaign to complete the 26.2 miles, of the Denver Colfax Marathon. About 4hours and 36minutes to be a little more precise, but the Race Results are still incoming for an exact time.

While the Colfax Marathon did not have the altitude of the races I’ve done here in my district, the Pikes Peak Ascent, which reaches 14,114ft, or the the Colorado Springs Marathon which reached 6,457 ft - running though the stunning Mile High Stadium, Sloan Lake, and the Streets of Downtown Denver still inspires my love for this state.

This marathon was actually the lowest altitude marathon I’ve completed, as well as the first of this length outside of my own Congressional District, but hopefully you can forgive me for straying away from home for the morning.
I’m make sure to update you later on - with race results and race photos as they become available - and of course more campaign updates too.
In the spirit of good health - I am reaching out to friends, family, and supporters to join me in making a difference, not just on the race course but in our community as well.
I’m inviting you to contribute $26.20 to our campaign - a dollar for every mile of the marathon. Your support will help fuel our efforts to bring about positive change and make a significant impact.
Your support means more than you know. Every $26.20 contribution helps us spread our message further and ensure that our campaign can continue to fight for the values we share. Weather you’re lacing up your shoes getting ready to knock doors with me this week, or supporting us through your donation, you're donation involvement is deeply appreciated.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/river-gassen-for-congress-1

Thank you for considering this special way to support our campaign. Together, we can go the distance and achieve something extraordinary for our community.
With heartfelt thanks,River Gassen
---
[Chip in $26.20](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=91b47b02f6&e=3818d77efc)

While the Colfax Marathon did not have the altitude of the races I’ve done here in my district, the Pikes Peak Ascent, which reaches 14,114ft, or the the Colorado Springs Marathon which reached 6,457 ft - running though the stunning Mile High Stadium, Sloan Lake, and the Streets of Downtown Denver still inspires my love for this state. This marathon was actually the lowest altitude marathon I’ve completed, as well as the first of this length outside of my own Congressional District, but hopefully you can forgive me for straying away from home for the morning. I’m make sure to update you later on - with race results and race photos as they become available - and of course more campaign updates too. In the spirit of good health - I am reaching out to friends, family, and supporters to join me in making a difference, not just on the race course but in our community as well. I’m inviting you to contribute $26.20 to our campaign - a dollar for every mile of the marathon. Your support will help fuel our efforts to bring about positive change and make a significant impact. Your support means more than you know. Every $26.20 contribution helps us spread our message further and ensure that our campaign can continue to fight for the values we share. Weather you’re lacing up your shoes getting ready to knock doors with me this week, or supporting us through your donation, you're donation involvement is deeply appreciated. Thank you for considering this special way to support our campaign. Together, we can go the distance and achieve something extraordinary for our community. With heartfelt thanks,River Gassen | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Copyright (C) 2024 River Gassen for Congress. All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: River Gassen for Congress 4164 Austin Bluffs Pkwy #305 Colorado Springs, CO 80918 USA Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What I’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2181%2E4032634%2EntgOeI)
---
While the 2024 election is a top priority this year, I’m still making sure we’re getting work done for working families in the Senate — and that our priorities aren’t being put on the back burner. I wanted to mention a few recent fights that have gotten me out of bed in the morning:
* Ensuring that automatic refunds for canceled and severely delayed flights are actually automatic, by successfully pushing for that measure to be included in a recent bill that Congress has passed
* Reintroducing legislation to combat the maternal health crisis and help root out the deep disparities and systemic racism in our healthcare system
* Working to make sure more military families get access to affordable housing and child care
* Calling out bank lobbyists and their GOP allies in Congress for trying to squash a new Consumer Financial Protection Bureau rule against credit card junk fees that would save Americans billions of dollars a year
* Pressing for answers on why corporate interests are opposing a Biden-Harris administration initiative to lower prescription drug costs
* Introducing a bill that would lead to lower prices for air travel by allowing for more competition among airlines
* Reintroducing legislation to electrify and modernize our nation’s transportation infrastructure — which would be a huge step forward in our fight against climate change
* Urging accountability for a student loan servicer that’s hurt hundreds of thousands of borrowers with its failures

All the while, I’m also fighting for all the big, structural change our country needs. Like ensuring universal child care. Taxing the rich to fund opportunity for all. Bringing down housing costs. Guaranteeing the right to an abortion nationwide. Rooting corruption out of Washington, including by making Supreme Court justices follow a binding code of ethics. **This is important work that I can’t do alone. That’s why I’m grateful for you. Alongside a nationwide grassroots movement, you power our fight for working families — by raising your voice, by getting your friends and family members engaged, and, yes, by chipping in when you’re able to.** [**If it makes sense for you right now, will you pitch in $28 or any amount to support our re-election campaign and help make change that touches people’s lives?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2210?t=8&akid=2181%2E4032634%2EntgOeI) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

clean_body: Friend, we’ve emailed you a lot lately, but let us explain why we’re going to ask you for your support once again. Earlier this week, we set a goal to raise $3,000 by May 15th. Unfortunately, we didn’t quite reach our goal. That’s why we’re reaching out: to ask if you can help us close the gap today. = | = We don’t set these goals arbitrarily — we set them so we’re prepared for whatever comes our way. During this election year, we are working hard to deliver for Marylanders and mobilize folks across the state to turn out to vote this November. But we can only do that with your support. So please, help us catch up on our fundraising gap by making a contribution right now to power our work. = **=** In gratitude, Team Moore

name: Fight Corporate PACs via Our Revolution
subject: An existential fight between progressives and the establishment

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17776?t=1011?refcode=email-20240519&akid=6021%2E5885482%2EVnTzf- ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, our
movement is about fighting against a broken political system, corporate
PACs, and right-wing billionaires to achieve material change for the
working class. The political establishment doesn’t want us to win, because
most lawmakers and the ultra-wealthy want to protect the status quo. But
the status quo doesn’t work for most of us.

That’s why the political establishment is trying everything it can to stop
us from electing Susheela Jayapal in Oregon’s 3rd Congressional District.
Trump donors, AIPAC, corporate Democrats, and corporate PACs are all
throwing their weight, and millions of dollars, into the primary to try to
defeat Susheela.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17777?t=1052&akid=6021%2E5885482%2EVnTzf- ][IMG]

The primary is on Tuesday (just two days away) and we need your support to
win against the big right-wing money of the political establishment.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17776?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240519&akid=6021%2E5885482%2EVnTzf- ]Donate today to help us get out the vote for Susheela Jayapal — a
progressive champion running against the political establishment and over
$4 million in corporate super PAC money?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

There are a lot of reasons corporate PACs are targeting Susheela Jayapal.
She’s one of the candidates speaking out for a permanent Ceasefire and
Peace in Gaza. She supports Medicare for All, because it’s time that the
American healthcare system prioritized patients over CEO salaries. She
supports a Green New Deal, because only urgent, aggressive action can
fight the climate crisis.

Susheela Jayapal is fighting alongside our movement, Bernie Sanders, her
sister Pramila, and other progressive leaders for policies that the people
need, not policies that preserve the power of corporate America.

Corporate PACs have dumped millions against Susheela just in the last few
weeks. We need as many small-dollar donations we can get right now to
fight back against big money.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17776?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240519&akid=6021%2E5885482%2EVnTzf- ]Can you chip in to elect Susheela Jayapal this Tuesday? We can only fight
back against the political establishment with your help. Our average
donation is just $18.12.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: And we’re off…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter, I’ve been so overwhelmed by the groundswell of support since we won our primary.

Since becoming the Democratic nominee for Senate here in Maryland, we’ve received thousands of grassroots donations from folks who are ready to do whatever it takes to defeat Larry Hogan and keep this seat blue.

_But here’s the thing, Peter:_ **The GOP is celebrating, too.**

Hogan is Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate for this race, and it’s going to be incredibly difficult to defeat him and the dark money super PACs behind his campaign.

[Whoever capitalizes on this momentum right now will have a huge advantage in the weeks and months ahead, which is why we set a 10,000 General Election Founding Donor Goal. Will you chip in a split donation of $15 between my campaign and Defeat Republicans to make sure we hit it?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85260020/474181987/324525579?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240519_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYmEwNzRiLTMwMTYtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O7wKzyl72uUXh1CAtMuremsXjnJWxFZfx8d_rDAxfxg=)
| [DONATE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85260023/474181988/324525579?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240519_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYmEwNzRiLTMwMTYtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O7wKzyl72uUXh1CAtMuremsXjnJWxFZfx8d_rDAxfxg=)

Hogan’s victory is a win for the MAGA agenda, Peter.

Mitch McConnell got his guy, and now he sees an opportunity to flip this seat red, retake the Senate, and pass a national abortion ban.

_But if we win in November, we’ve got a shot at defending our narrow Senate majority, which means we could restore and expand abortion rights, lower costs for families, and empower workers and unions._

It’s going to take all of the grassroots supporters who got us here — plus we need to bring even more folks into our nationwide coalition of support — to make sure we put Larry Hogan on blast.

[Hitting our 10,000 General Election Founding Donor Goal will give us the boost we need right out of the gate to spread our campaign message and set the record straight on Hogan. Can I count on you to become a Founding Donor right now by splitting a donation between my campaign and Defeat Republicans?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85260025/474181991/324525579?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240519_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYmEwNzRiLTMwMTYtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O7wKzyl72uUXh1CAtMuremsXjnJWxFZfx8d_rDAxfxg=)

All eyes are on Maryland, and with the Senate majority on the line, they will be right up to Election Day.

So let’s get to work, Peter.

—Angela Alsobrooks

name: Chuck Morse
subject: Join Team Morse in Protecting Our Coastline!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer
body:
| | | |
---
| | Derek,
Throughout my tenure as a legislator, I have consistently championed common-sense policies that prioritize the well-being of our communities and industries here in New Hampshire. As Governor, I will remain steadfast in this commitment.
Unfortunately, a recent offshore wind project contradicts both of these principles, and the Commission meetings that would have included public comment were canceled.
I have collaborated with local fishermen and seacoast activists to raise awareness about this issue, and will be hosting a press conference to provide a platform for folks to voice their concerns. We need as many Granite Staters as possible to join us.
---
| |
---
| | In Liberty,
\- Chuck Morse
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Derek, Throughout my tenure as a legislator, I have consistently championed common-sense policies that prioritize the well-being of our communities and industries here in New Hampshire. As Governor, I will remain steadfast in this commitment. Unfortunately, a recent offshore wind project contradicts both of these principles, and the Commission meetings that would have included public comment were canceled. I have collaborated with local fishermen and seacoast activists to raise awareness about this issue, and will be hosting a press conference to provide a platform for folks to voice their concerns. We need as many Granite Staters as possible to join us. | | | | In Liberty, \- Chuck Morse | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer. P.O. Box 106, North Salem, NH 03073
