| The general election is already underway in Wisconsin’s Senate race.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2642%2E35263%2EuW4VYC)
Peter — Election Day is 170 days from today! You might be thinking: _“That’s a long way away.”_ The reality is, the general election is already underway in Wisconsin’s Senate race. Wisconsin Republicans cleared the way for Eric Hovde to run virtually unopposed against Tammy Baldwin. The right-wing megamillionaire has seven uninterrupted months to attack Tammy and try to flip this seat red. You might even be asking: _“Does my donation even matter with Election Day so far away?”_ It’s a fair question! **But Peter, the truth is, your donation matters now more than ever.** $10 today has a much greater impact than if you waited until November 1st to donate. Hi Peter! Conor O’Callaghan here. I just got back from a Sunday walk with my family and I’m reaching out with a quick message before my mid-month fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight. My team tells me that we’re a bit behind on where we need to be. Your investment in this campaign in May will go a long way here in Arizona and it means a lot more than your investment in November. Your contribution will go directly toward getting more boots on the ground, getting more ads on TV, and spreading the word about our pro-choice, pro-democracy campaign. Unlike Schweikert, I don’t have the support of special interest groups and the GOP’s dark money war chest. I only have the support of grassroots donors like you, Peter, who are fired up to fire a MAGA extremist, flip this seat blue, and take back the House. **[Can you make a donation of $10 right now before our deadline ends tonight at midnight? clean_body: A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter! Conor O’Callaghan here. I just got back from a Sunday walk with my family and I’m reaching out with a quick message before my mid-month fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight. My team tells me that we’re a bit behind on where we need to be. Your investment in this campaign in May will go a long way here in Arizona and it means a lot more than your investment in November. Your contribution will go directly toward getting more boots on the ground, getting more ads on TV, and spreading the word about our pro-choice, pro-democracy campaign. Unlike Schweikert, I don’t have the support of special interest groups and the GOP’s dark money war chest. I only have the support of grassroots donors like you, Peter, who are fired up to fire a MAGA extremist, flip this seat blue, and take back the House. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Peter! Conor | | | ---|---|--- = As a proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is wholeheartedly committed to enshrining Roe v. Wade into law, safeguarding our communities against gun violence, addressing the urgent challenges posed by climate change and our water crisis, and ensuring our tax code is fair and equitable and works for small businesses and the middle class. It's time for a new, forward-thinking direction.** | = = Paid for by Conor for AZ Conor for AZ P.O. **Another week on the campaign trail means another week of the Democrat money machine flexing its muscles.**

body:
| | |
---
Friend, I have to ask before tonight's midnight fundraising deadline:
**C****an you spare just $5 to help my campaign reach our crucial goal to win in Nevada and secure the Senate majority for Democrats?**
| | [Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85260867/474184865/1514755465?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk3823-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDU4ZWNlNi0zNDE2LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZIwqhwKWTga40uSRSEiVS-eJVVnLgFdnLHzUbjsM1k4=)
---
It's no exaggeration to say that whether or not we can reach this midnight goal will determine what happens in November. That's because dark money donors like the Koch network have been pouring millions into Nevada to defeat me and deliver control of the Senate to Republicans. And now, _T_ _he Cook Political Report_ has _downgraded_ my race to a “Toss Up."

**The only way I can fight back and pull ahead is with your support.**

name: Jill Stein
subject: Julian Assange may be extradited in the next 24 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Wikileaks founder is headed back to court tomorrow.

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=1)
---
Peter,

The world’s foremost journalist and political prisoner, Julian Assange, is headed back to court in London tomorrow.

This is the final hearing to determine whether or not the United States has satisfied the “assurances” demanded by the U.K. high court that Assange would be permitted to use freedom of speech in his defense against charges of espionage, and that he would not face the death penalty if convicted.

If the high court is satisfied, his extradition will be approved and he could be on a plane within 24 hours.
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=PQrdvvs0u40ZFQHVK0YXh2wFlbq35IP6LZ3vWJmnE42Nt9HMhLJwoV5RufU_aU3oPQGhhWgJZ3Hh9TBfC_R45rtN703VkleRxjWKjKOi-9c&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=2 "Free Assange NOW") [Free Assange NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=PQrdvvs0u40ZFQHVK0YXh2wFlbq35IP6LZ3vWJmnE42Nt9HMhLJwoV5RufU_aU3oPQGhhWgJZ3Hh9TBfC_R45rtN703VkleRxjWKjKOi-9c&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=2)
---
There are three possible outcomes with tomorrow’s hearing according to a recent report from Reuters:

**Possibility #1: The high court rules in favor of extradition.
** In this case, Assange will have no further legal recourse in the U.K. However, his lawyers can and will immediately turn to the European Court of Human Rights to seek an emergency injunction blocking the extradition until a full hearing before THAT court.

**Possibility #2: The high court rules the U.S. “assurances” are not sufficient.
** In this case, Assange will have grounds to continue his appeal against extradition in cases that will extend into next year while he remains incarcerated at Belmarsh.

**Possibility #3: The high court throws out the case.
** This is the best possible outcome, because it will mean Julian could be immediately released.

But there is actually one further avenue.

Joe Biden could listen to the millions of Americans who believe, as I do, that Julian Assange is being persecuted for the crime of doing journalism – and drop the charges immediately.

We’ve been calling on the Biden administration to drop their case and set Julian free. Will you add your name now?
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=PQrdvvs0u40ZFQHVK0YXh2wFlbq35IP6LZ3vWJmnE42Nt9HMhLJwoV5RufU_aU3oPQGhhWgJZ3Hh9TBfC_R45rtN703VkleRxjWKjKOi-9c&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=3)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=PQrdvvs0u40ZFQHVK0YXh2wFlbq35IP6LZ3vWJmnE42Nt9HMhLJwoV5RufU_aU3oPQGhhWgJZ3Hh9TBfC_R45rtN703VkleRxjWKjKOi-9c&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=4 "Free Assange NOW") [Free Assange NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=PQrdvvs0u40ZFQHVK0YXh2wFlbq35IP6LZ3vWJmnE42Nt9HMhLJwoV5RufU_aU3oPQGhhWgJZ3Hh9TBfC_R45rtN703VkleRxjWKjKOi-9c&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=4)
---
The United States government has outrageously charged Assange with violations of the _Espionage Act_ – an antiquated law that explicitly prohibits defendants from invoking their right to free expression as a defense. Unsurprisingly, it has been used almost exclusively to persecute whistleblowers, activists, and journalists like Julian Assange.

**Three American presidents – two Democrats and one Republican – have targeted Assange. We are calling on President Biden to end his part in this dark chapter today.

** We need a president committed to defending free expression, transparency, and accountability. If Biden won’t do it, _you can be assured that I will_.

As president, I will drop the case against Julian Assange on Day 1 in the White House. I will restore our nation’s commitment to a free press by ending the outrageous practice of targeting journalists and whistleblowers under the Espionage Act.

**I have advocated for Assange’s freedom for years, and I am the only candidate who will be on the ballot across the country in November who has called for dropping all charges in this case. I urge you to join me with a contribution to our campaign today.**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=5 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=5)
---
In solidarity and gratitude,

Jill
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=6 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=6)
---

P.O. Box 4359, Fall River, MA 02723-0415
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com**·[Unsubscribe](https://www.jillstein2024.com/unsubscribe?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=assange_petition2&n=7)**
---

name: Flip the House (via NewDems)
subject: Our biggest opportunity >>

I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.

**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.**

Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons—but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.

**These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: QUICK
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Peter, it's Ruben. Look, we’re down on our fundraising. We’re behind on our goals. I need your help to catch up and win this race.
Use this link and make a donation, if you can:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/quick-RG-0519**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240519-2-160&t=1&akid=2350%2E734936%2EGTucmO)
Thanks, and sorry for bugging you on Sunday evening.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/website-endorse_copy/?source=fewer-emails&t=2&akid=2350%2E734936%2EGTucmO). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2350%2E734936%2EGTucmO). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=2350_734936_GTucmO&akid=2350%2E734936%2EGTucmO)
